|
---
Meet the rising candidate in the Alabama Governor's Race

|
---

|
---
### Let's Reconstruct Alabama, Together!
|
---
Yolanda believes that we must reconstruct Alabama for us all. As Governor, she will work to improve Alabama's healthcare, education, criminal justice, and our economy. Vote Yolanda Flowers for Governor!

clean_body: A GOP Victory in Washington State means of GOP Victory in Washington D.C.! Peter, We’re going to be blunt with you and not sugar-coat ANYTHING! Right now, we’ve only reached 34% of our February goal and have just two days!! Your support is VITAL and without it we risk falling behind our Pelosi-funded far-left opponent which means the GOP might not capture the house in 2022. You know what that means... 2 MORE YEARS OF DEMOCRAT TYRANNY! STOP%20DEMOCRAT%20TYRANNY Thank you for reading! Team Jesse Jesse Jensen is an Army Ranger, small-businessman, father, and husband. | ,

I'm excited to announce that that my campaign was selected by the National Republican Congressional Committee to be included in the [Young Guns "On the Radar" list](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=0ca84950c3&e=fc83fb200d).

What that means is that national Republican leadership is paying close attention to this campaign. I'm the one who will be able to defeat Jennifer Wexton this November and reclaim a Republican majority in the House of Representatives.
---
| [ ](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=db51bb976e&e=fc83fb200d)

|
I'm honored to be a part of the NRCC's Young Guns program, and I'm even more excited to be a part of a huge Republican victory this November.

Across the nation, we are poised to reclaim our majority in the House of Representatives and put an end to Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi's radical left-wing agenda. I am working tirelessly every day to give you the representation you deserve, but **_I can't do it without your help._**

**[Will you join me today by contributing $100, $50, $25, or even just $10 to help me defeat Jennifer Wexton, restore a Republican majority, and stop the national agenda of the radical left? ](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=7c4c5a944e&e=fc83fb200d)**

Democrats already have support of big tech, Hollywood, and the main stream media. We don’t work to appease elites the way the liberals do, we depend on real American patriots to keep us fighting. Over the past few weeks, several news outlets have discussed how competitive this race will be. That means every dollar we raise will be crucial for the success of Liz’s campaign.

**Flipping this seat is critical –** this race could be key to deciding the House majority, and in turn be critical for the support Iowa receives over the next two years. _**And earlier this month our first poll showed us within just one point of our opponent.**_

body:
Less than 1 week until the very first election of 2022.
| Friend,
---
I’ll cut right to the chase, because with less than 1 WEEK until election day, every minute counts.
---
On March 1, Texas voters will decide the fate of their brand-new 38th congressional district – **_and consequently, the fate of the entire House majority._**
---
And my good friend and fellow West Point alumnus, Captain Wesley Hunt, is counting on the support of grassroots patriots like YOU to help him win this critical new seat.
---
_As 1 of the 5 seats we need to END Nancy Pelosi’s majority, this FIRST election of 2022 will make or break our chances of flipping the House._

On March 1, Texas voters will decide the fate of their brand-new 38th congressional district – and consequently, the fate of the entire House majority. And my good friend and fellow West Point alumnus, Captain Wesley Hunt, is counting on the support of grassroots patriots like YOU to help him win this critical new seat. As 1 of the 5 seats we need to END Nancy Pelosi’s majority, this FIRST election of 2022 will make or break our chances of flipping the House. The stakes of Wesley’s March 1 election cannot be overstated... For the first time of the election cycle,Cook Political Report just gave the Democrats a 2-3 seat advantage in redistricting with new maps across the country. While we may only need 5 seats to take back the House, Pelosi and the Democrats have been busy gerrymandering themselves a safety net. And if we come up short on March 1, then our fight to take back the People’s House from the radical Left is dead in the water. I’ve met Nevadans from all walks of life this year –– truckers, cops, teachers, business owners, you name it.

**I’ve lost count of all the Democrats who tell me they REGRET voting for Joe Biden and Steve Sisolak.**

Nevadans want to hold this president accountable, secure our freedoms, and restore law and order –– and I’m the ONLY candidate who can deliver. That’s why I’m leading the polls.

name: Val Demings
subject: Florida deserves better than these two
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
Trump is rallying his base in Florida around Rubio, so I need your help to fight back.
| | |
---
Friend, I need your help.

Moments ago, Donald Trump walked off stage after a huge speech here in Florida to rally his conservative base.

It was everything his crony and my opponent, Marco Rubio, could have dreamed of -- **and now I'm counting on this grassroots team to answer them.**

**[Please, split a $5 donation between my campaign and the DSCC now to help defend the Senate and defeat Marco Rubio, then read on to hear why your support is so critical.](https://go.dscc.org/go/6769?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20220226-ValDemings-PostTrumpSpeech-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220226-ValDemings-PostTrumpSpeech-Pros-sl1&akid=3161%2E9716520%2EVxhitm)**

I’ve dedicated my life to public service. I spent 27 years as a law enforcement officer -- first as a beat cop and then as Orlando's first woman police chief. Now I’m in Congress, where I had the high honor of serving as one of the House impeachment managers against Trump -- during his _first_ trial.

Now I’m taking on Marco Rubio because frankly, Florida deserves better. But I’ll be honest with you -- flipping this seat won’t be easy.

We're up against a candidate who's raised tens of millions of dollars already, and every time Trump shows up here to rally the Republican base, the challenge gets steeper.

But there’s good news, too. Florida is always close. The last Senate race here came down to just about _10,000 votes,_ **and a recent poll shows us just _2 points away_ from taking the lead!**

With a strong enough push from supporters like you, we WILL overcome the GOP megadonors and win this November -- and that’s why I’m coming to you today.

**We set a rapid response goal of raising $25,000 before midnight to keep up with Trump, Rubio, and the rest of their GOP allies -- but right now we’re falling behind.**

**[Please split a donation between my campaign and the DSCC to help us defeat Marco Rubio and EXPAND Democrats’ Senate majority:](https://go.dscc.org/go/6769?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20220226-ValDemings-PostTrumpSpeech-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220226-ValDemings-PostTrumpSpeech-Pros-sl1&akid=3161%2E9716520%2EVxhitm)**
If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Val Demings and the DSCC. | | [Donate $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/6769?amount=5&t=6&amount=5&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20220226-ValDemings-PostTrumpSpeech-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220226-ValDemings-PostTrumpSpeech-Pros-sl1&akid=3161%2E9716520%2EVxhitm)
---
| [Donate $10](https://go.dscc.org/go/6769?amount=5&t=7&amount=10&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20220226-ValDemings-PostTrumpSpeech-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220226-ValDemings-PostTrumpSpeech-Pros-sl1&akid=3161%2E9716520%2EVxhitm)
---
| [Donate $25](https://go.dscc.org/go/6769?amount=5&t=8&amount=25&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20220226-ValDemings-PostTrumpSpeech-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220226-ValDemings-PostTrumpSpeech-Pros-sl1&akid=3161%2E9716520%2EVxhitm)
---
| [Other Amount](https://go.dscc.org/go/6769?amount=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20220226-ValDemings-PostTrumpSpeech-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220226-ValDemings-PostTrumpSpeech-Pros-sl1&akid=3161%2E9716520%2EVxhitm)
---

Thanks for your support,

Val Demings
Candidate for U.S. Senate (FL)

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/6769?amount=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20220226-ValDemings-PostTrumpSpeech-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220226-ValDemings-PostTrumpSpeech-Pros-sl1&akid=3161%2E9716520%2EVxhitm)

Val Demings is a Florida native ready to bring decades of experience to the U.S. Senate. After becoming Orlando’s first woman Chief of Police -- the culmination of over 27 years as a law enforcement officer -- she was elected to serve in the U.S. House, where she's championed civil rights, criminal justice reform, and the American Dream that gave her the chance to succeed and serve the people of Florida.

**[Now she's running to defeat Marco Rubio and help defend Democrats' razor-thin Senate majority. Please join Val Demings' fight by splitting a donation between her campaign and the DSCC>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/6769?amount=5&t=11&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20220226-ValDemings-PostTrumpSpeech-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220226-ValDemings-PostTrumpSpeech-Pros-sl1&akid=3161%2E9716520%2EVxhitm)**

| [Donate](https://go.dscc.org/go/6769?amount=5&t=12&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20220226-ValDemings-PostTrumpSpeech-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220226-ValDemings-PostTrumpSpeech-Pros-sl1&akid=3161%2E9716520%2EVxhitm)

| | | This late in the month, we're usually well on our way to meeting our End of Month goal.

**But not this month.**

With just 48 hours left before our deadline expires, we're still STAGGERINGLY short of our can't-miss goal.

This _**threatens**_ our ability to put up ads in must-win districts.

This _**threatens**_ our ability to register the voters we need to save our Majority.

And this _**threatens**_ our ability to do so much more to defeat Trump's dangerous, far-right House Republicans.

**Our situation has never been more dire -- which is why we 're launching a plan to unlock the 300% MATCH if 500 Democrats rush in a grassroots gift before midnight:**

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46461883&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjE4MzAwMDg2OAS2&l=14416759&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

With just 48 hours left before our deadline expires, we're still STAGGERINGLY short of our can't-miss goal. This threatens our ability to put up ads in must-win districts. This threatens our ability to register the voters we need to save our Majority. And this threatens our ability to do so much more to defeat Trump's dangerous, far-right House Republicans. name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: From the early hours here in Cedar Rapids, Iowa ...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
---
| | Hey Peter – sorry for reaching out so early, but I'm just having my morning coffee while reviewing some campaign updates and had to send you a note.

First, I wanted to thank you for being a member of this grassroots team. Even opening messages like this one to hear from me about our campaign to defeat Sen. Grassley means a great deal.
---
Secondly, I wanted to give you an update on the state of this race: Thanks to wealthy donors and his pal Donald Trump rallying with him here in Iowa, Sen. Grassley hauled in over $1.4 million in just a few months.
As someone who grew up in Sherrill, Iowa – a town that has more cows than people – I can't stress enough just how _far_ $1.4 million can go in our state.
Here's the good news though: Sen. Grassley's raking in cash because he's scared. First, nearly two-thirds of likely Iowa voters indicated they thought he should retire. Then, after a poll revealed he has record-low approval ratings with Iowans, a top Iowa pollster said Sen. Grassley is facing "weakness" in his reelection bid.
$1.4 million doesn't scare me. Sen. Grassley and Donald Trump and the GOP establishment that's backing him don't scare me. We can beat this guy, but to do it, we've got to have resources of our own. We've got to hit the grassroots fundraising goals we set for ourselves.
So as I bring this email to a close in the early hours of the morning, from right here in Cedar Rapids, Iowa, here's what I'm asking you, Peter: **Will you help me hit my end-of-month fundraising goal by donating $5 or more now? We still need to bring in another $22,000 to stay on track. Here's the best link to donate:[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/abby-finkenauer](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42289816/332422887/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk634-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTcxZWNlYi1iODk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jxtHif9vamvDy-2p5DBdazDxO8MSDU2f_spfqii5rBY=)**
Time for a coffee refill! I can't express enough how much I appreciate your support. Wishing you all the best today.

–Abby
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To receive fewer emails, please click [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42289817/332422888/496662621?refcode=jtk634-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTcxZWNlYi1iODk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jxtHif9vamvDy-2p5DBdazDxO8MSDU2f_spfqii5rBY=&emci=3f39ff5a-7596-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=3e71eceb-b897-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=13784334#!).

body:
Tonight is another important deadline for 2022 — election year. If we miss this goal, you can say goodbye to Trump’s legacy
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zh5tmhdhr51epet4v9f4ihg2919jum6ohlpuompo_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cjim9or2cdh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2d9ieuqfbdbie4rrcdljkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicboe4orm6uoe8d9j64rj7cllmip70t3lc2q7ec9kmio6fc5gcuqr0pbkm8or1pr7mv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti6lj35d5lmjjr4sj664ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp2bs)

|
---
| | | I'll be blunt, Friend.

Tonight is another important deadline for 2022 -- election year. If we miss this goal, you can say goodbye to Trump's legacy and hello to 3 more years of Biden and Pelosi's America _Last_ agenda.
---
| | | [CHIP IN NOW](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2za50fgvpak67l6lnri79fjq45nm8iqvb7h4o5iro_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cjim9or2cdh2bs)
---
**Here 's where we stand:**
* The Democrat Machine is planning an all-out assault on our 8 GOP Young Guns we need to secure a Republican Majority this fall
* Big Tech continues to censor conservative voices and defend their Democrat allies
* The Fake News media continues to spread lies and misinformation about our House Republicans

Our communities are less safe, with violent crime rates through the roof.

Our southern border is less secure than it’s ever been, with record-high illegal crossings and deadly drugs pouring in.

America’s standing on the world stage is at an all time low, with China and Russia more empowered than ever.

President Trump kept America safe. Biden is making America weak.

**Who do YOU think kept America safer?_[Live Poll closes in 45 minutes>>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3l3wm-20do8-4qqlpo8/ "Live Poll closes in 45 minutes >>>")_**

name: American Trucker Freedom Fund
subject: A political earthquake is coming
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Great American Patriot Project
body:
This is a movement to take our country back [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9525%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=F6nnrRpsqrPCkzgcSywFMg&sysid=1)
---
| | | | | | |
| | | | | | |
| | | | | | | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c14212%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2D6AB5n0t9v9XCLfcKV1cg&sysid=1)
---
| | |
Fellow Patriot,

Tyranny has been creeping across our country for decades, but **_for the past two years it’s been sweeping_** ; lockdowns, forced masking, vaccine mandates, and many other restrictions.

**The same thing happened in Canada where our brave brothers and sisters _lit a spark that’s going to light a fire of freedom_ _in the hearts of every liberty loving man, woman, and child on earth._**

We intend to carry that torch from across the country to Washington, D.C.
**_[SUPPORT THE USA FREEDOM CONVOY](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c14213%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qq5%2bxO7qtzUV4oTC2OERJA&sysid=1 "SUPPORT THE USA FREEDOM
CONVOY")_**
Since the lockdown politicians insisted we give up our liberties in exchange for safety, and one thing has become absolutely clear: **_no politician or government action can slow the spread of COVID-19, they can only accelerate the spread of authoritarianism_**.

That’s why we’re trucking across the country to Washington D.C., it’s time the government gives up their “emergency powers” and returns them to where they belong: the people.
**_[SUPPORT THE USA FREEDOM CONVOY](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c14213%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qq5%2bxO7qtzUV4oTC2OERJA&sysid=1 "SUPPORT THE USA FREEDOM
CONVOY")_**
**Free people don’t have to protest for Freedom.**

If we don’t act now, **_we’ll see the exact same authoritarian takeover our brothers and sisters in Canada are experiencing right here in the USA..._** and half of the country will go along with it because they are afraid of having their bank accounts frozen, human rights suspended, or worse.

Right now, thanks to the overwhelming support from patriots across the country, our convoy is growing larger and larger everyday with Truckers from Fresno, to Bismark, to Cleveland, to Baton Rouge signing up to join.

But, the cost of this convoy grows with every Trucker who signs on, and that’s why we’re reaching out today to ask you to sponsor a Trucker in what could be the largest peaceful protest in history.
**_[$15 = 10 Miles](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c14214%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=E74%2flfsmuiSfsYAiGoak8w&sysid=1 "$15 = 10 Miles")_**
**_[$30 = 20 Miles](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c14225%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4n05x9sW%2fPBj21yWp39vgA&sysid=1 "$30 = 20 Miles")_**
**_[$75 = 50 Miles](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c14226%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Cn66R%2b0amgxGYFxVKkAN4Q&sysid=1 "$75 = 50 Miles")_**
**_[$150 = 100 Miles](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c14227%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jUjpufwvq6EbOqIeULMoXw&sysid=1 "$150 = 100 Miles")_**
**_[$375 = 250 Miles](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c14228%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xNSNoBfJgrehKdPnh%2bQy0Q&sysid=1 "$375 = 250 Miles")_**
**_[$750 = 500 Miles](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c14229%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uMMZRTu4Tb%2bPeAgcoknYWg&sysid=1 "$750 = 500 Miles")_**
**_[$1,500 = 1,000 Miles](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c14220%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gR2sC18vKJV7ylugcfr%2fwQ&sysid=1 "$1,500 = 1,000
Miles")_**
**_[$5,000 = FULL TRIP](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c14221%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=u6O6TJ0C5xm5SQHVmmcHGQ&sysid=1 "$5,000 = FULL TRIP")_**
The Freedom Convoy must be the movement heard around the world, and we’re asking for your most generous gift to make that a reality.

**[Can you cover the cost of fuel for 50 miles for one of our Freedom Truckers?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c14222%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Y1ZxUbS8aucOLt0WmrWDSw&sysid=1 "Can you cover the cost of
fuel for 50 miles for one of our Freedom Truckers?")**

The time is now to take patriotic, beautiful, peaceful action, or we may never regain the freedoms we once had. **_We’re not in the business of telling our children and their children what it was like when America was free,[but we can’t do it alone.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c14223%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HlwjE%2f44Rg9KjIyoJ4bxaA&sysid=1 "but we can’t do it
alone.")_**

**_[Help fuel our convoy as we take direct action to regain our freedoms and ensure we never lose our liberty again.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c14224%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kpO35lweTfXcpd5hqzVl3Q&sysid=1 "Help fuel our convoy as we
take direct action to regain our freedoms and ensure we never lose our liberty
again.")_**

Honk Honk,

American Truckers Freedom Fund

---
Paid for by Great American Patriot Project

---
|
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9525%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=F6nnrRpsqrPCkzgcSywFMg&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9525%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=F6nnrRpsqrPCkzgcSywFMg&sysid=1)

body:
March 2nd we’re hitting the road.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z57jic56k0m9dt74p02q1bb6iah0uurgr4ekfpn0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cjim9or7cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqct9hmcp7acdkmgprcd9m6kpr2sjk66pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tph6pqj1orkm1qj8tb1m6q6aojkcmq32sbn62qj4t9im5rj9otkc5jr8p9jc2oefkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj3ap5lmjg74cb6e4pbbd9nm2qmash5u)
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zdngb60v457fvatud9nlifrlh1hjb3d143kmn1d0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cjim9or7cth2bs)
---
| | |
Friend,

I'm writing to you with very exciting news. Just like our neighbors to the North in Canada, America's truckers are fed up with the unscientific and unconstitutional government overreach we've endured over the past two years, _and we 're taking action._

**That 's right, a Freedom Convoy driving from California to Washington, D.C. is beginning on March 2nd!**
**_[SUPPORT THE CONVOY](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z4f8513i8s02b9m1cdn5najp8mo7gcgltce416d8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cjim9or7cth2bs "SUPPORT THE CONVOY")_**
We've had enough. Vaccine mandates, mask mandates, lockdowns, and restrictions have all failed to stop the spread of the virus. **As we all know, it stopped being about the virus a long time ago, it's just about control and power. **

When Justin Trudeau announced he was using terrorism laws to freeze the bank accounts of peaceful protestors in Ottawa without due process, **_HE DIDN 'T MENTION COVID ONCE!!!_**

These same tyrannical, thuggish tactics will come to America if we don't stand up and say ENOUGH IS ENOUGH, **_[which is why we're asking you to join us by making a secure donation on our independent fundraising platform.](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zq4nfl1q7kqf9mc8hqmn7akhhr75j2kbu0gr0g30_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cjim9or7cth2bs "which is why we’re asking you to join us by making a secure donation on our independent fundraising platform.")_**

Your money will go directly to paying for fuel and food for the brave Truckers in the Freedom Convoy. With gas prices skyrocketing under Joe Biden, fuel for the cross country trip is $5,000 per Big Rig!
**_[$15 = 10 Miles](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2za1vbufq35odfjuoc7elv03kl2hbaqpjrg91cq1o_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cjim9or7cth2bs "$15 = 10 Miles")_**

**_[$30 = 20 Miles](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zjpuen7v8g0bn3fksn5asc8hb33b1v0vbf3o69gg_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cjim9or7cth2bs "$30 = 20 Miles")_**

**_[$150 = 100 Miles](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zt4fholgr2hc6o6lcoml1rnsltq3oovr1n5ccbb0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cjim9or7cth2bs "$150 = 100 Miles")_**

**_[$375 = 250 Miles](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zfbnv0r2r8trqs5bc6fge0u5u126v9g9j7fvkou0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cjim9or7cth2bs "$375 = 250 Miles")_**

**_[$750 = 500 Miles](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z75td2fpt8hbpmdm313h90445fdv8s4dsfpeb9v8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cjim9or7cth2bs "$750 = 500 Miles")

[$1,500 = 1,000 Miles](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z3pq8bjgls1qn8i9t3jchqucvmrdf2qedd8cchag_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cjim9or7cth2bs "$1,500 = 1,000 Miles")_**
We the Truckers, and We the People, have had enough of the creeping tyranny, and we're putting our lives on hold and our livelihoods on the line to get our Freedom back.

**_[So, I hope you'll join us as we embark upon this great journey with a generous gift of any amount.](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zckeoog8g0npld15fvrqovr1th0febjdvefc7ceo_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cjim9or7cth2bs "So, I hope you’ll join us as we embark upon this great journey with a generous gift of any amount.")_**

In Liberty,

Truckers for Freedom

name: Andy Ngo
subject: They'll arrest truckers, but not Antifa
body:
That’s why I’m asking you to donate $35 or more today to help me fund my landmark lawsuit that will bring Antifa and their m
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zuh3pq1m6hlrd11i289ospsj8qo028jn6kap29mg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2uphn4dhjmlpb3d5m6jjb4ctke4qe0phic6pr4shge4pbcodjeeqr1ppielie6ttnq9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphlciqr9o3i65j72d5lmorr1db5e8gq48bi4bh28or1clieap73clj649fg)
My fellow concerned American, I was one of the first civilians savagely beaten by lawless Antifa thugs. And unless we do something to stop them today, I’ll be far from the last. **_[That’s why I’m asking you to donate $35 or more today to help me fund my landmark lawsuit that will bring Antifa and their members to justice.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkdv07ptnuhrvmp726boabfj9fiepgg4te2rntc8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cjim9or5cph2bs) _** **You see, I was at Antifa’s “ground zero."** This was before most Americans had ever heard of the Antifa movement, but they’d caused havoc before. I went to an Antifa “protest” as a journalist, to document and report on the event. As soon as I arrived, I feared for my safety. The mob was angry and looking for a fight. Most of them wore masks -- and not the kind we’re forced today because of coronavirus. They wanted to act like criminals without getting caught. Many had on helmets and makeshift armor. Some carried weapons like metal pipes, chains, crowbars, and even bricks. I was scared, but I had a job to do, so I pressed on. **People like you needed to know what was happening. ** But I didn’t go unnoticed for long. Somebody recognized me and jeers quickly rose through the crowd. “F*** you, Andy Ngo!” and “Go home, fascist!” I tried to escape, but it was too late. **Projectiles started flying. Then came the fists. ** Before I knew it, I was being punched, kicked, and hit with flying objects. I tried to protect my head, but I did not strike back as I knew that would only escalate the situation and put me in more danger. Not to mention they stole my camera. What they did to me is unacceptable. But this last summer, it became much worse than I could’ve ever imagined as Antifa set fire to entire cities for weeks on end. **And now, we’re watching Antifa and similar groups threaten mass riots and violence across the country.**
**[Will you donate $35 or more to help me cover the costs of my lawsuit against Antifa?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqceqm8t071h6bj2v6p87dlbuf1nq2g9av4knem8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cjim9or5cph2bs)** This is bigger than me alone. You see, after I got away from the mob, police finally showed up to question me, but my attackers stole all my evidence. Later, cell phone footage from a bystander surfaced online. Thank goodness! The video captured the attack, clear as day. I hoped I’d get the justice I deserved. Wrong. To this day, over a year later, my attackers are walking free. Portland police did nothing. No charges. No convictions. No justice. It’s not much of a surprise, though. You see, radical politicians have long-since bowed to the dangerous mob that terrorizes their streets. And now, as you and I are watching Antifa’s nationwide takeover, more and more politicians across the country are following suit. It’s so bad that the justice system is buckling under the pressure of threats of violence from these disgusting thugs. We have to stop them and make them face real, legal consequences for their destructive actions before they get to you and your family. [_**That’s why I hope you’ll join the fight by donating $35 or more to fund my landmark lawsuit against Antifa and their members.**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcmhbua4b8ofhv79juce1ui3o4fjg0sbv4srna30_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cjim9or5cph2bs) Because Antifa wants the end of America as we know it -- and they’ll stop at nothing to get it. Believe me when I say that’s not an overstatement. Some members are avowed socialists or communists. But many are much worse – open anarchists who want to tear down our society and remake it in their own twisted vision. By any means necessary, **_Rioting. Destruction. Mayhem. _** And they know, as long as they choose politically favored protests to co-opt, the media and politicians will never have the guts to denounce their violence or hold them accountable. It’s a sick strategy, but very smart – because so far, they’ve been right! **For the most part, they’ve gotten off scot-free.**** ** Our politicians and media are treating this deranged terrorist group like peaceful protestors! As we’ve seen, their riots will only spread and intensify if Antifa continues to escape consequences. **So now I’m taking justice into my own hands – with the help of the talented lawyers at the Center for American Liberty. ** And, as I mentioned, we’re suing Portland’s Antifa Chapter. We’ve made a lot of progress in this case, but we’re far from victory. [**_You can be a part of bringing Antifa to justice with a donation of $35 or more today._**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z520qsbs7vis0npqgkqma07hqvfi8uh2310uqt6g_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cjim9or5cph2bs) Though I’m seeking justice for myself, the impact of this case could be so much larger. This is about standing up for our country when our own leaders won’t. This is about saving America as we know it and keeping you and your family safe. And this is just the first blow we intend to deliver. By taking them to court for the attack against me we can prove they are NOT untouchable. [**_Can I count on you to donate $35 or more to fund this critical lawsuit?_ ** ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgrc09g6enoqf5u2msokvqopid1j707fpum1ka28_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cjim9or5cph2bs) Please don’t wait – if we don’t fight back and win now, these violent thugs will be in EVERY city across America, destroying everything and everyone in their path. Thank you in advance for your support. Sincerely, Andy Ngo Investigative Journalist P.S. I know firsthand that America’s troubles with Antifa aren’t over-- _**they’re just beginning**_. clean_body: That’s why I’m asking you to donate $35 or more today to help me fund my landmark lawsuit that will bring Antifa and their m My fellow concerned American, I was one of the first civilians savagely beaten by lawless Antifa thugs. And unless we do something to stop them today, I’ll be far from the last. You see, I was at Antifa’s “ground zero." This was before most Americans had ever heard of the Antifa movement, but they’d caused havoc before. I went to an Antifa “protest” as a journalist, to document and report on the event. As soon as I arrived, I feared for my safety. The mob was angry and looking for a fight. Most of them wore masks -- and not the kind we’re forced today because of coronavirus. They wanted to act like criminals without getting caught. Many had on helmets and makeshift armor. Some carried weapons like metal pipes, chains, crowbars, and even bricks. I was scared, but I had a job to do, so I pressed on. People like you needed to know what was happening. But I didn’t go unnoticed for long. Somebody recognized me and jeers quickly rose through the crowd. “F* you, Andy Ngo!” and “Go home, fascist!” I tried to escape, but it was too late. Projectiles started flying. Then came the fists. Before I knew it, I was being punched, kicked, and hit with flying objects. I tried to protect my head, but I did not strike back as I knew that would only escalate the situation and put me in more danger. Not to mention they stole my camera. What they did to me is unacceptable. But this last summer, it became much worse than I could’ve ever imagined as Antifa set fire to entire cities for weeks on end. And now, we’re watching Antifa and similar groups threaten mass riots and violence across the country. This is bigger than me alone. You see, after I got away from the mob, police finally showed up to question me, but my attackers stole all my evidence. Later, cell phone footage from a bystander surfaced online. Thank goodness! The video captured the attack, clear as day. I hoped I’d get the justice I deserved. Wrong. To this day, over a year later, my attackers are walking free. Portland police did nothing. No charges. No convictions. No justice. It’s not much of a surprise, though. You see, radical politicians have long-since bowed to the dangerous mob that terrorizes their streets. And now, as you and I are watching Antifa’s nationwide takeover, more and more politicians across the country are following suit. It’s so bad that the justice system is buckling under the pressure of threats of violence from these disgusting thugs. We have to stop them and make them face real, legal consequences for their destructive actions before they get to you and your family. Because Antifa wants the end of America as we know it -- and they’ll stop at nothing to get it. Believe me when I say that’s not an overstatement. Some members are avowed socialists or communists. But many are much worse – open anarchists who want to tear down our society and remake it in their own twisted vision. By any means necessary, Rioting. Destruction. Mayhem. And they know, as long as they choose politically favored protests to co-opt, the media and politicians will never have the guts to denounce their violence or hold them accountable. It’s a sick strategy, but very smart – because so far, they’ve been right! For the most part, they’ve gotten off scot-free.** Our politicians and media are treating this deranged terrorist group like peaceful protestors! As we’ve seen, their riots will only spread and intensify if Antifa continues to escape consequences. So now I’m taking justice into my own hands – with the help of the talented lawyers at the Center for American Liberty. And, as I mentioned, we’re suing Portland’s Antifa Chapter. We’ve made a lot of progress in this case, but we’re far from victory. Though I’m seeking justice for myself, the impact of this case could be so much larger. This is about standing up for our country when our own leaders won’t. This is about saving America as we know it and keeping you and your family safe. And this is just the first blow we intend to deliver. By taking them to court for the attack against me we can prove they are NOT untouchable. Please don’t wait – if we don’t fight back and win now, these violent thugs will be in EVERY city across America, destroying everything and everyone in their path. Thank you in advance for your support. Sincerely, Andy Ngo Investigative Journalist P.S. I know firsthand that America’s troubles with Antifa aren’t over-- they’re just beginning. Today, we can make them face the consequences that left-wing politicians refuse to dole out. | Today, the Republican Party announced a candidate who decided to run just a few days ago would get their support.
You deserve to hear the truth.
They sought out an individual who does not live in the district and is being thrown up as part of a menagerie of political deal making. Our Republican party has intentionally given up on this race clearing a path for the Democrats to get their way this November.
My loyalty has and will continue to be to you - the hard-working men and women of this district. Our campaign is focused on putting America First and your Families First. Just as President Trump stood in the gap and took the hits for us, I pledge to do the same for you and your family.
America is at a crossroads. If we continue with politics as usual, there will be no more democracy. We need patriots to run for office who focus less on self-preservation and more on saving the soul of this nation.
Now is the time for us to rise up!
Join me in this fight.

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Theology 101
body:
I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zlq68sml9aq9ef6nr673ev9sq8iscr2rt9u35qj8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cjhm6o73cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq0sjnm6qb6d9le1oj8cbl6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfedb26jj72t5iejj36obmc1ij3dpgm2ojccbgsdp38d5nceqbep5ncjibcd70e3jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coqm9ddksup7cphmc2qrcdtgmlin49fg)
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zpn5a5c4s1v8u38u00e7i26tqjf3l6o58k587kjo_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cjhm6o73cph2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning. Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him. [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zgf14r7a6r081ep82tuvcdb3gl365s2v55aqn2g8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cjhm6o73cph2bs) One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose. That, in turn, makes it possible to begin to understand our relationship to God.

The study of God, also known as “theology,” has had a profound impact on Western civilization, stretching back thousands of years to the ancient Hebrews. And that’s what Hillsdale’s **“Theology 101”** online course is about—the development of theology from the Old Testament through the twentieth century.

**“Theology 101”** has been a popular course, so I’m pleased to let you know that it is [**now available for you to own on DVD**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z357nqrsrifjsfc0pu597cno6skepko5kojif6s0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cjhm6o73cph2bs). You can add it to your home library or give it as a gift to a friend or relative.

We do have a limited number of sets in stock, though—and they go fast—so don’t delay in getting your copy of **“Theology 101”** on DVD. Secure yours right now at: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-theology-101-dvd](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zpuogcfcd28hk8f4kcf5b5ijd7l4f7n5klj4v3k8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cjhm6o73cph2bs)** Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, [please use this preferences page](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/prefs/9z2zd2a4gmb6nv91htj9eq3f4g36qeapebqrrpgk6o8).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zg41pf7t5s4vsvjillrbaajmqu7nv0r99q0u7mbg_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cjhm6o73cph238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

Team, can you believe this?
GA Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger just called for Georgia State Police to patrol polling stations! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_022722_B1_AC_30D]
This is a blatant attempt to intimidate voters – rush $20 right now to help us hit our $70,000 February end-of-month goal and defeat radical anti-democratic GOP Secretaries like Brad Raffensperger >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_022722_B1_AC_30D]

NAACP Attorney Gerald Griggs laid out the facts: "by putting troops or extra local law enforcement at polling sites (it) is going to have a chilling effect on legal voters". [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_022722_B1_AC_30D]
It’s clear the GOP won’t just stop at passing voter suppression laws. They’re rolling out all the stops to drive down turnout and ensure they win. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_022722_B1_AC_30D]

**Friend: Here are three things you urgently need to know to help protect our razor-thin Democratic Senate majority:**
1\. Political experts are calling Sen. Maggie Hassan's seat in New Hampshire one of the most vulnerable in the country.

2\. Senator Hassan doesn’t have as many resources as other top Democrats, BUT the GOP is spending more against her than any other Senate Democrat in the country - more than $7 million and counting.

3\. If we lose here in New Hampshire, we have no chance of holding our Democratic majority in the Senate.
**There is simply too much on the line, and securing Sen. Hassan's vulnerable seat is critical to maintaining our razor-thin Senate majority. **
That’s why we’ve set a goal to raise $50,000 by our end-of-month deadline tomorrow, but right now, we’re not on track. We cannot afford to fall behind now:

Political experts are calling Sen. Maggie Hassan's seat in New Hampshire one of the most vulnerable in the country. 2\. Senator Hassan doesn’t have as many resources as other top Democrats, BUT the GOP is spending more against her than any other Senate Democrat in the country - more than $7 million and counting. 3\. If we lose here in New Hampshire, we have no chance of holding our Democratic majority in the Senate. There is simply too much on the line, and securing Sen. Hassan's vulnerable seat is critical to maintaining our razor-thin Senate majority. That’s why we’ve set a goal to raise $50,000 by our end-of-month deadline tomorrow, but right now, we’re not on track. Hey, I’m Gordon, Lizzie’s campaign treasurer.
Yesterday, Team Lizzie had a Day of Action in the district, talking to voters across TX-07 about the primary election coming up on March 1 and making sure they have plans to vote.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe220226?refcode=lpfe220226_b [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe220226?refcode=lpfe220226_b]
Lizzie won in 2018 and won re-election in 2020 because of the strength of the campaign we’ve built together, and it’s so exciting to see it in full force this weekend.
All of the voter outreach requires financial resources that go toward supporting our volunteers, printing voter literature, and all of the things that make for a successful get-out-the-vote operation.
That’s why reaching our goals is so important, and I’ve been checking in on our $10,000 Primary Day Goal periodically, and we need at least $6,323 more to reach it by Tuesday’s deadline. If you can make a contribution, it would help a lot. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe220226?refcode=lpfe220226_b]
Thanks,
Gordon Center

name: Imani Oakley
subject: There are two ways to play this game
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oakley for Congress
body:
Peter,

In the lead-up to a major deadline in a race like ours, there are two ways to try to reach a fundraising goal:

1. Lean on corporate sponsors, high-powered lobbyists, establishment backers, and a corrupt political machine to help you coast to re-election
2. Build a people-powered progressive movement that gives a voice to marginalized communities

Can you guess which one Rep. Payne Jr.'s going with, Peter?

That’s right — it’s number one.

As we speak, Rep. Payne Jr. is probably on the phone with his corporate donors, frantically trying to out-raise us again using money from corporations like Raytheon, Wells Fargo, and ExxonMobil.
He thinks he can spend years failing to show up to work, failing to take his job seriously, and failing to deliver for our community without any consequences.

And it’s up to us to prove him wrong.

If we meet our February goal, we’ll show Rep. Payne Jr. that no number of corporate donors can compete with our committed, energized, and organized grassroots movement. Click here to rush a $27 contribution and help us do it. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-february2022?refcode=eom2]

Thank you for standing with me.

— Imani

clean_body: Peter, In the lead-up to a major deadline in a race like ours, there are two ways to try to reach a fundraising goal: 1. Lean on corporate sponsors, high-powered lobbyists, establishment backers, and a corrupt political machine to help you coast to re-election 2. Build a people-powered progressive movement that gives a voice to marginalized communities Can you guess which one Rep. Payne Jr.'s going with, Peter? That’s right — it’s number one. As we speak, Rep. Payne Jr. is probably on the phone with his corporate donors, frantically trying to out-raise us again using money from corporations like Raytheon, Wells Fargo, and ExxonMobil. He thinks he can spend years failing to show up to work, failing to take his job seriously, and failing to deliver for our community without any consequences. And it’s up to us to prove him wrong. If we meet our February goal, we’ll show Rep. Payne Jr. that no number of corporate donors can compete with our committed, energized, and organized grassroots movement. Click here to rush a $27 contribution and help us do it. Thanks for your vital support. \- Team Kovacs | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by John Kovacs for Congress | | id:2022-02-25-14:01:27:327t

name: Val Demings (personal)
subject: Why I'm running
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
my mom saw something special in me
| | |
---
I have 15 minutes of free time this morning, friend. It may not sound like much – but I've been working long hours in Congress to pass President Biden's agenda, and a gap in my schedule like this is rare.
So, as I'm sitting with my husband, Jerry, and drinking my coffee, I'm reflecting on this historic campaign – and I've decided I need to tell you a little bit more about my decision to run for U.S. Senate.
Back when I was growing up in Jacksonville, I went to segregated schools, washed dishes and worked at McDonald's. But my mom saw something special in me. She'd tell me I was _destined_ for something bigger.
So, when I thought about 2022 and what our country needed to do to build back better after a disastrous presidency, I thought about her everlasting words to me: "Never tire, Val." I thought about the hardworking families like mine who deserve a leader who understands their lives, their struggles and their dreams. I thought about our country's need to expand our Democratic Senate majority to protect our democracy. And, in the background of all of this, I heard my mother's voice in my head telling me I could win.
So, I decided to run. And now, I'm 2 points away from Marco Rubio in a race that can decide Senate control, and the stakes are higher than ever: We have a 50-50 split in the Senate. If we lose just one seat, Mitch McConnell regains Senate control – and three Democratic seats are already rated toss-ups.

I'm proud that our movement has an average donation of just $27.23, but building a people-powered movement means it's going to take all hands on deck to compete against the GOP's millions in dark money already pouring into Florida.

clean_body: my mom saw something special in me | | | I have 15 minutes of free time this morning, friend. It may not sound like much – but I've been working long hours in Congress to pass President Biden's agenda, and a gap in my schedule like this is rare. So, as I'm sitting with my husband, Jerry, and drinking my coffee, I'm reflecting on this historic campaign – and I've decided I need to tell you a little bit more about my decision to run for U.S. Senate. Back when I was growing up in Jacksonville, I went to segregated schools, washed dishes and worked at McDonald's. But my mom saw something special in me. She'd tell me I was destined for something bigger. So, when I thought about 2022 and what our country needed to do to build back better after a disastrous presidency, I thought about her everlasting words to me: "Never tire, Val." I thought about the hardworking families like mine who deserve a leader who understands their lives, their struggles and their dreams. I thought about our country's need to expand our Democratic Senate majority to protect our democracy. And, in the background of all of this, I heard my mother's voice in my head telling me I could win. So, I decided to run. And now, I'm 2 points away from Marco Rubio in a race that can decide Senate control, and the stakes are higher than ever: We have a 50-50 split in the Senate. If we lose just one seat, Mitch McConnell regains Senate control – and three Democratic seats are already rated toss-ups. It's critical that we win in Florida – and this race is tight right now, friend. I'm proud that our movement has an average donation of just $27.23, but building a people-powered movement means it's going to take all hands on deck to compete against the GOP's millions in dark money already pouring into Florida. name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: I need to know you're with me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=R9JKGzwQTGrUg%2BIo4%2BS%2Bx8BBBP4wIP5y&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend, March is just around the corner and my campaign is about to close the books on February with a $3,789 shortfall.
I need you to know this, Friend: I am so grateful for your continued support. You always step up when I need you most.
But please take this to heart: Now that we're officially in an election year, these fundraising goals matter more than ever. We are operating with the most tenuous possible control of the Senate - with literally zero margin for error - and Democratic control will vanish if we lose a single seat.
I don't want to begin 2022 by scaling back our campaign efforts - not when I'm up against radical, Trump-loyalist opponents who want to flip this seat. We need to be _bolstering_ our efforts to keep this seat blue and _expand_ Democratic control of the Senate. With everything from reproductive rights to voting rights to climate justice and more on the line, falling short is not an option.
Your donation right now could prevent us from facing a shortfall.
That's why I'm emailing you, Friend. Because you're someone who cares deeply about protecting Democratic Senate control, I know you'll take this ask seriously: [Please, before my end-of-month deadline, can you chip in $5 or more to defend this blue Senate seat and keep Democrats in control of the Senate? The months ahead will be challenging, and we need grassroots resources here and now to compete.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email?refcode=jtk1147-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)
With so much gratitude,
Dick
[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email?refcode=jtk1147-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=XgJEDl%2FC2fLU%2BcCyhOc5h8BBBP4wIP5y&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)
Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

We are operating with the most tenuous possible control of the Senate - with literally zero margin for error - and Democratic control will vanish if we lose a single seat. I don't want to begin 2022 by scaling back our campaign efforts - not when I'm up against radical, Trump-loyalist opponents who want to flip this seat. We need to be bolstering our efforts to keep this seat blue and expand Democratic control of the Senate. With everything from reproductive rights to voting rights to climate justice and more on the line, falling short is not an option. Your donation right now could prevent us from facing a shortfall. That's why I'm emailing you, Friend. Because you're someone who cares deeply about protecting Democratic Senate control, I know you'll take this ask seriously: With so much gratitude, Dick

* * *
Peter, we’re less than a week away from Primary Election Day on March 1, and I have an urgent update for you:

**My opponent is being supported by deep-pocketed outside groups, and they’re buying up airtime for him.**

Friend,
This campaign is running on grassroots donations, and I’ve just been informed that we are seriously behind our February fundraising goal. Can you rush a donation right now and help? [http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]
As a campaign that isn’t accepting giant checks from corporations, it can be a challenge to keep up with those who do. And as a campaign funded by the people, that’s a challenge we’re going to have to meet.
Nancy and I are unwavering in our commitment to a Maryland future filled with equity and opportunity. We cannot continue to accept a reality where the voices of the marginalized go unheard. We are at a moment of change in this country, and we want to do our part – but we can’t do it alone.
Will you please make a donation today and help us reach this critical goal? [http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]

subject: We cannot be complacent. Step up today.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
Dear Friend,

Now is not the time to be complacent.

Democracy is under greatest threat right here in its birthplace. As a swing state, Pennsylvania is at the front lines of nefarious efforts to sow doubt in our electoral system. We have to gather our forces to protect it NOW.

That's why we need your help TODAY to make our monthly goal. You know that we are working hard to build collective power here in PA and hold the powerful accountable. We are rallying and organizing to protect our rights.

Please donate what you can now so that we can meet our end-of-month deadline at MIDNIGHT tomorrow. Every dollar helps!

clean_body: Dear Friend, Now is not the time to be complacent. Democracy is under greatest threat right here in its birthplace. As a swing state, Pennsylvania is at the front lines of nefarious efforts to sow doubt in our electoral system. We have to gather our forces to protect it NOW. That's why we need your help TODAY to make our monthly goal. You know that we are working hard to build collective power here in PA and hold the powerful accountable. We are rallying and organizing to protect our rights. Please donate what you can now so that we can meet our end-of-month deadline at MIDNIGHT tomorrow. Every dollar helps! [] [] [] [] Anything you can afford... [] Thank you for standing up when the people of PA need you the most, Patrick Clark Keystone Progress [] Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www.kpef.info. Not affiliated with any candidate or candidate's committees. name: Dan Kildee
subject: Control of Congress is on the line
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee
body:
| It’s been a whirlwind few weeks since our campaign was added to the Democrats’ Frontline Program – the list of the most vulnerable Democratic incumbents. **Because of redistricting, our race has been labeled as one of the most competitive nationwide and will determine the balance of power in Congress.**

And now, Republicans in Washington are once again coming at us with misleading attacks against me.

In our Republican-leaning district, Republicans in Washington will throw whatever they’ve got at us to flip this seat and turn Michigan red. But we can’t let that happen.

**To win in November, we need to hit every fundraising benchmark from here until Election Day. And because February is a shorter month, we have even fewer days to do it! That’s why we need to pick up the pace of our digital fundraising right away.**

**[My team tells me we still have about $5,000 to raise from our online grassroots community. This race will be the toughest election I’ve ever faced, and I am relying on your support to win in November. Can you rush a $15 donation right now to help strengthen our campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42314425/332490881/1546385125?amount=15&contactdata=%2BiU3gPDIdyePh9EVJ3Xf5Y0B%2BBlAKbT%2FYSu9z2TINeJ3f6PsFtmbIO36HsxIVrvmgUHdVkBrrnq1K%2BWRNVip6UnXSBJt3BUMwMnOdu0b3Af%2BE9Ds6tj3eoV5P70zgn30dBQfqLThtnR0ttCanqlHOg%3D%3D&refcode2=b03d75b4-ee97-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&refcode=DK_EM_FR_6MO_20220227_1_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDNkNzViNC1lZTk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v9gMC0fbLizu3lYRXfShT-tD8Rpp8mAwWt37ylocVEQ=)**

Representing my home community in Congress is the honor of a lifetime and I’m proud of all that we’ve accomplished so far.

I’ve fought for the people of mid-Michigan, bringing funding to improve our roads and bridges, ensure clean drinking water for all, fix supply chain issues, reduce prices at the pump, lower taxes for working families and bring back manufacturing jobs to our state. But there is still more work to be done.

In this toss-up race, we’ll need all hands on deck to win. National Republicans will spend huge sums of money on misleading attack ads against me, but with your support, we’ll break through the noise and get our message out to voters.

**Control of Congress is on the line, and we don’t have a moment to waste. So please, chip in $15 or whatever you can right now to make an investment in our race.**

[https://go.dankildee.com/a/feb22-goal](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42314438/332490935/1546385125?amount=10&refcode=DK_EM_FR_6MO_20220227_1_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDNkNzViNC1lZTk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v9gMC0fbLizu3lYRXfShT-tD8Rpp8mAwWt37ylocVEQ=)

Thank you for all you do,
Dan

clean_body: | It’s been a whirlwind few weeks since our campaign was added to the Democrats’ Frontline Program – the list of the most vulnerable Democratic incumbents. Because of redistricting, our race has been labeled as one of the most competitive nationwide and will determine the balance of power in Congress. And now, Republicans in Washington are once again coming at us with misleading attacks against me. In our Republican-leaning district, Republicans in Washington will throw whatever they’ve got at us to flip this seat and turn Michigan red. But we can’t let that happen. To win in November, we need to hit every fundraising benchmark from here until Election Day. And because February is a shorter month, we have even fewer days to do it! That’s why we need to pick up the pace of our digital fundraising right away. = If you saved your payment information with ActBlue Express clicking a button below will cause your donation to process instantly = = = = =** Representing my home community in Congress is the honor of a lifetime and I’m proud of all that we’ve accomplished so far. I’ve fought for the people of mid-Michigan, bringing funding to improve our roads and bridges, ensure clean drinking water for all, fix supply chain issues, reduce prices at the pump, lower taxes for working families and bring back manufacturing jobs to our state. But there is still more work to be done. In this toss-up race, we’ll need all hands on deck to win. National Republicans will spend huge sums of money on misleading attack ads against me, but with your support, we’ll break through the noise and get our message out to voters. Control of Congress is on the line, and we don’t have a moment to waste. So please, chip in $15 or whatever you can right now to make an investment in our race. = Thank you for all you do, Dan Congressman Dan Kildee – a Flint native – is proud to represent mid-Michigan. As a Democratic party leader, Dan is fighting hard to ensure every American has access to quality health care, clean water and a good-paying job. The path to protect the Democratic majority in the House runs right through the Midwest, and Dan is dedicated to protecting and electing Democratic candidates. But we can’t do it without you! = | = | = Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee Friends of Dan Kildee P.O. Box 248 Flint, MI 48501 United States ** **

| Peter,

Tomorrow, our re-election campaign will reach our February deadline. With national Republican groups increasingly targeting Abigail and our district, your contributions ensure we have the resources to defend Abigail's track record in Congress. As you know, Abigail has worked tirelessly to advocate for accessible healthcare, lower prescription drug costs, broadband internet expansion, and so much more. name: Team CommonGood
subject: Beto was outraised again
body:
Dear Derek,

Friend,
We have some tough news to report out of Texas: Republican Greg Abbott outraised Beto O’Rourke in the Texas Governor’s race .
Again!
Here’s why we’re still hopeful:
Beto’s campaign has nearly three times the number of individual contributions as Greg Abbott’s.
Beto is building a true, people-powered movement and it's giving his team the resources they need to open offices, hire organizers, and reach as many voters as possible.
Derek, we’ve already proven that there are waaaaay more of us than Abbott’s extremist mega-donors. Now let’s show them we're not stopping until Beto has the resources he needs to build the biggest organizing program Texas has ever seen.
If you're ready to do your part to turn Texas blue, please split a donation between Beto’s campaign and CommonGood today. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_beto?refcode=20220227_CGVA_Beto]

Thanks,
Team CommonGood

Arlington, VA 22215

| Team — Ballot measures mean we don’t have to tolerate headlines like these: **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/42315714/332496041/1423568755?refcode=E14242-20220227-EOM1-graphic-DeadlineEOM-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYmMyYTk1OS1mMTk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nHDRZiWIXB-MH1oxNUddXyGnnsWE1gywHt32cqNVIrE=)****[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/42315715/332496042/1423568755?refcode=E14242-20220227-EOM1-graphic-DeadlineEOM-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYmMyYTk1OS1mMTk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nHDRZiWIXB-MH1oxNUddXyGnnsWE1gywHt32cqNVIrE=)** When elected officials and politicians refuse to act or create policies that harm their constituents instead of helping them, _our government isn’t working for the people._ By mobilizing hundreds of thousands of voters in states across the country, we’ve been able to pass policies that have changed the lives of over 18 million working people in _red, blue, and purple states across the country._ **Bottom line: Ballot measures empower voters to take the power back into their own hands and enact the change they want to see.** [**Team: That’s why we set a February goal to raise $7,500 by name: Val Demings
subject: I'm running for the U.S. Senate to defeat Marco Rubio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42315999/332496939/-74008005?refcode=20220227_Demings&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjgyNTBlOC1mMTk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jGPMhuvk39WG4vhnzJoYCLYKvhy6Vy_q0SaGVyoB2Sg=) Friend, I'm Val Demings, and I'm running for the U.S. Senate to defeat Marco Rubio and win better, stronger leadership for the people of Florida. Just 10,033 votes (0.2 percentage points) decided Florida's last Senate race – so I'll tell you the plain truth: **I cannot win this without you.** [**That's why I'm asking you to become one of the donors to my campaign for Senate by splitting a contribution between me and Serve America right now. Every dollar you can spare will help us build the strongest grassroots operation to defeat Rubio, flip Florida blue and defend our Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42316000/332496940/-74008005?refcode=20220227_Demings&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjgyNTBlOC1mMTk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jGPMhuvk39WG4vhnzJoYCLYKvhy6Vy_q0SaGVyoB2Sg=) Every day, I carry with me that I am a descendent of enslaved people, people who knew that they would not make it, but dreamed and prayed that one day I would. Their prayers carried me to this day – carried me through a life of public service as a social worker, as a law enforcement officer, the first Black woman to serve as Orlando's police chief, and as the proud representative of Florida's 10th Congressional district. **So hear me when I say this: Only in America can a little Black girl, the daughter of a maid and a janitor growing up in the South in the ’60s, have an amazing story of opportunity like mine.** The prayers of my parents propel me forward, even now, giving me the strength and courage it takes to do what's right. To impeach and prosecute a corrupt president. To never stop fighting for gun safety reform. To push for truth, accountability, justice. [**I stand on the side of our democratic institutions, on the side of everyday working Floridians – but I need your help to win this race. clean_body: | | | = Friend, I'm Val Demings, and I'm running for the U.S. Senate to defeat Marco Rubio and win better, stronger leadership for the people of Florida. Just 10,033 votes (0.2 percentage points) decided Florida's last Senate race – so I'll tell you the plain truth: I cannot win this without you. = Every day, I carry with me that I am a descendent of enslaved people, people who knew that they would not make it, but dreamed and prayed that one day I would. Their prayers carried me to this day – carried me through a life of public service as a social worker, as a law enforcement officer, the first Black woman to serve as Orlando's police chief, and as the proud representative of Florida's 10th Congressional district. So hear me when I say this: Only in America can a little Black girl, the daughter of a maid and a janitor growing up in the South in the ’60s, have an amazing story of opportunity like mine. The prayers of my parents propel me forward, even now, giving me the strength and courage it takes to do what's right. To impeach and prosecute a corrupt president. To never stop fighting for gun safety reform. To push for truth, accountability, justice. = In my decades of public service, I've worked with some truly incredible individuals – champions of civil rights like my friend John Lewis, who said, "Each generation must do its part to create an even more fair, more just society." We're at an inflection point for our democracy that will decide if we live up to John Lewis' dream, friend. The modern-day Republican Party is committed to the exact opposite of what Congressman Lewis stood for. Marco Rubio and Senate Republicans grow more extreme by the day, more committed to a dangerous, anti-democratic agenda. Putting party over the future of our democracy, over the wants and needs of Florida's working families. You have my word, that when it comes to winning this race and delivering better leadership for Florida, I will fight like never before. Because when your friends and neighbors put their trust in you to be their voice, you work for them – and that's just not what we're seeing from Sen. Rubio. name: Hendrell Remus
subject: Setting Our Schools Up to Fail
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bookbanning [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bookbanning]

Peter,

Governor Lee is setting our schools up to fail. He claims to be making improvements to our state education funding formula, but it doesn’t even begin to scratch the surface, AND he is using public dollars to fund his private, far-right Hillsdale charter school scheme.

This is intentional. Not only will Bill Lee’s private school buddies profit off of our taxpayer money, but privatizing our schools will erode our schools and our teacher’s jobs, setting up public schools to fail. The new funding formula will most likely support Lee’s voucher scheme which will be the final straw.

This is dangerous — Bill Lee is trying to build a far-right theocracy and use taxpayer money to do it. Our only recourse is to vote him out of a job.

Can you chip in $10 now to help us defeat Bill Lee this year and save our public schools? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bookbanning]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bookbanning?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bookbanning?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bookbanning?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bookbanning?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=express_lane_250]
OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bookbanning?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]

We are sitting on a multi-billion dollar surplus of taxpayer money, yet Bill Lee won’t fully fund our public schools. Why? Because he doesn’t want to. He wants to build a theocratic state and indoctrinate our kids with his far-right ideology. We need to fight back with everything we have.

Can we count on you to help us defeat Bill Lee this year and protect our schools from his indoctrination campaign by chipping in $10 now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bookbanning]

We can do this — together.

Hendrell Remus
he/him
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party

disclaimer_text: Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer

clean_body: If my friend Brad Pfaff doesn’t win this election, Democrats will lose control of the House. | = = Friends, My friend Brad has a make-or-break goal of raising $4,500 more by tomorrow at midnight, and I am asking you for your help to hit it. This has to be a top priority for Democrats today. If Brad falls short of his end-of-month fundraising goal, he won’t have the resources to defend my seat from his Capitol Insurrectionist opponent. I refuse to see that happen, but that’s why I’m asking for your help. Look, I’m counting on you. = I need to make this clear: if my friend Brad Pfaff doesn’t win this election, Democrats will lose control of the House. But Derrick Van Orden has already amassed over $2,000,000, an endorsement from Donald Trump, and financial support from right-wing SuperPACs. Right now, Brad doesn’t have the resources to compete with him. But if he can hit Monday’s goal, he can turn things around and run the best campaign western Wisconsin has ever seen. = | = = = = = = Thanks for your support, Ron Kind Congressman, WI-03 | | Paid for by Pfaff for Congress This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com Pfaff for Congress PO Box 3606 La Crosse, WI 54602 United States If you would like to receive only our most important emails, If you no longer wish to receive emails please .

name: Derek Marshall
subject: The momentum is INFECTIOUS!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Peter,
**This is it: this month, we officially launched our field program for our primary!** I am so excited by this development and thrilled to be working with some of the best minds in California’s 23rd district to kick off and build our outreach. **Here’s some of our best memories:**

We have so much to be proud of, and as we enter the next phase of this campaign, I’m asking you to join us. **Join us by signing up for a volunteer shift, talking to your friends and family about the campaign, or most importantly, donate. **
**[This campaign doesn’t exist without the resources we raise from supporters like you. That’s why I’m asking you to chip in any amount you can today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42316838/332500804/-431919476?refcode=eom1text&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjc4NzUxNi1mNzk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pJYWrUMCS4hD9NQiaMTLgVUCnboLACXRisoL7O_TyME=)**

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42316840/332500812/-431919476?refcode=eom1button1&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjc4NzUxNi1mNzk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pJYWrUMCS4hD9NQiaMTLgVUCnboLACXRisoL7O_TyME=)

**We’re planning to engage with voters–Democrats, non-partisans, and first-time voters alike–from all over the district.** In order to do that, we need to make sure we hit the fundraising goals that are designed to get us there.
**We have the data to show that this district is ripe to be flipped.** We have the path to victory we need to replace the Republican incumbent. We have the volunteers, the base, and the energy to get there. **Now all we need are the resources that will sustain us through it all.**
We’re just a few months away from our primary election, and it’s important that we can reach all our planned fundraising milestones by then. **[That’s where you come in. I’m asking if you’ll consider rushing a donation RIGHT NOW to get to us before midnight tomorrow night to help us hit our goal! Can I count on you today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42316846/332500814/-431919476?refcode=eom1text&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjc4NzUxNi1mNzk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pJYWrUMCS4hD9NQiaMTLgVUCnboLACXRisoL7O_TyME=)**

In solidarity,
**Derek Marshall**
Candidate for U.S. Congress, CA-23
* * *

subject: I’m about to step on stage at CPAC…
body:
Hey, it’s Kat Cammack here. I’m about to step on stage at CPAC. Let me tell you, it is so amazing to see and meet so many patriotic Americans who aren’t afraid to stand up to the Radical Left.
---
| | | | | | Friend
Hey, it's Kat Cammack here. I'm about to step on stage at CPAC. Let me tell you, it is so amazing to see and meet so many patriotic Americans who aren't afraid to stand up to the Radical Left.
Whether you're waiting outside in the crowd or at home watching online, you are an instrumental member of the America First movement. I know that I can always count on you to stand for the freedoms and liberties that make America great.
Before I get ready to make my speech, we need to show Biden, Pelosi, and the socialist elites that we mean business.
Can I get at least 25 proud patriots to take the stand for America First before I finish my speech? All you have to do is contribute to my fight at the link below.
Here is the link to contribute: [https://secure.winred.com/katcammack/im-about-to-step-on-stage-at-cpac](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001awFIIg_bkskBTPkAIUTNgIoBg6-u7FTvJROik_PbYTNwtOABYz19-3turMd81GYTdusz1wR0BdCUzy2N8ccJ3YyPnlS9LaGrpnM7pwQlDva8P02HcgEnvtzCh_8JqqlRElhSFCfxFhNPIoo7aKiPFyqH098QKAShMfKbgDilfsHhduDVu-ZC5OArGXtfMGvtUWxvjv5tSD_3UaTJT-1x-g==&c=-qfFjyIztINrslWpn4jT-2wf0Letg9xPDOXHtcHdyaYFREqCKDmPyA==&ch=elHy1nqCIsRoEugu02ghXfVTqvZdYNgxK159Z0ULLISkEygSw-EmNQ==)
I hope to see your name after my speech and know you're with me in this fight! Every dollar counts in the fight to save America.

Thanks again! -Kat Cammack
Sent from my iPhone.
