name: Tom Malinowski
subject: Notes From Tom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom Malinowski for Congress
body:
https://malinowskifornj.com/ [https://malinowskifornj.com/]
Dear friends,

“As I write, highly civilized human beings are flying overhead, trying to kill me.”

These words were written by George Orwell in 1941 during the Nazi bombing of London, and I remembered them when I visited Kiev, Ukraine, three weeks ago. I tried to picture men in planes overhead dropping bombs on the people I was meeting, and tanks rolling through the streets firing on the buildings I visited. I knew it was possible, yet it was hard to imagine. How can a modern European country in the 21st century be attacked simply because a paranoid tyrant wants to bend it to his will?

It’s important to understand that Putin is not doing this because Ukraine posed any military threat to Russia — that would be laughable. It is not because Ukraine aspired to membership in NATO — in fact, in 2010, Ukraine promised it would not join NATO, and four years later, Russia seized Crimea and occupied eastern Ukraine anyway.

Putin has made clear that it is Ukraine’s very existence as an independent, democratic nation that offends him. To extinguish its sovereignty, he has launched the biggest land war in Europe since World War II. He has decided that thousands of people should die — people huddling in bomb shelters, escaping down roads, hiding in their homes, not to mention young Russian and Ukrainian soldiers who speak the same language and bear each other no ill will — because he feels it’s his destiny to reunite the old Soviet Union by force.

The Ukrainian people’s bravery has been incredible. They are showing those of us who take democracy for granted what it truly means to defend it. They have earned every ounce of help we can give them.

I have urged President Biden to speed to Ukraine shipments of arms and ammunition that its defenders can immediately use. I have pushed for swift and harsh sanctions against Putin’s enablers. I’m happy that the administration has begun to rally our allies to this cause.

For too long, the United States and our European allies have allowed Russian kleptocrats to have the best of both worlds — they make their money in Russia where there is no rule of law, and then shelter it in New York, Paris, and London where our laws protect them. Western greed has thus enabled Russian corruption, and empowered Putin’s mafia state.

As bombs and missiles fall on Ukraine, ordinary Ukrainians — and Russians — should see the yachts and private planes belonging to Russian oligarchs and top officials sold at auction. They should see police tape around the villas and luxury apartments Russia’s elite built abroad. We should then use these seized assets to aid the Ukrainian people and rebuild their nation.

The evil of Putin’s aggression and the courage of Ukraine’s resistance should be a wake up call for us all. There is truly a contest underway in the world between democracy and authoritarianism. If that contest is lost, America is lost. But it can be won with our help.

We must close our doors to illicitly acquired wealth coming out of the world’s dictatorships, and open our hearts to their victims.

We must break our dependence on fossil fuels and bring home manufacturing of critical technologies so countries like Russia, China, Saudi Arabia, and Iran can never blackmail us.

We must invest in diplomacy and foreign aid, but also be ready to increase military spending, while pushing our allies to do the same.

I recognize that not every member of my party will agree with this last point. But in an age when dictators are once again trying to change borders with tanks, we must maintain the overwhelming military advantage that would deter another global war.

The Republican Party must also come to terms with something — that a growing force within their party, encouraged by the former president of the United States and the most popular right wing media personalities in the country — actively sympathizes with Vladimir Putin.

It is past time for Republicans claiming the mantle of American patriotism to say clearly that they will never again support as leader of their Party a man who blackmailed Ukraine rather than helping it, a man who tried to pull America out of NATO and our troops out of Europe, a man who called Putin’s despicable invasion of Ukraine an act of “genius.” It’s also way past time for them to tell FOX News to take off the air hosts like Tucker Carlson whose fawning tributes to Putin and disdain for American values are replayed daily on Russian propaganda television.

When planes are overhead trying to kill people just like me, I want to know what side my leaders are on. I hope you will demand that of everyone running for office in our country this year.

Thank you as always, and please keep sending your feedback.

Tom
Tom Malinowski served as a diplomat in the Obama administration, standing up to dictators overseas. Now he's standing up for our democracy as a Congressman representing New Jersey's 7th district.
Tom Malinowski for Congress
P.O. Box 263
Somerville, NJ 08876
United States
Click here to unsubscribe from Tom's email list. [https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/25c54f3c-d297-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a/eb787516-f797-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjc4NzUxNi1mNzk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NYciYWonCxI7aG_6CbjKniRfb1vZM4d-moCKV9JiEtk=&id=122888701]

body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]Hi Peter,
Can I take a minute to tell you more about or friend and inspiration Congresswoman Katie Porter , Peter?
Katie is a force to be reckoned with. She’s a fearless advocate for working families, and one of our champions in the fight for paid family leave. You do know about her white board, right?
She’s also at serious risk of losing her House seat.
Here’s why: The GOP listed her as a top target in the midterm elections. They are determined to retake the House majority and in order to do so, they need to flip Katie’s seat.
Can you please rush a donation to support her re-election campaign today? We promised her that Moms for Katie Porter could raise her $10,000 by the end of this month and we are so close. We are counting on you to chip in to help us close the gap. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsforkatieporter?refcode=0920]
In 2018, Katie was the underdog and narrowly flipped her district blue. If she’s going to keep her seat next year, she’ll need supporters like you and organizations like us to power her campaign.
None of this work would be possible without you.
With gratitude,
Simona Grace
Founder and Executive Director
Moms in Office

name: Team Bracy
subject: The real question here
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BRACY FOR CONGRESS
body:
Peter —

On Friday, Senator Bracy reached out to tell you why our February deadline is so important.

But, he left something out.

Right now, the Florida GOP is getting ready to redistrict our state beyond recognition — and there’s no question they’ll use this process to secure their majority in our state legislature and in Congress for the next decade.

The real question is whether they decide to carve up FL-10 and gerrymander us into a red district.

We don’t know what’s going to happen in the redistricting fight, but we need to be ready for whatever the GOP throws our way. That’s why it’s critical that we meet our February fundraising goal. Can you rush a $25 donation before tomorrow’s deadline to help us do it? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bracy-email?refcode=febeom2]

Thanks!

— Team Bracy

PAID FOR BY BRACY FOR CONGRESS
Randolph Bracy for Congress
P.O. Box 3096
Windermere, FL 34786
United States

| Peter,
I just got off the stage at CPAC in the great state of Florida, where I was joined by thousands of fellow conservatives from across America! These freedom lovers believe in our mission, and they know what's at stake in the upcoming elections this November. As I told CPAC attendees, the corrupt and dishonest legacy media is working to divide us. They are not in the business of telling the truth. They are in the business of spinning partisan narratives.
The corporate media is defending the regime in power. And make no mistake that's going to intensify leading up to November. They're going to try to do anything they can to protect Biden and they will try to fool the American people.
I need your support to keep them from taking our great state and turning it into a liberal wasteland. name: Team Madison
subject: Disinformation harms all of us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oklahomans for Madison
body:
| Did you get Madison’s message?

Madison’s decade of experience in cybersecurity has given her a front-row seat to understand how disinformation and cyberattacks serve as a threat to our democracy — **a practice Senator James Lankford knows all too well.** Our community deserves proven, honest leadership — and that’s exactly what Madison is going to deliver for Oklahoma.

**[With our critical end-of-month fundraising deadline quickly approaching, our team needs your support now more than ever — chip in $10 today and read Madison’s message below>> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42318546/332507284/932015169?amount=10&refcode=MH_EM_FR_1MO_220227_1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGFhNDlkNi1mYjk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_fPNEMMFoW_38VQlc62nyxXmTKpKNfjrMOoSgP0YimE=)**
* * *
**_— Begin forwarded message —_**

Working for a decade in cybersecurity has given me a front-row seat to the mechanics of how malicious governments, terrorists, and other bad actors use disinformation and cyberattacks to disrupt our society.

It has also made me increasingly alarmed with our current Senator, James Lankford, who amplifies dangerously unpatriotic disinformation at a terrifying rate – all while sitting on the Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs committees. Where is the accountability for his continuous unpatriotic attacks while he collects our tax dollars every pay period?

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Trump called me the “biggest lying scum” and “truly evil” last night
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress
body:
|
#
Derek — Right now, the world is witnessing the barbaric invasion of a democracy by an authoritarian madman. And what was Donald Trump focused on during his speech at the Conservative Political Action Committee last night? _That’s right. Attacking me._ He praised Putin as “smart,” lambasted his first impeachment as a “scam,” and attacked me. _Repeatedly_. I know. I couldn’t believe it either. Here are just _some_ of Trump’s attacks on me last night: **_“The worst are the politicians, the toughest are the politicians, the meanest are the politicians. And the biggest lying scum are the politicians, like Adam 'Shifty’ Schiff... We’re dealing with some people that are truly evil, truly bad people.”_** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42318568/332507368/2106225420?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20220227_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjY2E4MzQ0NS1mYjk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=myJKVZuLY3l60KZKJqbio4kiIFdfy01DzDbPWh9IrJk=) It’s worth remembering what the first impeachment was actually about. It was about Trump withholding hundreds of millions of dollars from Ukraine that Congress provided to help that country defend itself against the Russians. And why? Because he wanted to extort Ukraine into smearing his opponent. That’s right. He demanded a “favor” from Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky — to investigate Joe Biden — in exchange for defensive weapons to hold off Russian aggression and attacks, like the one we’re witnessing now. **This is all to say, Donald Trump is a craven liar who only cares about one thing — Donald Trump. Not right, or truth, or decency. And certainly not our democracy or the one in Ukraine.** But here’s the issue with this latest attack by twice-impeached, failed former president Donald Trump. These attacks have a real and damaging effect. Seconds after he delivered this smear against me, Twitter users were sharing it, and news articles popped up repeating his attack. And it takes a real toll. Especially as I have to run for reelection and introduce myself to tens of thousands of new voters in my recently redrawn district. _That’s why I need your help_. **[Can you help us fight back against Trump’s lies and attacks about me by chipping in $10? While you or I might not pay much attention to the former president anymore, his attacks add up and take a real toll. And we need to respond:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42318569/332507369/2106225420?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20220227_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjY2E4MzQ0NS1mYjk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=myJKVZuLY3l60KZKJqbio4kiIFdfy01DzDbPWh9IrJk=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **** | | | **[EXPRESS DONATE $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42318570/332507370/2106225420?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20220227_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjY2E4MzQ0NS1mYjk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=myJKVZuLY3l60KZKJqbio4kiIFdfy01DzDbPWh9IrJk=)**

I need a MASSIVE uproar -- 1,664 Democratic gifts before my End of Month Deadline -- to send this failed, one-term President a powerful message: We will never -- NEVER -- allow you anywhere near our White House again. If I can gather 1,664 gifts before my End of Month Deadline in 24 hours, we’ll OUTRAISE Trump and his Republicans and crush their hopes of ever regaining power. \-- We can either let Trump barge back into power and pardon every traitorous insurrectionist who desecrated our Capitol...

**[\-- Or we can have a MASSIVE fundraising response, OUTRAISE him and Republicans, and ensure they NEVER come into power again.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42318610/332507578/1694517773?refcode=20220227_em_fr_b1_pelosi_30_v1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMWRhZTU3Zi1mYjk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xLqdMBhzKtSU0sTtd7RoQjGxLmLVcoyv2iR5tVfP76k=)**

I don’t say this lightly:

If we let Trump and Republicans regain power -- our democracy will not survive it.

I will fight until my last breath to stop them and ensure Democrats win this election. **[But I can’t do it alone -- not when Republicans are armed with $122 MILLION to defeat us. I’m counting on your $15 before my End of Month Deadline in 24 hours more than you can possibly imagine. Can you help?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42318611/332507579/1694517773?refcode=20220227_em_fr_b1_pelosi_30_v1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMWRhZTU3Zi1mYjk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xLqdMBhzKtSU0sTtd7RoQjGxLmLVcoyv2iR5tVfP76k=)** | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42318612/332507580/1694517773?refcode=20220227_em_fr_b1_pelosi_30_v1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMWRhZTU3Zi1mYjk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xLqdMBhzKtSU0sTtd7RoQjGxLmLVcoyv2iR5tVfP76k=)

Let me be perfectly clear:

**Listen up, friend!**
Congresswoman Val Demings is down 2 points in her race to defeat Marco Rubio. It's one of the hottest Senate races in the country – and I have zero doubt in my mind that Val Demings can win this. But she can ONLY win if activists like YOU dig deep and support her every step of the way.
So here's what I'm dropping in to tell you: Flipping Florida blue can decide our Democratic Senate majority. And CNN is calling Florida's Senate seat one of the most likely to flip in November – but Florida's last Senate race was decided by just 0.12% (that's only 10,033 votes).
That's why moments like this can make or break a campaign. That's especially true when she's up against a right-wing incumbent like Marco Rubio, who is already sitting on a multimillion-dollar war chest and has the full GOP establishment behind him. **So I committed to helping Val Demings raise $10,000 before her upcoming midnight deadline, and I'm counting on your contribution to get us there, friend: **
**[Will you rush $5 or more now to help Val Demings defeat Marco Rubio, flip Florida blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42318698/332507812/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2486-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjMwOTJmNS1mYjk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fp_L9zgyoP7YcxNgGLDzotf7cfTD-LG-nsV1zILB2L8=)**
From the White House to the campaign trail, I've seen it all. More than most. I've seen what it takes to win, and I've seen what happens when campaigns fail to muster enough grassroots momentum. I'm told Val Demings has one of the strongest grassroots teams in Democratic politics – and trust me, I was relieved to hear it.
Because you know what we're up against, friend? Marco Rubio's campaign war chest. Mitch McConnell's super PAC that can spend near limitless sums of money. And you'd better believe Donald Trump – who has made Florida the de facto HQ for the GOP – will rally his base and spend millions to protect his crony, Rubio.
That's why we need Val Demings. She's gone toe to toe with some of the most extreme Republicans. She impeached Donald Trump and prosecuted him in the Senate. She's a fighter for Floridians, and she has everything it takes to win. Best of all, there's momentum behind her in this race. **But a fundraising shortfall will put her dangerously behind where she needs to be.**
**So if you truly want Val Demings in the Senate, if you truly want to flip Florida blue and oust Marco Rubio, then I need you to give, because she can't cede any ground:[Make a contribution of $5 or more now – every dollar you can spare before the midnight deadline tonight – to elect Val Demings and expand Democrats' Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42318699/332507816/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2486-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjMwOTJmNS1mYjk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fp_L9zgyoP7YcxNgGLDzotf7cfTD-LG-nsV1zILB2L8=)**

clean_body: Marco Rubio's campaign war chest | | | Listen up, friend! Congresswoman Val Demings is down 2 points in her race to defeat Marco Rubio. It's one of the hottest Senate races in the country – and I have zero doubt in my mind that Val Demings can win this. But she can ONLY win if activists like YOU dig deep and support her every step of the way. So here's what I'm dropping in to tell you: Flipping Florida blue can decide our Democratic Senate majority. And CNN is calling Florida's Senate seat one of the most likely to flip in November – but Florida's last Senate race was decided by just 0.12% (that's only 10,033 votes). That's why moments like this can make or break a campaign. That's especially true when she's up against a right-wing incumbent like Marco Rubio, who is already sitting on a multimillion-dollar war chest and has the full GOP establishment behind him. So I committed to helping Val Demings raise $10,000 before her upcoming midnight deadline, and I'm counting on your contribution to get us there, friend: = From the White House to the campaign trail, I've seen it all. More than most. I've seen what it takes to win, and I've seen what happens when campaigns fail to muster enough grassroots momentum. I'm told Val Demings has one of the strongest grassroots teams in Democratic politics – and trust me, I was relieved to hear it. Because you know what we're up against, friend? Marco Rubio's campaign war chest. Mitch McConnell's super PAC that can spend near limitless sums of money. And you'd better believe Donald Trump – who has made Florida the de facto HQ for the GOP – will rally his base and spend millions to protect his crony, Rubio. That's why we need Val Demings. She's gone toe to toe with some of the most extreme Republicans. She impeached Donald Trump and prosecuted him in the Senate. She's a fighter for Floridians, and she has everything it takes to win. Best of all, there's momentum behind her in this race. But a fundraising shortfall will put her dangerously behind where she needs to be. So if you truly want Val Demings in the Senate, if you truly want to flip Florida blue and oust Marco Rubio, then I need you to give, because she can't cede any ground:= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thanks for stepping up. James Carville | | Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you’re critical to this grassroots campaign. To make sure you’re the first to get important updates, or text “JOIN” to 77076 to receive text updates. = & . I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. So, please consider =. The 2023 race for governor here in Kentucky will be one of the most important in the whole country, and Andy has another tough race ahead of him.

Two Republican opponents have already announced their campaigns against Andy, and a wealthy, self-funded challenger may jump in the race soon. Our Republican opponents think they have what it takes to defeat Andy and undo the progress we've made for Kentuckians – and they'll spend whatever it takes to win.

clean_body: We need all hands on deck to combat this: | | | Peter, there’s something important you should know. We’re not just up against Henry Cuellar — one of the most conservative Democrats in Congress. We’re also up against a former Ted Cruz staffer — Cassandra Garcia — who’s a staunch anti-immigration advocate. In fact, Ted Cruz just aired a radio advertisement boosting his candidate, Cassandra Garcia, in the TX-28 Republican primary. Now more than ever, we need to elect more Democrats like Jessica who are 100% committed to creating a just and humane immigration system. So the truth is Henry Cuellar isn’t just an out-of-touch corporate Democrat. He’s also a weak candidate to face off against the Republicans in November. Although Texas’ 28th District reliably votes Democratic, Cuellar has spent the past 16 years aligning himself with Republicans on policy decision-making and selling out our district for his corporate donors. He’s pushed back on immigration reform under the Biden administration, choosing to side with Republicans and fueling harmful, far-right rhetoric about immigrants in the United States. This puts us in danger of losing this seat to Republicans altogether. That’s why it’s doubly important we secure the Democratic nomination for Jessica Cisneros. We appreciate you for sticking with us. Thank you! — Team Cisneros | To give by check: PO Box 660 Laredo, TX 78042

[**Tomorrow is our February fundraising deadline, chip in today and help us reach our goal!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42318986/332510307/2089498197?refcode=X_022722_EOM_D&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNWU0MDk3Ni1mZjk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_x_lGMzhFCqQ2bqSc1z-z6-y0pXcA689G6nyNNZvitw=)
* * *
Hi friend,
If ‘strong leader who shares our values' sounds familiar, it's because you've likely heard it thousands of times. But as someone who is very familiar with campaigns, I wanted to break this cliche down for you.
**First, is Kirsten a strong leader?**
Whether it's standing up for abortion rights or fighting against the ridiculous Cyber Ninjas audit, **Kirsten has never backed down from a fight. She's also never lost an election**. So, yes. At the risk of sounding immodest I think it's safe to say Kirsten is a strong leader.
Then we have **"shares our values"**.
From the first day of this campaign, Kirsten has talked about the issues that matter most to Arizonans: **Protecting our environment and working toward a sustainable future, building an economy that works for everyone, and expanding access to affordable, quality healthcare.**
Kirsten's out here fighting everyday for these issues and she will continue that fight as our Congresswoman.
[**I hope you will join this strong leader, who definitely shares our values, and the grassroots team we've built, by making a contribution today**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42318988/332510309/416963966?refcode=X_022722_EOM_D&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNWU0MDk3Ni1mZjk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_x_lGMzhFCqQ2bqSc1z-z6-y0pXcA689G6nyNNZvitw=)
---
Thank you,
Chesney Richter
Campaign Manager

Paid for by Engel for Arizona

United States

name: Team Wes
subject: Trump backs one of our GOP opponents
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42319200/332510964/-1531988014?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220227eom4_tw_60da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmU0MDk3Ni1mZjk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KEKsBDDE8NLy3RCXT-53t4EPYKlGJtDLzZHuoT6tekg=)
---
Team, While we’re still in primary election mode here on the Moore for Maryland campaign, we couldn’t help but notice this news about a poll from the Democratic Governors Association: | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42319210/332510973/-1531988014?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220227eom4_tw_60da_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmU0MDk3Ni1mZjk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KEKsBDDE8NLy3RCXT-53t4EPYKlGJtDLzZHuoT6tekg=)
---
The poll found that Republican voters preferred far-right candidate Dan Cox over his opponents, and _even more so when they were told he’s been endorsed by Donald Trump._
What’s additionally concerning is that after participants were told a candidate had been endorsed by Trump, the percentage of undecided Republican voters dropped from 69% to 30%, with an increase in Cox’s lead.
**Clearly, Trump has influence over GOP voters here in Maryland, and this important gubernatorial race could shape up to be a contest between a Democrat and Trump-emulating extremist.**
It’s going to take a bold, committed leader to go up against the Republican candidate in this race, and Wes is the right person for the task to fight for Maryland’s families, keep focused on issues that matter, and bring Maryland together.

clean_body: | = Team, While we’re still in primary election mode here on the Moore for Maryland campaign, we couldn’t help but notice this news about a poll from the Democratic Governors Association: | = The poll found that Republican voters preferred far-right candidate Dan Cox over his opponents, and even more so when they were told he’s been endorsed by Donald Trump. What’s additionally concerning is that after participants were told a candidate had been endorsed by Trump, the percentage of undecided Republican voters dropped from 69% to 30%, with an increase in Cox’s lead. Clearly, Trump has influence over GOP voters here in Maryland, and this important gubernatorial race could shape up to be a contest between a Democrat and Trump-emulating extremist. It’s going to take a bold, committed leader to go up against the Republican candidate in this race, and Wes is the right person for the task to fight for Maryland’s families, keep focused on issues that matter, and bring Maryland together. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = The future of Maryland is on the line. Hello,
I happen to know a few genuine heroes. In my book, Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky is the definition of today's hero.
Do not forget: This is the same President Zelensky who Donald Trump tried to withhold Javelin missiles from unless Zelensky opened a fake investigation into Joe Biden.
And that is the same phone call that got Trump impeached the first time. The same phone call my Republican opponent Senator Chuck Grassley agreed was “perfect.”
Trump and Grassley sided with Vladimir Putin for 4 years – and now, we are seeing an emboldened Russia rearing its ugly head.
If I defeat Chuck Grassley this November and turn Iowa blue, I will be the most senior military person ever-elected to the United States Senate. You can be sure I’ll always side with democracy and those defending democracy.
Mitch McConnell’s Super PACs are already readying millions of dollars in attacks, but I’m not taking a dime in corporate PAC money, so I’m counting on grassroots donors like you if we’re going to fight back and win.
The early polls show a close race, but we need to raise $300,000 before our end-of-month deadline at midnight tomorrow, and right now we’re still short:
[**Please, may I count on you to chip in $5 or more right now – every dollar you can spare before our critical end-of-month deadline – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42319316/332511158/-42398318?refcode=em20220227mid-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWU0MDk3Ni1mZjk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dZnm_ub1qs5C2QT4VRJ3P3lOPANkJFdJpw9JeGXgXoE=)

The early polls show a close race, but we need to raise $300,000 before our end-of-month deadline at midnight tomorrow, and right now we’re still short: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = There’s no telling what McConnell and Grassley will throw at us. In my last election, Super PACs even attacked me for serving our country around the globe. We have to be ready, and that means hitting our fundraising goals now. I’m so grateful to have you on the team, Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.) Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc PO Box 13401 Des Moines, IA 50310 United States

name: American Trucker Freedom Fund
subject: A political earthquake is coming
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Great American Patriot Project
body:
This is a movement to take our country back
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4opu06j9h4dbikcg67o89o2tndrkd1r807l5970_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbobaor3e5gn6p36cup6fcj4m1rjddhjmlqr9chmc1pmas7561rmbdtme3hnas3nmv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti6lj35dpl6hjr4cj66jgb4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5im9o70s5h64oh5u)
---
| | | | | | |
| | | | | | |
| | | | | | | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zentpign27dde0nb4elp3fqt4ljq0glluv62nmig_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cjge1ob2c9h2bs)
---
| | |
Fellow Patriot,

Tyranny has been creeping across our country for decades, but **_for the past two years it’s been sweeping_** ; lockdowns, forced masking, vaccine mandates, and many other restrictions.

**The same thing happened in Canada where our brave brothers and sisters _lit a spark that’s going to light a fire of freedom_ _in the hearts of every liberty loving man, woman, and child on earth._**

We intend to carry that torch from across the country to Washington, D.C.
**_[SUPPORT THE USA FREEDOM CONVOY](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ziffcce6jnkc1tijf7vv1abo09pek0uliiv48e5g_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cjge1ob2c9h2bs "SUPPORT THE USA FREEDOM CONVOY")_**
Since the lockdown politicians insisted we give up our liberties in exchange for safety, and one thing has become absolutely clear: **_no politician or government action can slow the spread of COVID-19, they can only accelerate the spread of authoritarianism_**.

That’s why we’re trucking across the country to Washington D.C., it’s time the government gives up their “emergency powers” and returns them to where they belong: the people.
**_[SUPPORT THE USA FREEDOM CONVOY](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zeeb66goeas7ekkbr0b81317qcjjn6oajjanfg38_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cjge1ob2c9h2bs "SUPPORT THE USA FREEDOM CONVOY")_**
**Free people don’t have to protest for Freedom.**

If we don’t act now, **_we’ll see the exact same authoritarian takeover our brothers and sisters in Canada are experiencing right here in the USA..._** and half of the country will go along with it because they are afraid of having their bank accounts frozen, human rights suspended, or worse.

Right now, thanks to the overwhelming support from patriots across the country, our convoy is growing larger and larger everyday with Truckers from Fresno, to Bismark, to Cleveland, to Baton Rouge signing up to join.

But, the cost of this convoy grows with every Trucker who signs on, and that’s why we’re reaching out today to ask you to sponsor a Trucker in what could be the largest peaceful protest in history.
**_[$15 = 10 Miles](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7vodqeiu7at71q2f0ug4715q9ede6mt540ujqb0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cjge1ob2c9h2bs "$15 = 10 Miles")_**
**_[$30 = 20 Miles](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zs9hlsefd4ud1hi1745t9hqf160j50vs59e44p18_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cjge1ob2c9h2bs "$30 = 20 Miles")_**
**_[$75 = 50 Miles](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2ci5p2n2sob9bfo4o4g1mbbel23fh8e7tp28jl0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cjge1ob2c9h2bs "$75 = 50 Miles")_**
**_[$150 = 100 Miles](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcl8bb9fjikggm7betscf4gg0bfknm947o94udrg_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cjge1ob2c9h2bs "$150 = 100 Miles")_**
**_[$375 = 250 Miles](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrm5mfsg2ecuju2qtmharl99bh022k0tklr0c0e0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cjge1ob2c9h2bs "$375 = 250 Miles")_**
**_[$750 = 500 Miles](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmnmfvls2h5ksaihp5rsmkufpbanneqg9pu0ck2g_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cjge1ob2c9h2bs "$750 = 500 Miles")_**
**_[$1,500 = 1,000 Miles](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpuste0auasgecf2erihj722v7u371k27c8kc8o8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cjge1ob2c9h2bs "$1,500 = 1,000 Miles")_**
**_[$5,000 = FULL TRIP](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1hpimvrtf1rs2qlfcf5evj3a9rskv22is1ijh68_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cjge1ob2c9h2bs "$5,000 = FULL TRIP")_**
The Freedom Convoy must be the movement heard around the world, and we’re asking for your most generous gift to make that a reality.

**[Can you cover the cost of fuel for 50 miles for one of our Freedom Truckers?](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8mbl2fnl2c91thgsuhpbub00jm7ope5ss908t6g_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cjge1ob2c9h2bs "Can you cover the cost of fuel for 50 miles for one of our Freedom Truckers?")**

The time is now to take patriotic, beautiful, peaceful action, or we may never regain the freedoms we once had. **_We’re not in the business of telling our children and their children what it was like when America was free,[but we can’t do it alone.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zl2s4o1qgiiq8nntglo7kjphaki52qeoehud2fg0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cjge1ob2c9h2bs "but we can’t do it alone.")_**

**_[Help fuel our convoy as we take direct action to regain our freedoms and ensure we never lose our liberty again.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsm1joeskpf1719io5jjggg6ujio4t57u9rfj64o_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cjge1ob2c9h2bs "Help fuel our convoy as we take direct action to regain our freedoms and ensure we never lose our liberty again.")_**

Honk Honk,

American Truckers Freedom Fund

---
Paid for by Great American Patriot Project

---

---

clean_body: | | | I need to ask for a favor, Peter. From day one of this campaign, we’ve put our positive vision for working families first. But every day my opponent is blanketing the airwaves with negative ads using right-wing talking points. That’s why I need your help. In these last two days before Election Day, we want to share our latest ad featuring AOC far and wide. = = = Peter, my team tells me that this race could come down to a single point or two. If we hit 50% on Election Day, we can avoid a runoff and focus on beating our Republican opponent in November. Every single vote counts. Our team is working hard knocking doors and making phone calls to Get Out The Vote. But to reach every voter, we need to keep our latest ad featuring AOC up as long as possible. = Let’s go win this race, -Greg | | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Greg Casar for Congress Greg Casar for Congress P.O. name: Clay Aiken
subject: Rep. Torres
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Clay Aiken for North Carolina
body:
Just want to make sure you saw this note from Representative Ritchie Torres...
I am so inspired by the many LGBT leaders across the country who have stepped up to make history of their own... and I am so grateful for the support of Representative Ritchie Torres and Equality PAC as we head into making history for North Carolina and the South.
Our end of month deadline is coming up and it would mean the world to me if you could lend a hand by giving to our supply funds. Join Ritchie Torres in supporting the our campaign by giving at the link below:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ca_eomsupplies?refcode=02272022_EOMFR_3&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ca_eomsupplies?refcode=02272022_EOMFR_3&amount=25]
-Clay
--------forwarded message------
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/94965/images/Clay%20Logo%20Light.png]
Hi there, I’m Representative Ritchie Torres of New York’s District 15 and I know a little something about firsts.
When I was elected to the New York City Council in 2013, I was the first openly gay elected official from the Bronx in the history of our government. When I was sworn in last month, I became the first openly gay Afro Latino to be elected to the United States Congress.
As one of the nine co-chairs of Equality PAC, it is my honor to support LGBTQ+ candidates across the country achieving their own set of firsts. When Clay Aiken is elected to represent North Carolina, he will make history as the first openly gay member of congress representing the South.
In the queer community we often talk about how representation without protection is dangerous. But Clay doesn’t just provide representation for LGBTQ+ folks across the South, he’s got plans to fight for equality as well. Standing up for what is right might not always be safe, but it may make others safer. I applaud Clay’s bravery and courage.
Clay’s End of Month Budget Deadline is Monday, and I’d like to ask you to contribute to his supplies fund. Join me in supporting Clay Aiken for North Carolina by giving below: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ca_eomsupplies?refcode=02272022_EOMFR_3&amount=25]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ca_eomsupplies?refcode=02272022_EOMFR_3&amount=25]
I’m ready for Clay to make history, are you?
Congressman Ritchie Torres
Clay is running for Congress in the North Carolina. He was born, raised, and is currently raising his son in the Triangle. He's running to use his voice to speak up and stop the loudest voices on the far ends of the political spectrum from sucking up all the oxygen in our political discourse.
Donate now to join the chorus and help send Clay to Congress. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ca_email?refcode=footer&amount=25]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ca_email?refcode=footer&amount=25]
Paid for by Clay Aiken for North Carolina
Clay Aiken for North Carolina
PO Box 13274
Durham, NC 27709
United States
If you’d like to unsubscribe, we hate to see you go, but click here to unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/9cfc1bd9-8496-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a/0133ecf4-0298-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDk2NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTMzZWNmNC0wMjk4LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mrei_Xa6STDnjAeU3ujsb7p8dI2LHNvYDtodTf614ew=&id=112382424 .

name: Supreme Court Alert
subject: re: The Voting Rights Act!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | |
---
**URGENT via The Rachel Maddow Show: “Conservative justices rescue Alabama’s racially discriminatory map”**
[](https://go.dscc.org/go/3673?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220227-SupremeCourtAlert-ALVotingRights-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220227-SupremeCourtAlert-ALVotingRights-Pros-sl1&akid=3113%2E9716520%2EMZXZBA)
**[If you stand with the Obamas and agree that we need to PROTECT voting rights across the country, sign our petition now>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/3673?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220227-SupremeCourtAlert-ALVotingRights-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220227-SupremeCourtAlert-ALVotingRights-Pros-sl1&akid=3113%2E9716520%2EMZXZBA)**

| | [Add My Name](https://go.dscc.org/go/3673?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220227-SupremeCourtAlert-ALVotingRights-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220227-SupremeCourtAlert-ALVotingRights-Pros-sl1&akid=3113%2E9716520%2EMZXZBA)
---

Team -- The Supreme Court just cleared the way for an obvious violation of the Voting Rights Act to move forward in Alabama.

A lower court _already_ ruled that Alabama’s new electoral maps discriminate against Black voters -- but now five of the Court's right-wing justices have stepped in to BLOCK that ruling!

We can’t stand by silently while the Supreme Court inches closer to COMPLETELY rolling back the Voting Rights Act -- **so we've launched a MASSIVE petition to stand with the Obamas and show that this grassroots team will defend voting rights with everything we've got.**
**[We need 100,000 more signatures by midnight, but we’re still MISSING your name! clean_body: | | | URGENT via The Rachel Maddow Show: “Conservative justices rescue Alabama’s racially discriminatory map” | | Team -- The Supreme Court just cleared the way for an obvious violation of the Voting Rights Act to move forward in Alabama. We can’t stand by silently while the Supreme Court inches closer to COMPLETELY rolling back the Voting Rights Act -- so we've launched a MASSIVE petition to stand with the Obamas and show that this grassroots team will defend voting rights with everything we've got. | Thank you, Team DSCC If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! name: Mia for SC
subject: Did you see Mia on Good Morning America?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mia for South Carolina
body:
Learn more about Mia’s historic campaign for governor: | | | **Team: Did you see Mia this morning on Good Morning America?** She spoke about her historic campaign for governor as part of GMA’s Black History Month series — if elected, she’ll become the first ever Black woman elected as governor in the entire nation. That’s a responsibility Mia cherishes, but she’s not just running for Governor to make history — **she’s running to make a difference.** And she needs your support now more than ever before. Mia gives Democrats our best opportunity to defeat Henry McMaster. With over a decade of experience taking on tough fights in the South Carolina General Assembly, no one in this race is more qualified than her to stand up to McMaster and his good ol’ boys to shake up the status quo. But fundraising hasn’t come easy for this campaign — _not when people have a predetermined notion of what their governor should look like..._ **The truth is, as a 7th generation South Carolinian born and raised in the communities she’s fighting for, Mia is the candidate we can trust to build a future we can ALL believe in.** **[All she needs now is you, friend. Make a donation today to help Mia make a difference — and history — as our next governor.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xOVKxhIUbYt3VKvuRN9Ed6pJAb5hrkufJ9bVGTSyzWW16Vsp2X7syoIlvbYzp76xTVetHOhhiFX29svVixXk0ovLXVAc2ucbB8DTGamNN1NCZ7DM5UToo06GYxnmCn_8QEl38DaXhhxN2Ygh1gU2My_c7DK_hJhcrrUInN072NYUtuycyiWJhdn_wix5cCqzMmnUjfosV-XyoBfzHhAUAq34-XjBifo0TgAbAXPUeuaX6K4oBBYtmZgWPdukdp1cf25SKHhm8Jl_IQMP49d87enxwZOg9t9ZaPhmDUyM0PSE9MpzjNhCiOe_fCp_UjrtkSi3rmTN8oA0fFQe3NWpHowl5L_4PKhD1rWnWZd8HL-O7vWfDMa_wuTZibT09bqPmjYHZ6FshkpyXAqTjOtTweIg_4fmcMLz_dlcLYrbjREQ/3jx/OHyVAjKDT_yfsy9h3R1O2Q/h0/hoIJhHhfinmqYrcbtgTr9v_OFabDQe8QSD5NdVxS_A8)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [donate: $10](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xOVKxhIUbYt3VKvuRN9Ed6pJAb5hrkufJ9bVGTSyzWW16Vsp2X7syoIlvbYzp76xTVetHOhhiFX29svVixXk0orbP5-BQn5TohK7LMIVaVzBtmjhTy-aaMAlA4LGuDUMw_X-5tKWIVLYwwlpVSjK0KR2RnrQF6ha4N1A2_A5SVifSnSc3GtbOy7g-InvcJ3MVN5WsiLYIN3Wp0p1TH2uXk0qwOb2O0iJI4eitz3dh-8ph_L_wVTWep7Q5K5scyQzrkLTZCNaqdvGuPoUIKNF9ClUeO6oFwWI5pF2DjlKeL_amslnlUUCN607orSG2lDzDyLjRZCIYMd3t0YpODSTAs__a35CyPYb1XEdP9o7NloasLEcJbeYK-M-zVlMFwdookPR8Hmu9E20AkwjttIaEuEjLvf-4DR3eiq7nng-R8ne5CMWjZmpE6vILqSS5DTbY/3jx/OHyVAjKDT_yfsy9h3R1O2Q/h1/Knn-IPKEhR8USfZxP0BrUxp-9vvmW7nD6Vix_RvnhSo)

clean_body: Learn more about Mia’s historic campaign for governor: | | | Team: Did you see Mia this morning on Good Morning America? She spoke about her historic campaign for governor as part of GMA’s Black History Month series — if elected, she’ll become the first ever Black woman elected as governor in the entire nation. That’s a responsibility Mia cherishes, but she’s not just running for Governor to make history — she’s running to make a difference. And she needs your support now more than ever before. Mia gives Democrats our best opportunity to defeat Henry McMaster. With over a decade of experience taking on tough fights in the South Carolina General Assembly, no one in this race is more qualified than her to stand up to McMaster and his good ol’ boys to shake up the status quo. But fundraising hasn’t come easy for this campaign — not when people have a predetermined notion of what their governor should look like... The truth is, as a 7th generation South Carolinian born and raised in the communities she’s fighting for, Mia is the candidate we can trust to build a future we can ALL believe in. subject: I'm Emily, looking forward to seeing you soon
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kara Hahn for Congress Kara Hahn for Congress
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42299938/332451554/922507959?refcode=em21_emailheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NmQxNDhjMC1kOTk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oqcPAteCZxDBaDSjAfj6GVqYw3CL3QFxYgHyLFP-6Qc=)

Hi team, I'm Emily – and I just started as Kara's new Field Director.

As a longtime Long Islander, I've watched Kara fighting on behalf of our communities for years. From passing legislation in the Suffolk County Legislature to protect our coastlines to coming up with solutions to address the opioid overdose epidemic, Kara's commitment has never wavered.

That's why I'm so excited to be a part of this team, and to help introduce the Kara I know to New York's 1st district.

But here's the thing. Tomorrow's end-of-month fundraising deadline comes just before petitioning to get Kara on the ballot officially begins on Tuesday, March 1. I've got a plan in place to hit the ground running in order to connect with our neighbors, but that all hinges on hitting this month's goal.

**[That’s why I’m asking: Can you chip in $5 or anything you can to help us hit our February fundraising goal? There’s no doubt about it: this district is special. As one of just nine congressional districts in the country that voted for President Biden in 2020 but also sent a Republican to the House of Representatives, we are in a unique position. This seat is flippable — and I am the candidate who will flip it. Here’s why:

**Only one candidate in this race was raised in Omaha and grew up reliant on social programs in the district.** I lived in subsidized housing and participated in youth programs for those below the poverty level. I graduated from Burke High School in 1999, and after becoming a mental health therapist, I had the opportunity to serve folks in that same community and youth program.

**Only one candidate in this race is a trained mental health therapist.** As a therapist, I bring an open mind, practical solutions, and passionate advocacy to all sessions. I’m ready to carry this same approach to Nebraska’s Second Congressional District.

**Only one candidate in this race rejected dark money.** I refuse to accept one penny of corporate PAC money. It hurts everyday people and contributes to corruption. I intend to actively listen to all constituents and put myself in their shoes.

**Only one candidate would be the second woman and first Black woman to ever represent Nebraska in Congress.** Nebraska has diverse leadership in local and state offices. I am ready to make history and give back to the district that has been my home with federal leadership that reflects who we are.

[_**If I sound like a candidate you’d like to see in office, please chip in $5, $15, or whatever you can spare to my campaign right away.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42320196/332515359/-1590707639?refcode=BLU-ASC-20220227-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTVjMjUwZi0wNTk4LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dHfQvdHD4fiXuZ-zNho_dqJvxbEZqY-B1JXxac8rEeg=)

clean_body: This seat is flippable — and I am the candidate who will flip it. | = | Peter, I’ll explain why in a moment, but first, = | = There’s no doubt about it: this district is special. As one of just nine congressional districts in the country that voted for President Biden in 2020 but also sent a Republican to the House of Representatives, we are in a unique position. This seat is flippable — and I am the candidate who will flip it. Here’s why: Only one candidate in this race was raised in Omaha and grew up reliant on social programs in the district. I lived in subsidized housing and participated in youth programs for those below the poverty level. I graduated from Burke High School in 1999, and after becoming a mental health therapist, I had the opportunity to serve folks in that same community and youth program. Only one candidate in this race is a trained mental health therapist. As a therapist, I bring an open mind, practical solutions, and passionate advocacy to all sessions. I’m ready to carry this same approach to Nebraska’s Second Congressional District. Only one candidate in this race rejected dark money. I refuse to accept one penny of corporate PAC money. It hurts everyday people and contributes to corruption. I intend to actively listen to all constituents and put myself in their shoes. Only one candidate would be the second woman and first Black woman to ever represent Nebraska in Congress. Nebraska has diverse leadership in local and state offices. I am ready to make history and give back to the district that has been my home with federal leadership that reflects who we are. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for your support, = * | | = PAID FOR BY SHELTON FOR CONGRESS Alisha Shelton for Congress PO Box 641026 Omaha, NE 68164 United States | | | ---|---|--- = = If you'd like to stop receiving these emails, please

On Thursday, March 10th, I will be having a reception in Lockport to kick off my campaign for re-election.

Best, Rob

body:
Saying No to Rupert Murdoch and Fox News should be a no-brainer. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ylv71NjtRp9uAvapwZeG5Fwod7vf2Q19deFkSzINQB7pYO7Ed0TOwyvjuedJ39zpEnMq3REs_6qpHFEbObeQSefEuosMlyzL6pkt-qavlTwOzBtjMoDOq3tegiWF_OWZe6A96DTXPIs5Ric-6-A2vwkD3M1YkWyl3S8Df8I_1xcIZK2bHQJj91O02AmqKgPVYb_GTjr3GaD5BIZ-tW-Rc-iopVjIBsrUVQFtE3KTFDu4IK_qnN31svYw2vHmG3vUvI9TOPfphGPBZ0KhSgZ09DT66eE5LliIsX5klSYikdEcEMqmzB8iLS5Yed33RkfUR9qPlFdOnnUn4-3YxR836Y3-4jsyCgg141FZZhSFQ5KRfh-OcZnLGRrSVlp0zUyoB4wbHtx3G7PcZxGC0K758n/3jx/XpKZXrB0QWqLakb2sZPAnQ/h0/nBw3NRoVX2DSjLY3WdzQo7dq8zcOhD__Gn-hLxh9Kmk)
Peter, A bunch of Democrats' congressional committees just rejected contributions from Fox News' parent company PAC. (Reminder: the leading donor to this PAC is Fox Corporation Chairman Rupert Murdoch himself.) Seems like a no-brainer for Dems to say no to Rupert Murdoch and Fox News, right? **Not for Kyrsten Sinema.** One of the big checks listed on her last FEC report was from the Fox Corp PAC — along with donations from _multiple_ Republican billionaires. **[It's time to replace Sinema with a real Democrat, but that means we need to pick up the pace on our grassroots fundraising. Will you help us match the $5,000 Sinema got from Fox News’ parent company's PAC by donating $5?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSge2THpCeDI0o1qnq5mnajEvwsmz34cPWHT2S3Vsu7qAgI8cFVNr5Urbs2WntA4SV94x_TzxkxGcvCM0R6iNgzB6fpNrbuWgREqAAPXeOD9OkpnJCn2v8zpjMPSc0PL9N3xVQCSMAdBXiR0x0aTDGFxeyq8RrKeQsmIqRRCmLjBERmF5qI6B99_ZSqJBjSseBEjchpy8VUXjKi61HJtpI5kW-TUg-kgGAF7CY4qVb6rgVA9dSzlWd6n1yaw-Xq_Jh9ohFkrXx6VhGI5cu95PyTNs0mHjeIm4c0KSEh2ZtMCAp4G0zQ3K643jfjhSUoTV1QDWgNGPYBh7eIxM15TcXzXPABveyAtFLePjqvsM03KCZ7TLyVKbsEuQOicby0c3B/3jx/XpKZXrB0QWqLakb2sZPAnQ/h1/LfLvXnTgZt8lL-4SSc5GAXuxDjjNwJVHfiLf7RoMeeQ)** **[Contribute $5](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSge2THpCeDI0o1qnq5mnajEvwsmz34cPWHT2S3Vsu7qBXpFl2dZQImTis7qYgxcL4gUSv9u1LhcmeOWecv8Fl8lhTn47CSY85mRM2Xs7thqBgsVF0ZIfcRRQpMgnVXym760VlY10Hd2mFEm0NtCHIDXBT4-q63BHK37_PdtLtkUvrpwaqAQp7UCmJ0TQkFiZF4U3_Mc8ySjOoBXbzbohbIiD6cvBujg86B0Kvv8pPWayQfNyZLDdsngTwGLC9KFBPNZEIz55TDn11OhoF28UOFwzoYEF4HoVuIbn1RBixWFOVJ6Hiw2fswbi1GhybbMCLHcn9W_wrJ0h8diKbwysbR6x6PkmV-UwjeGSGWQBWjLsOb6C5OY4px675au7Vg8DY/3jx/XpKZXrB0QWqLakb2sZPAnQ/h2/Q4tAXEsi6h-97D80KpzKZW6E8OXKnwgCSZzpp4DG7aQ)** Reminder: Sinema raised nearly $1.6 million in just three months — from GOP donors, corporations, and hardly any donations under $200. If you want to know who Kyrsten Sinema is listening to, all you have to do is follow the money. **If we're going to oust Sinema and compete with her GOP mega-donors, we need to keep growing our grassroots power.** She may have over $5 million on hand, but we've got the momentum: thousands of small-dollar donors are dedicated to electing a real Democrat in Sinema's place. **[Please, Peter, chip in $5 or anything you can right now to help match Sinema's $5,000 from Murdoch and Fox News. clean_body: Saying No to Rupert Murdoch and Fox News should be a no-brainer. | | | Peter, A bunch of Democrats' congressional committees just rejected contributions from Fox News' parent company PAC. (Reminder: the leading donor to this PAC is Fox Corporation Chairman Rupert Murdoch himself.) Seems like a no-brainer for Dems to say no to Rupert Murdoch and Fox News, right? Not for Kyrsten Sinema. One of the big checks listed on her last FEC report was from the Fox Corp PAC — along with donations from multiple Republican billionaires. Reminder: Sinema raised nearly $1.6 million in just three months — from GOP donors, corporations, and hardly any donations under $200. If you want to know who Kyrsten Sinema is listening to, all you have to do is follow the money. If we're going to oust Sinema and compete with her GOP mega-donors, we need to keep growing our grassroots power. She may have over $5 million on hand, but we've got the momentum: thousands of small-dollar donors are dedicated to electing a real Democrat in Sinema's place. Let's do this, Primary Sinema | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. name: American Trucker Freedom Fund
subject: A political earthquake is coming
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Great American Patriot Project
body:
This is a movement to take our country back
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkflolah8q279s21kglbn8fgjd1cc3iognk4dvt0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2u8pb6s5j6iq74odiehpb4ddm69q7fd32msrj2pbjeph3bd1hclpmfdtjmiqb9dpnq9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhmfchlcopb9d9hcur62phks2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8gq48bi4bh28or1clie9oj0chh649fg)
---
| | | | | | |
| | | | | | |
| | | | | | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1toda8e65lkpvptm7rsrbo6ci0g4ljejtdiotmg_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cjie4o34c9h2bs)
---
| | |
Fellow Patriot,

Tyranny has been creeping across our country for decades, but **_for the past two years it’s been sweeping_** ; lockdowns, forced masking, vaccine mandates, and many other restrictions.

**The same thing happened in Canada where our brave brothers and sisters _lit a spark that’s going to light a fire of freedom_ _in the hearts of every liberty loving man, woman, and child on earth._**

We intend to carry that torch from across the country to Washington, D.C.
**_[SUPPORT THE USA FREEDOM CONVOY](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za448mjuglkaj1li300bj8joi576a36bikknum60_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cjie4o34c9h2bs "SUPPORT THE USA FREEDOM CONVOY")_**
Since the lockdown politicians insisted we give up our liberties in exchange for safety, and one thing has become absolutely clear: **_no politician or government action can slow the spread of COVID-19, they can only accelerate the spread of authoritarianism_**.

That’s why we’re trucking across the country to Washington D.C., it’s time the government gives up their “emergency powers” and returns them to where they belong: the people.
**_[SUPPORT THE USA FREEDOM CONVOY](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za55d7okt401ssj98qsmdup7f0nep3mq37981hq8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cjie4o34c9h2bs "SUPPORT THE USA FREEDOM CONVOY")_**
**Free people don’t have to protest for Freedom.**

If we don’t act now, **_we’ll see the exact same authoritarian takeover our brothers and sisters in Canada are experiencing right here in the USA..._** and half of the country will go along with it because they are afraid of having their bank accounts frozen, human rights suspended, or worse.

Right now, thanks to the overwhelming support from patriots across the country, our convoy is growing larger and larger everyday with Truckers from Fresno, to Bismark, to Cleveland, to Baton Rouge signing up to join.

But, the cost of this convoy grows with every Trucker who signs on, and that’s why we’re reaching out today to ask you to sponsor a Trucker in what could be the largest peaceful protest in history.
**_[$15 = 10 Miles](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqposjgsekj81fdsapa3rrdh4cnfrhsj3983odt8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cjie4o34c9h2bs "$15 = 10 Miles")_**
**_[$30 = 20 Miles](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo0tk3sk4hec4ae6dgs8jv18r9no185bsrs4njqo_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cjie4o34c9h2bs "$30 = 20 Miles")_**
**_[$75 = 50 Miles](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zii6ddij1un1htdhn9brabceijsdsas7klrb7t2o_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cjie4o34c9h2bs "$75 = 50 Miles")_**
**_[$150 = 100 Miles](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvapjncutq8s9ccqqqc9q572ratj2v8crnpcte2o_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cjie4o34c9h2bs "$150 = 100 Miles")_**
**_[$375 = 250 Miles](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo75p6pqb7bvu8gobq1641vtn0j1tm2gel2hm4mg_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cjie4o34c9h2bs "$375 = 250 Miles")_**
**_[$750 = 500 Miles](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjtkg86ekup2f445e5cm3lbqhaplkkl64h3iuuu0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cjie4o34c9h2bs "$750 = 500 Miles")_**
**_[$1,500 = 1,000 Miles](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zoqnli3ggl5c46kosve20e16e5477bi07rcviuh8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cjie4o34c9h2bs "$1,500 = 1,000 Miles")_**
**_[$5,000 = FULL TRIP](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z47n1gsgrld9kr9jjs1i9fusmfbbseu0jsmm0t1o_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cjie4o34c9h2bs "$5,000 = FULL TRIP")_**
The Freedom Convoy must be the movement heard around the world, and we’re asking for your most generous gift to make that a reality.

**[Can you cover the cost of fuel for 50 miles for one of our Freedom Truckers?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z26n2tb1tbfgjq5ncigt3qvru2ntjai66tdr7778_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cjie4o34c9h2bs "Can you cover the cost of fuel for 50 miles for one of our Freedom Truckers?")**

The time is now to take patriotic, beautiful, peaceful action, or we may never regain the freedoms we once had. **_We’re not in the business of telling our children and their children what it was like when America was free,[but we can’t do it alone.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9ukjad4bka6lfmgvh9lb86adqg68sekk4sdav18_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cjie4o34c9h2bs "but we can’t do it alone.")_**

**_[Help fuel our convoy as we take direct action to regain our freedoms and ensure we never lose our liberty again.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsu80lsdsll00mtlobl0ghnu6i8e9km2f0qnftv0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cjie4o34c9h2bs "Help fuel our convoy as we take direct action to regain our freedoms and ensure we never lose our liberty again.")_**

Honk Honk,

American Truckers Freedom Fund

---
Paid for by Great American Patriot Project

---

clean_body: Peter, Karl Rove emailed you. My wife Ky emailed you. Now, I’m reaching out to you about our fight to take back the House with a next generation conservative majority. I’ve been humbled by the support I’ve had from my family and great friends like Karl Rove. But if we’re going to finish this fight and DEFEAT the Democrat machine in my district, I need you on my team too. I’m a top target for the Left, Peter. From my West Point degree to the blessings of my family, I’m living proof that the American dream is still alive -and Democrats hate that. My opponent has nearly endless resources from the Left in his war chest, and we’re going to have to act fast if we’re going to catch up. This race WILL decide control of the House. We cannot afford to miss a single beat. Thank you, Jeremy Hunt Paid for by Jeremy for Georgia Contributions to this committee are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Team, the USPS is one of America’s most vital and treasured institutions.

Americans across the country depend on the USPS for life-saving medications, documents, COVID tests, voting by mail, and more. We **_REFUSE_** to sit back and allow DeJoy to cut off this crucial lifeline for countless Americans!

But if President Biden doesn’t act soon, the consequences will be **disastrous.**

We need 35,000 Democrats to sign on and tell President Biden to fire Louis DeJoy immediately. [SIGN NOW TO SAVE THE USPS »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Oust-DeJoy/?source=VPP_20220227_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=1349%2E878179%2EmC4Rxi)

name: Team Kilmer
subject: Midterms are less than nine months away
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

Election Day is less than nine months away, and keeping our House majority has never been more important.

All of the progress Derek and his colleagues have been working to make on voting rights, democracy reform, COVID-19 relief, infrastructure, and more will be at stake if we lose this November. Derek is doing everything he can to ensure we can defend our House majority, help President Biden Build Back Better, and strengthen our democracy -- but he needs your help.

**[We're facing our end-of-month fundraising deadline tomorrow, and we've set a goal to raise $15,000 to help us stay on track. Will you chip in $10 or more to help Derek defend our House majority and keep fighting for us in Congress?](https://act.myngp.com/el/N0qND2pkmVtoZ-BW-SBfFMrGWmTOc-Z7JM239MZn2HM=/kKbRYZk8MG5LFCJUCENmJGsWXATxg2ldeElHAdx3hiM=?refcode=em22_220227_eom1_fndd_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220227_eom1_fndd_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email)**

Thank you,

Team Kilmer

**Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.**

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/N0qND2pkmVtoZ-BW-SBfFMrGWmTOc-Z7JM239MZn2HM=/kKbRYZk8MG5LFCJUCENmJGsWXATxg2ldeElHAdx3hiM=?refcode=em22_220227_eom1_fndd_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220227_eom1_fndd_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email)

name: Andrew, Ashley, and Taylor
subject: Expanding the team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
Our team is growing thanks to you!
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220227-722-footer-ak&t=2&akid=722%2E90090%2E2sSWb0)
Hey, it’s the newest members of Team Morganize: Andrew, Ashley, and Taylor. 👋
We’re going to introduce ourselves, but first we wanted to ask you a quick favor: [**_Can you make a contribution to Morgan’s campaign right now so we can meet our $11,211 end-of-month goal and continue expanding our team? We are so excited to be on the team so our organizing operation can grow even more, but we need the resources to do it._**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/27823?t=3&akid=722%2E90090%2E2sSWb0)
We have a lot of work to do with less than 70 days to the primary and we’re all so excited to work with Morgan as organizers to fight to elect the first Black woman from Ohio to the Senate. We’re passionate about grassroots progressive politics and we’re so excited to dive in.
**Here’s a little more about us:**
* * *
**_Andrew_**
* I’m from Denver, Colorado! 🏔
* I previously did a term of service in Americorps and in social services with formerly unhoused persons.
* I have lived in Columbus for the past two years. Loving the state of Ohio and this town! ❤️

**_Ashley_**
* I’m a California native who was raised in Pickerington. 🌅
* I’m passionate about the outdoors and love hiking and fishing. 🎣
* I’m moving out of restaurant management to be a part of my first campaign with Morgan. 🍲

**_Taylor_**
* I’m an Ohioan with a background in art therapy and counseling. 🎨
* In 2020, I decided to switch gears and jumped into the campaign world. I’ve been working on voter education and outreach projects ever since. 🗳
* I’m thrilled to be part of Morgan’s team with a truly progressive platform and fighting to make change in Ohio and beyond. 💌

* * *
But we’ll be honest with you. It’s expensive to be able to afford to expand our team AND keep pace with our corporate-backed opponents.
We have more statewide tours planned, more debates 👀, meet and greets, phone banking, digital ads, **and more — but we need your help to ensure we can pull this off.**
To be honest, the more we can raise online, the more time Morgan can spend with us talking to voters and knocking doors. Right now we’re still $11,211 behind our end-of-month goal. [**_Can you chip in anything you can so our team can afford more passionate organizers like us, who can help reach voters across the state?_**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/27823?t=4&akid=722%2E90090%2E2sSWb0)**
**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/27829?refcode=em20220227-722&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=722%2E90090%2E2sSWb0)**
Thank you for everything you do,
Andrew, Ashley, and Taylor ❤️
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20220227-722-footer&t=24&refcode2=722_90090_2sSWb0&akid=722%2E90090%2E2sSWb0)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/mh4oh/) | [](https://twitter.com/mh4oh) | [](https://www.instagram.com/mh4oh)
Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.morganharper.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.morganharper.org/sign/personal_info/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.morganharper.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=722%2E90090%2E2sSWb0)

Here’s a little more about us: Andrew I’m from Denver, Colorado! 🏔 I previously did a term of service in Americorps and in social services with formerly unhoused persons. I have lived in Columbus for the past two years. Loving the state of Ohio and this town! ❤️ Ashley I’m a California native who was raised in Pickerington. 🌅 I’m passionate about the outdoors and love hiking and fishing. 🎣 I’m moving out of restaurant management to be a part of my first campaign with Morgan. 🍲 Taylor I’m an Ohioan with a background in art therapy and counseling. 🎨 In 2020, I decided to switch gears and jumped into the campaign world. I’ve been working on voter education and outreach projects ever since. 🗳 I’m thrilled to be part of Morgan’s team with a truly progressive platform and fighting to make change in Ohio and beyond. 💌 But we’ll be honest with you. It’s expensive to be able to afford to expand our team AND keep pace with our corporate-backed opponents. We have more statewide tours planned, more debates 👀, meet and greets, phone banking, digital ads, and more — but we need your help to ensure we can pull this off. To be honest, the more we can raise online, the more time Morgan can spend with us talking to voters and knocking doors. Right now we’re still $11,211 behind our end-of-month goal. Thank you for everything you do, Andrew, Ashley, and Taylor ❤️ | | Email us: contact@morganharper.org

Last week, the head of the Senate GOP campaign committee finally rolled out their big policy agenda for the 2022 midterm elections — and it’s a doozy. Republicans want to raise taxes on half the country — working-class and middle-class families, along with seniors on Social Security. While there’s still a global pandemic going on, and working people are struggling to make ends meet. That's just the tip of the iceberg. The eleven-point plan also calls to eliminate the Department of Education, threaten voting rights, and cut the IRS budget in half — setting our country back decades and making it easier for wealthy tax cheats to get away with paying less than their fair share. So if Republicans win back the Senate in November, they’d rig the rules even further in favor of the wealthy and well-connected. We cannot let that happen. _**[Can you pitch in $3 today ahead of tomorrow’s grassroots fundraising deadline to support our progressive movement and help elect Warren Democrats up and down the ballot?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42322047/332525332/1367347608?refcode=EMZ3P_EOM_W_20220227_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2IzNGRiOC0wZTk4LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Em0Efa5BTq55-0g07s38IjcHAEy_znIcUkOs7cSdXBc=&emci=53b34db8-0e98-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=57b34db8-0e98-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=9027908)**_ | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

With 30 years of rampant corruption in the Ohio Statehouse, it’s time for a change. We’re building a grassroots movement to make it happen, and I want you on the team.

I’ll be honest with you team -- no one likes asking for money.
I prefer talking to people like you across Ohio, getting ideas about how we can build a better state and stop corruption. But I can’t do that if we don’t meet our goals.
I reached out about our fundraising targets already, but I’m asking you again because I know I can count on you.
**[If we come up short, we won’t have the resources to build a winning campaign against Mike DeWine. Can you pitch in $20 right now toward my $18,764 fundraising goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42322115/332525850/-528457057?refcode=nw_em_220227_1_t2_c&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTUwN2EwMi0xMDk4LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SyBjVzdrS4ps3zm6H5_6bfcYFjhqqfbXGfH_94L1Pao=)**

clean_body: With 30 years of rampant corruption in the Ohio Statehouse, it’s time for a change. We’re building a grassroots movement to make it happen, and I want you on the team. I’ll be honest with you team -- no one likes asking for money. I prefer talking to people like you across Ohio, getting ideas about how we can build a better state and stop corruption. But I can’t do that if we don’t meet our goals. I reached out about our fundraising targets already, but I’m asking you again because I know I can count on you. = Ohio deserves better than the same corruption and criminality that have plagued our state government for decades. And we’re not the only ones who think that way. More than 135 Ohio elected officials, 314 Action, EMILY’s List, and multiple local labor unions declared their support. = With 30 years of rampant corruption in the Ohio Statehouse, it’s time for a change. clean_body: | = | | National Republicans just released their fundraising numbers. Last year, the National Republican Congressional Committee raised nearly $140 million. They’re ready to flood districts across the country with millions of dollars in attack ads. Republicans only need to flip five seats to take control of the House and stop our movement in its tracks.= | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = These numbers reveal that national Republicans have been doubling down on Trump's Big Lie and successfully fundraising – everything indicates they’re going to come out in full force. Our FEC public reporting deadline next month is our chance to hold them off. Republicans will be analyzing Democrats’ fundraising numbers to see if they can overwhelm us with their dark money. It’s up to us to prove that we’re united and prepared to keep the House blue. Holding the House means holding MI-11. But before March roars, we need to make sure we are able to **match its might.** We need to hit our February fundraising goal, and we only have one day left.

name: Demings, Val
subject: This is urgent, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
Every voter I fail to reach could cost me this election
| | |
---
**This is urgent, friend: ****I'm just 2 points behind Marco Rubio in a race that experts are saying will decide Senate control**** – but I'm falling short of my End of Month fundraising goal at the worst possible moment: **
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42322674/332528449/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2513-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTliYmNlZS0xMDk4LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GlTbJy9uFad3VfZBv21ikDdvCT9lp01-jkz58GwpaIw=)
With your help, this team is closing the polling gap with Rubio – but unfortunately we still don't have enough to compete with the GOP's deep pockets. **I know our grassroots movement has what it takes to pull ahead and flip Florida blue, but I need to meet tonight's fundraising goal to have a shot.**
Florida's last Senate election was decided by just 0.12 points – only 10,033 votes – and this race is bound to be just as close. _Do you know what that means, friend?_ **Every single dollar is going to make a huge impact on our efforts to win in Florida. ****I can't afford to cut a single hour of canvassing or phone banking, because every voter I fail to reach could cost me this election. **
It's urgent, friend: Marco Rubio is breaking fundraising records – and national Republicans have already poured $10 million into this race to keep Democrats like me from winning in Florida again.
**This is a make-or-break moment for my campaign, so I'm counting on grassroots supporters like you to help me close this fundraising gap, pull ahead in the polls and defeat Marco Rubio. It's the only way to defend the Senate majority and defend our democracy from the GOP. **
**[Please, friend, rush $5 right now to help me close this critical fundraising gap. In a race this close, every dollar counts, so I need you to contribute whatever you can to help me defeat Rubio.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42322675/332528450/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2513-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTliYmNlZS0xMDk4LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GlTbJy9uFad3VfZBv21ikDdvCT9lp01-jkz58GwpaIw=)**
