clean_body: Every voter I fail to reach could cost me this election | | | This is urgent, friend: I'm just 2 points behind Marco Rubio in a race that experts are saying will decide Senate control – but I'm falling short of my End of Month fundraising goal at the worst possible moment: = With your help, this team is closing the polling gap with Rubio – but unfortunately we still don't have enough to compete with the GOP's deep pockets. I know our grassroots movement has what it takes to pull ahead and flip Florida blue, but I need to meet tonight's fundraising goal to have a shot. Florida's last Senate election was decided by just 0.12 points – only 10,033 votes – and this race is bound to be just as close. Do you know what that means, friend? Every single dollar is going to make a huge impact on our efforts to win in Florida. I can't afford to cut a single hour of canvassing or phone banking, because every voter I fail to reach could cost me this election. It's urgent, friend: Marco Rubio is breaking fundraising records – and national Republicans have already poured $10 million into this race to keep Democrats like me from winning in Florida again. This is a make-or-break moment for my campaign, so I'm counting on grassroots supporters like you to help me close this fundraising gap, pull ahead in the polls and defeat Marco Rubio. It's the only way to defend the Senate majority and defend our democracy from the GOP. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you, Val Demings | | Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you’re critical to this grassroots campaign. To make sure you’re the first to get important updates, or text “JOIN” to 77076 to receive text updates. = & . name: Letitia James
subject: URGENT: I need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42313591/332486923/265476937?refcode=jtk323-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTY2YzAzMi1lYjk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FKKUnJQ4ng15xVd4DezkOPQU80pEpo36UBn7GggnMks=)
---
This week, President Biden made an historic announcement with his nomination of Ketanji Brown Jackson, Peter.

While this is an incredible moment we will cherish and celebrate, it is long overdue. But it couldn’t have come at a more critical moment with so many Americans’ rights not being defended when attacked by extreme Republicans around the country.

In Florida, Republicans just passed the “Don’t Say Gay or Trans” bill which prevents teachers from providing a safe, inclusive classroom for all and will block them from talking about LGBTQ+ issues with students. Hundreds of bills have been passed across the country to limit access to the ballot box – especially for Black and brown communities. And conservatives around the country are attacking our reproductive rights and control over our own bodies.

With Judge Jackson soon to be on the bench, we know that we have a progressive champion who will defend our rights that are under attack – but she can’t do it alone.

**That’s why we cannot afford to fall short of our February fundraising goal. My team set out to raise $20,000 before the month ends, but we’re still $9,191 short. So I must ask:**
[**Will you rush a donation of $50, $15, or even $5 – whatever you can spare – before midnight tomorrow to help us reach our end-of-month goal and power our fight for justice and equality?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42313592/332486924/379053316?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk323-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTY2YzAzMi1lYjk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FKKUnJQ4ng15xVd4DezkOPQU80pEpo36UBn7GggnMks=)
| | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42313593/332486925/379053316?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk323-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTY2YzAzMi1lYjk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FKKUnJQ4ng15xVd4DezkOPQU80pEpo36UBn7GggnMks=)
---
Peter, I launched my historic re-election campaign for attorney general because I’m not finished fighting to protect everyday New Yorkers from the powerful and corrupt. And since my campaign launched, I’ve been floored by the support that I’ve received from friends, colleagues, and fearless fighters like you.

**Just this month I was honored to receive the official nomination by the New York Democrats for attorney general – but if we can’t hit our critical end-of-month fundraising goals, then these accomplishments are at risk.[So please, will you rush a donation of whatever you can spare before midnight tomorrow to help me defend New York and reach my February fundraising goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42313594/332486926/379053316?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk323-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTY2YzAzMi1lYjk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FKKUnJQ4ng15xVd4DezkOPQU80pEpo36UBn7GggnMks=)**
| | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42313595/332486927/379053316?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk323-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTY2YzAzMi1lYjk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FKKUnJQ4ng15xVd4DezkOPQU80pEpo36UBn7GggnMks=)

Letitia James

subject: New York Times: "Most Vulnerable Democrats"

body:
The New York Times is reporting that Senator Maggie Hassan is one of the most vulnerable Democrats ahead of the 2022 midterms.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42322958/332529977/-947982778?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk712-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDJlNzAxYS0xNTk4LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-9Kbe30TPjLtVIEcKFadGScMrij8CV1sVmN0uZvQo14=)
This just in, friend: **_The_** **_New York Times_ ****is reporting that Senator Maggie Hassan is one of the most vulnerable Democrats ahead of the 2022 midterms.**

McConnell and his allies only need to flip ONE seat to take back the Senate – and they're laser-focused on Senator Hassan. In fact, they've already spent more than $7.5 million in attack ads against her, more than they've spent against any other vulnerable Senate Democrat.
And if Senator Hassan loses in November, Democrats could lose the Senate. It's that simple, and it means we cannot fall short in these critical moments.

name: John Fetterman
subject: 👋 Hi Derek!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
I think it’s time for another introduction.
#
Hi Derek! 👋
We’ve had a lot of new supporters join our campaign lately, so I think it’s time for another introduction to who I am + what our campaign is all about.
Sound good? Cool.
(This is going to get a little long, so if you don’t have the time to read through right now, **[I’d appreciate it if you could chip in a few bucks to help this people-powered campaign meet our February fundraising goal.)](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/44935?refcode=em20220227-4766&t=1&akid=4766%2E434096%2EYKKs7Z)**
Well, let’s start from the beginning.
I’m a Pennsylvania native, born to teenage parents just trying to make it on their own. I grew up in York, PA, and after I graduated high school, I went to Albright College — the same college my dad went to while working the night shift to support us when I was a baby. Go Lions! 🦁 I played offensive tackle there because, well, look at me.
After college, I went to business school in Connecticut. This is where I started my work + dedication to public service, Derek. When I was 23, I signed up with Big Brothers/Big Sisters, and, well, **my life has never been the same.**
I officially met my “little,” Nick—one of the most transformative relationships of my life. This little dude was so sweet and incredibly smart, and I felt so lucky to be his mentor.
Nick’s father had just died of AIDS, and his mother would soon succumb to the disease as well, leaving Nick an orphan at just 8 years old. Right before his mother died, I promised her I would get her son to college.
Fifteen years later, we both held up our ends of the bargain, with Nick graduating from Washington and Jefferson College in Washington, PA. I’m so grateful I got to be there, with Gisele + baby Karl by my side.
In 1995 I joined AmeriCorps and served in Pittsburgh’s historic Hill District, where I helped set up the first computer labs in the neighborhood and taught GED classes to young mothers and fathers.
Then, 20 years ago, I returned to Pennsylvania, after receiving a degree in public policy at Harvard University, to start a GED program in the town of Braddock, a majority-Black town, and one of the poorest and most challenged communities in the commonwealth. In 2005, encouraged by my students, I ran for mayor — and won a very crowded primary by a single vote.
In my 13 years as mayor, I worked to rebuild our community, creating jobs, getting youth engaged, and bringing creative urban policy solutions to Braddock. The town now has a community center, urban gardens, and a free store run by my incredible wife, Gisele.
Together, we have fought for causes we believe in, from immigration reform to LGBTQ+ rights. When Pennsylvania lawmakers continued to push outdated discriminatory policies banning marriage equality, I stood up and officiated one of the first same-sex marriages in the commonwealth.
And when they wanted to build a four-lane interstate highway through Braddock, a town that’s more than 70% Black and already suffered historically high asthma rates, I was the only elected official in Western Pennsylvania who opposed it on the grounds that it was environmental racism.
In 2018, I ran to be Pennsylvania’s Lieutenant Governor, and won over voters across the commonwealth (not just in Philly + Pittsburgh), winning a five-way Democratic primary and a commanding victory in the general election aside Gov. Tom Wolf.
Weeks after taking office, my team and I embarked on a listening tour of all 67 counties, something no sitting Lt. Governor has ever done, to engage with Pennsylvanians about legalizing marijuana. In three months, the historic tour saw over 10,000 people turn out in person and tens of thousands more engage online. Shortly after this, the Governor announced his support for legalization for the first time.
As the chair of Pennsylvania’s Board of Pardons, I am leading the fight to give second chances to non-violent offenders, and free those who have been wrongfully convicted. Under my tenure, the Board has recommended more applicants for commutation than under any lieutenant governor in decades. I’m really proud of that, Derek.
(And I’m almost done, don’t worry.)
As many of you know, Gisele and I have chosen not to settle in the Lt. Governor’s Mansion, instead opening up the pool in the official residence to children who typically wouldn’t have access to one. We live with our three beautiful children Karl, Gracie, and August, in a restored car dealership in Braddock with our adopted dogs, Levi + Artie.
That brings us to today. Over the past year, we’ve been running a 67-County campaign, connecting with voters across PA, truly living our campaign motto of Every County, Every Vote. If the people of the Commonwealth send me to the U.S. Senate, I’ll fight like hell for everyone — for kids like Nick, for students + their families in towns like Braddock, for communities who face discrimination, for our unions, for my family + for yours.
**Derek, now that you know more about me, my family, and what we stand for, I’m respectfully asking:[Can you please make your first $5 donation today to help send me to the U.S. Senate? Our campaign is completely funded by grassroots supporters like you + we’re *so close* to meeting our $100,000 February goal.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/44935?refcode=em20220227-4766&t=2&akid=4766%2E434096%2EYKKs7Z)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/44935?amount=5&refcode=em20220227-4766&t=21&akid=4766%2E434096%2EYKKs7Z)**
__
Thank you for taking the time to read this. Your support means the world to me. 💛
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220227-4766-footer&t=22&refcode2=4766_434096_YKKs7Z&akid=4766%2E434096%2EYKKs7Z)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=23&akid=4766%2E434096%2EYKKs7Z)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=4766%2E434096%2EYKKs7Z)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Rick Scott
subject: Term Limits
body:
Peter,
The permanent ruling class in Washington is bankrupting us with inflation and debt while the rest of America foots the bill.

For you to have more, Washington has to have less.

It’s time to make sure bureaucrats and Congress are accountable to the American people and not just to the special interests.

**We need term limits for members of Congress AND government bureaucrats. **

I put together an 11-point plan to **Rescue America** , and term limits are an _integral_ part of our plan.

I want to see if YOU support enacting term limits for members of Congress and bureaucrats, so my team put together a survey for you to fill out.

[**Please take our “Term Limits” survey TODAY and let us know if YOU support term limits.**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=df7284dd434a43439c3b82f54adb9a2b&_e=OgN5baSkq_h9zGWNtD6g8IS5Zl6mXfksPXExfD38AtyvK93CdJx3JWjOxPAdDqSox7q_98wuSXpOQLv2ThgjAaYctpzFiCu8HZgrhXgosIHcyprwPW9NGTAsRaD0g2cKC2QJHXszg8wGFP5XiOM_wvnkA3dwTcf6AMPcd7lIdVU3J6sH1ppubxUfs7_J8ojiaTPHJv8aDsGDcLAJ9klaH-GxXjynCGa58V5j3yFlfnpFR6Viokkrh5ThO16dh9BoviYiiXo1Z9UyRNTpHTR3oMVtWSKNH6o-Z_tM94KHnIASjkgSNbZeRRi0hBnVFzpiX4p8xGx-ASSm93icbPDIrBI5HfdjXNSo4wVoJ-Vk3V4yLFNI22TVLwo-rFTNTrC2V7LooREWYLyIB0Ohg1oZw65EUydicX0d5gKECsgPYkQ%3D)

**President Biden is deeply concerned - and he's right to be:**

He just got word Trump has raked in **$122 MILLION** to obliterate our Democratic House Majority and DESTROY his presidency.

**Thankfully, all-star Democrats have unlocked the 300% Match just when we needed it the most:

[](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/qkxpQeX07XC~)**

We're still calling on 10,000 more people to step up before tomorrow's critical End of Month Deadline to answer President Biden's call.

| | Folks,

I won my 2020 election by the smallest margin of any Congressional Democrat and thanks to you, we were able to keep our House majority. But with our new district map, I need your help more than ever.

We’ve been able to achieve so much with that narrow majority in Congress – the fastest job growth in American history, a historic decline in poverty, lower health care costs, and the biggest investment in modernizing America’s infrastructure in decades. Meanwhile, the Republicans are running with no governing agenda, while calling the violence of January 6th “legitimate discourse.” The contrast, and stakes, could not be more clear.

[To stay on track, we have to win tough races like mine. Fortunately our _Malinowski Matchers_ pledged to match $60,000! Everything we raise before tomorrow at midnight will help us go head to head with Tom Kean Jr. for a second time and it will help us combat these constant attack ads from the GOP. Will you please rush a donation before the end of the day tomorrow? All donations will be matched and have double the impact!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42323131/332531104/-1267168961?amount=10&refcode=TM_EM_FR_3MO_220227_2_5_match&refcode2=95337755-1898-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTMzNzc1NS0xODk4LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aNdNYMHa_3f1Zdg22o_U2BXGTRpYul-j2LWYM33URLs=)

We have seen continuous support, not only from folks like you but from those who have been representing Oregonians for years.

We've heard from a lot of endorsers, but there are two we want to highlight. Kitty Piercy, the former Mayor of Eugene, **AND** Lucy Vinis, the current Mayor of Eugene.

Fighting for the future that Oregon needs is something that Tina is well equipped to do. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42323231/332531895/598078400?refcode=em22_220227_EOM2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MmEzNDU5YS0xODk4LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wt8RXlKslZMv8zRq1smItwCUSyV_0rKLaFkdKNBB608=)

The ability to protect our communities from growing climate change is something that Tina has been doing. body:
Nobody accomplishes something like this all by themselves.
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42314314/332490604/396464211?refcode=em-logo&refcode2=a43d75b4-ee97-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&contactdata=eU0qddfEYcD9t9qynNTJ1MK0IjXCiAg7Fpd5JxEUIrFATocO7TXzi2SUa63DRONm&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDNkNzViNC1lZTk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YFkaphikTdty0J1cag-EPNyfX48ZJ6kLcn3bVj1sfoE=)
$3, friend.
If you knew contributing just $3 would keep Chris in the Senate fighting for us for six more years, wouldn’t it be an easy decision to make that donation today?
What if you knew that contribution meant Chris would get the chance to lead the charge for a clean energy economy and confront the climate crisis?
What if you knew that your contribution meant Chris would get the chance to fight for lower costs for American families and a fairer, more inclusive economy?
What if you knew that contribution meant Chris would get the chance to defend our democracy from those that seek to dismantle it and stand up to authoritarian threats abroad?
Wouldn’t it be the best $3 you could give?
We know $3 might not sound like the kind of money that makes a difference, especially compared to the kind of dark money Chris faced in the last election.
But the truth is that nobody accomplishes something like this all by themselves. It takes a large group of folks who believe in the potential of our democracy, in progress, and working for positive change.
That's where you come in. We are relying on grassroots support from this team to fuel this campaign. We know that not everyone is able to give in these still uncertain times, but if you can spare anything, we would like to respectfully ask:
**[Can you please make a $3 contribution to re-elect Chris Van Hollen to the Senate before our end-of-month deadline tomorrow? Our opportunity for progress is at stake, and Chris can’t win this alone.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42314316/332490630/396464211?refcode=em220227-1-a&refcode2=a43d75b4-ee97-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&contactdata=eU0qddfEYcD9t9qynNTJ1MK0IjXCiAg7Fpd5JxEUIrFATocO7TXzi2SUa63DRONm&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDNkNzViNC1lZTk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YFkaphikTdty0J1cag-EPNyfX48ZJ6kLcn3bVj1sfoE=)**
**[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42314317/332490632/396464211?refcode=em220227-1-a&refcode2=a43d75b4-ee97-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&contactdata=eU0qddfEYcD9t9qynNTJ1MK0IjXCiAg7Fpd5JxEUIrFATocO7TXzi2SUa63DRONm&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDNkNzViNC1lZTk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YFkaphikTdty0J1cag-EPNyfX48ZJ6kLcn3bVj1sfoE=)**
Thank you in advance for supporting our work to protect our democracy and move our country forward.
Team Van Hollen

PAID FOR BY VAN HOLLEN FOR SENATE

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, you can [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/e55dfb37-e497-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a/a43d75b4-ee97-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDNkNzViNC1lZTk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YFkaphikTdty0J1cag-EPNyfX48ZJ6kLcn3bVj1sfoE=&id=102988412), but we'd be very sorry to see you go.

name: Dan Farough
subject: Our best defense against the attacks on our democracy
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
body:
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] Friend, I know everyone is concerned about the events in Ukraine, but Michigan's legislature is advancing a blatant attack on our democracy – directly undoing some of Jocelyn’s vital work to safeguard our elections in 2020.
With our democracy under attack, who else can we count on to safeguard Michigan's elections?

Jocelyn helped run the most secure and transparent elections in our state's history. If, like me, you know we need Jocelyn at the helm again, pitch in now to make sure she wins re-election this fall. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=022722]

secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=022722 [secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=022722]Dan

---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Jocelyn Benson
Date: Friday, Feb. 25, 2022 at 4:39 PM
Subject: The fight for democracy is everywhere
To: Our friend

Friend --

We are in the midst of a multiyear, multifaceted, multi-front war over the future of democracy. And make no mistake, democracy will only prevail if we make defending it the most important issue of our time.

Russia’s invasion of Ukraine is a blatant attempt to destroy a democratic nation and put it under the thumb of an authoritarian regime. Like you, I’m praying for everyone in Ukraine and I stand with the pro-democracy movement holding Russia accountable for their actions.
But this war on democracy did not start in Ukraine and it will not end there.

Right here in Michigan, partisan extremists started waging war on our democracy in 2020, a war that continues today. While it may not involve tanks and missiles and invading armies, it’s very real and very dangerous.

There is no denying we are in the midst of a multiyear, multifaceted, multi-front war over the future of democracy. And make no mistake, democracy will only prevail if we make defending it the most important issue of our time.

The latest salvo being fired at our democracy targets the online absentee ballot application portal I launched in 2020 and the guidance we issued to local election officials that clarified state election law. Why is this so important? Partisan extremists are trying to make it harder for eligible voters to cast a ballot. That’s anti-democratic. Pure and simple.

Don’t forget, voters approved a constitutional guarantee to vote by absentee ballot and the portal was designed to help voters exercise their right.

The guidance we offered clerks was designed to help them know how to correctly and fairly evaluate absentee ballot signatures. More importantly, while the advice was similar to advice the state has given local clerks for years and years, we’re attempting to formalize it with legislative approval, on the order of a court.

But now extremists in the state legislature want to make it harder to vote by taking away the online absentee ballot application and make it more likely that legitimate voter signatures will be flagged as fraudulent. This is clearly an attempt to rehash the "Big Lie" since there was virtually no fraud in the 2020 election, be it absentee, online, in-person or otherwise.

I know we are asking you to help on many fronts. But you elected me to serve the citizens of Michigan and safeguard our electoral process from those who would take it away, in all its forms. It is what I have done since the day I was sworn-in and why I'm shining a spotlight on this blatant attack on voting now.

The people behind this effort -- and every bill like it -- are hoping you don't notice. Certainly, world events make it more likely that you may not notice their war on democracy that is happening here in Michigan. But I know that won’t happen.

This year you and every American voter has the power to reject candidates who run on a platform of party over country. You can hold accountable those seeking to erode confidence in our democracy and deny those willing to overturn elections the authority to do so.
We’re in a critical moment, both domestically and abroad, with authoritarians seeking to destroy democracy. And I thank you for being with me as we all continue this vital work.

- Jocelyn

[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
To unsubscribe, please click here: unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/21452fd1-9096-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a/4aa3459a-1898-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWEzNDU5YS0xODk4LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=31MiYo3638sS6ZptZffWvq0M9bnfdszNTCgVQLssBZ8=&id=112210963

name: Alessandra Biaggi
subject: Just a moment of your time!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress
body:
#
Hi friend — in just a minute, I’m going to ask you to pitch in to my campaign for Congress. But first, please let me explain why your contribution is so important, especially right now.
**The truth is that, when I jumped in this race, I knew that my team and I would face a lot of opposition from conservatives prepared to spend a lot of money — potentially millions of dollars — to defeat us.**
But I also knew that supporters like you, who believe in supporting working families through progressive policy, would step up during important moments to help our team raise the funds necessary to win.
Right now is one of those important moments. It’s our first End-of-Month deadline, and hitting our goals will allow us to run a campaign we can all be proud of and win this primary in June.
**[That’s where you come in. Please make a contribution today ahead of our deadline on the 28th. Any amount you can afford will make a difference.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-feb/?refcode=em220227-1-15&refcode2=512_59515_mYRBxP&akid=512%2E59515%2EmYRBxP)**
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-feb/?refcode=em220227-1-15&refcode2=512_59515_mYRBxP&akid=512%2E59515%2EmYRBxP)**
On a personal note, it means a lot to me to know that you have my back in what is shaping up to be a tough primary.
Thank you, again, for your support. I’ll be in touch soon.
– Alessandra

Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.alessandrabiaggi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=512%2E59515%2EmYRBxP).

name: Henk Conn
subject: A Green Candidate needs your support!
body:
Hello all Green Party supporters! Please read this message! Today I am pleading, begging for your support. The Campaign for US Senate begins
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/16NyuBeXu/c?w=dVzBSmHdz6wv-u4isjzwYUQDtaETuMVZYRbW9dQO00Q.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zaG91dG91dC53aXguY29tL3NvLzE2Tnl1QmVYdT9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjZlMzRiODhkLTQzMjktNDMwNy1iNDNmLTViODVkNTNjZTI1YSJ9)_**
---
| | |
---
| | On the Ballot!A Green Candidate needs your support!
---
| | Hello all Green Party supporters! Please read this message! Today I am pleading, begging for your support. The Campaign for US Senate begins on March 12th, less than two weeks away. I desperately need more funds. Please donate $5 or $10 today. For every dollar donated, tens and hundreds of California voters can be reached. As of today, I have raised just under $5,000 for the campaign. With those funds I will pay the $3,480 filing fee for the campaign (Deadline March 10th). I have also paid $850 for the candidate statement in the statewide Voter’s Information Guide*. To date, I have collected $4,200 campaign donations and paid $4,330 in getting on the ballot. I also paid $250 for a year’s subscription for my website. If you are reading this email, I want to provide to you a full disclosure to my campaign spending. And if you should decide to donate $5 or $10 today, I want to make sure you know where your funds are being spent! As you can see if you do the basic math, I raised $4,200 and spent $4,330. So, two weeks before the campaign begins, the campaign has run out of funds. (WORLD’s BIGGEST FROWNY FACE). But there is so much more to do than just being on the ballot!!! The website subscription needs to be renewed. As I campaign publicly I need small devices (Pens, buttons, t-shirts) to give to voters. (Just a few examples). I have been registered as a Green Party voter for 30 years! I vote Green Party because of the platform. I am thankful that the Green Party exists because it gives me a sense of integrity when I look to the past and think of my voting choices. The Green Party is a party of integrity, and I want to help it grow! Please help me (www.henk4senate.com), please donate $5 or $10 today. Humbly, gratefully and sincerely, Henk Conn *Candidate Statement: I am a social worker with a heart for people and planet. Responding to climate change with a Green New Deal. Creating solutions to end institutional poverty and racial injustice. Supporting universal health care and fighting corporate greed."
---
| | [](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/16NyuBeXu/c?w=h3eteCwksJyVTTLxrgx5ZSLLAtVQDGtGbEJYbqOHJJo.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zaG91dG91dC53aXguY29tL3NvLzE2Tnl1QmVYdT9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsInIiOiIzZmEwNTliOC1mYWFlLTQ1Y2UtOGQxZC0zOWYzNTIyZDkwMDYiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI2ZTM0Yjg4ZC00MzI5LTQzMDctYjQzZi01Yjg1ZDUzY2UyNWEifQ)
---
|
---
| | The campaign has raised $3,480 needed for the filing fees. It took 6 months of weekly emails and 98 contributions. Step One complete! We can pay the fees to be on the ballot!
---
|
---
| | | [**Donate**](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/16NyuBeXu/c?w=Z3Hx0pkZCS8OQseGrl4tzrO9ozC9Zy-284AWB3BwRug.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVuazRzZW5hdGUuY29tLyIsInIiOiJmYWU1Y2I4YS1lODM3LTRiY2MtOTAxZi00ZWIzNjg5MzgzNmMiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI2ZTM0Yjg4ZC00MzI5LTQzMDctYjQzZi01Yjg1ZDUzY2UyNWEifQ)
---
| |
# Step Two I went door-to-door and collected the 70 signatures of registered California voters. I met the requirement to be on the ballot! Thank you to everyone who answered their doors in the middle of the pandemic!

---
| |
---
|
### Write the Ballot Statement!

clean_body: Hello all Green Party supporters! Please read this message! Today I am pleading, begging for your support. The Campaign for US Senate begins | | Can't see this message? | | | | | On the Ballot!A Green Candidate needs your support! | | Hello all Green Party supporters! Please read this message! Today I am pleading, begging for your support. The Campaign for US Senate begins on March 12th, less than two weeks away. I desperately need more funds. Please donate $5 or $10 today. For every dollar donated, tens and hundreds of California voters can be reached. As of today, I have raised just under $5,000 for the campaign. With those funds I will pay the $3,480 filing fee for the campaign (Deadline March 10th). I have also paid $850 for the candidate statement in the statewide Voter’s Information Guide. To date, I have collected $4,200 campaign donations and paid $4,330 in getting on the ballot. I also paid $250 for a year’s subscription for my website. If you are reading this email, I want to provide to you a full disclosure to my campaign spending. And if you should decide to donate $5 or $10 today, I want to make sure you know where your funds are being spent! As you can see if you do the basic math, I raised $4,200 and spent $4,330. So, two weeks before the campaign begins, the campaign has run out of funds. (WORLD’s BIGGEST FROWNY FACE). But there is so much more to do than just being on the ballot!!! The website subscription needs to be renewed. As I campaign publicly I need small devices (Pens, buttons, t-shirts) to give to voters. (Just a few examples). I have been registered as a Green Party voter for 30 years! I vote Green Party because of the platform. I am thankful that the Green Party exists because it gives me a sense of integrity when I look to the past and think of my voting choices. The Green Party is a party of integrity, and I want to help it grow! Please help me (www.henk4senate.com), please donate $5 or $10 today. Humbly, gratefully and sincerely, Henk Conn Candidate Statement: I am a social worker with a heart for people and planet. Responding to climate change with a Green New Deal. Creating solutions to end institutional poverty and racial injustice. Supporting universal health care and fighting corporate greed." | | | | | The campaign has raised $3,480 needed for the filing fees. It took 6 months of weekly emails and 98 contributions. name: Cory Booker
subject: Can you help out my friend Josh?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
---
| | Hi there,

I’d like to introduce you to someone who gives me hope: my friend Congressman Josh Gottheimer.

Having partners in the House is so important to me and my colleagues in the Senate. We know we can count on representatives like Josh to keep progress moving forward and make sure we get bills passed that will benefit working families.

That’s why I’m reaching out to you personally on Josh’s behalf. This election is not going to be easy, and Josh’s seat could be the difference between holding and losing our razor-thin majority.

That’s why I’m reaching out to you personally on Josh’s behalf. Friend, I’ll make this brief, because I know you are focused on the important things like putting food on the table, paying the bills, and making sure your kids are getting the best possible education. The problem is the Biden and Kelly administrations are making all of those things harder, not easier. I know I’m disappointed with their leadership. I’m pretty sure you are too. We’re approaching the end of another month and we need your help to keep up the momentum and to continue growing this movement to defeat Governor Kelly in November. I know you are a loyal supporter of our campaign. The best way you can help us right now is spread the word so we can grow the team. **[Will you share this message with your friends and family members who are disappointed with the direction of our country and our state?](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=d7e15e3aa67f468ebce6b27c8060fe9e&_e=4h3N7DBDMyD68BFoqNyC8hUmYDmXM0uB4WJqD_fe7L6SL5YoT_5S8Gi7odYsmejQC1P6CnFrzR2RspDGSxs8_659RDrForLgLEv03O__eLf9876TOmFMek3DC7v3r28OOsgI8WB9lRHkcSlhZYQdgOamjQWfWHvOrwPDGj8MsPwsu2RaAOp3NkbSJAlJf8AX09bwJO8CVtEu82F5_7ePi8NnwsokqGXzSqk1gedopyJXCzZGygu6_HTf0qulFTYhJ_9wfWjmxxn4EQiy5QvOYk_7DIS5k_09Q1H50LaJIKxe_UFKuLv8Y34klwYSfGKIHJPYeyxDUTAJAuvlxKNsa40oPWgXEx7J5NKV_IVIYRxODOI0w0Tq68aLPiIevMNyD3ujwsVrJtnsfoQxy8qL52Z1ryMdgyFwuzFz9ALLe6cI8HfZnwy3RJOeaUL4_nz5D5Rk_oEjVRx5U22XHhwv2eek8LHoEqkhwpf-1lX7Sbia93mkPIFToL1ZDHltNvnz) ** **We’d love to have them join our movement to bring positive change to Kansas:** [**STAND WITH DEREK**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=d7e15e3aa67f468ebce6b27c8060fe9e&_e=4h3N7DBDMyD68BFoqNyC8hUmYDmXM0uB4WJqD_fe7L6SL5YoT_5S8Gi7odYsmejQC1P6CnFrzR2RspDGSxs8_659RDrForLgLEv03O__eLf9876TOmFMek3DC7v3r28OOsgI8WB9lRHkcSlhZYQdgOamjQWfWHvOrwPDGj8MsPwsu2RaAOp3NkbSJAlJf8AX09bwJO8CVtEu82F5_7ePi8NnwsokqGXzSqk1gedopyJXCzZGygu6_HTf0qulFTYhJ_9wfWjmxxn4EQiy5QvOYl8LCSvOQEpuP-Q5fHPj69RVCjO-2Xcpg6ouUL41DESo9Yiu71yiK3fSt9J9KKPZacDtv5EMSqx2mxQUyDtJa81SiEhch-QvXlyMFGDutARJjtNyn4pkgvlZJD8r5nfGyKRyBFYpJXS_CyQ8AEnLxh3_Pzm6_1fEo8f0BIwWNfkOW4CdyWFMmytPDTwfT7X7sNSDHY1S9Ni5wkt8yCLqaTIdU508WwgrRnR-YkwvIyOP) There’s a lot at stake in this year’s elections, friend. We can’t afford another four years of the Kelly administration. These next few months will be the most important yet for our campaign. We need to get our message out across Kansas and fight as hard as we can against federal overreach into our private lives and medical choices. I’m grateful to have you on our side, friend. I’m going to count on your support until the very end. Thanks, Derek Schmidt | |

clean_body: | | I have never come to you with a more important ask. \-- Republicans just launched a vicious $7.5 MILLION attack ad targeting 24 Democrats. \-- They only need to unseat 5 of my Democrats to take back the House. \-- And as of 5pm, we’re DEADLOCKED in the polls -- 42% to 42%. = I’ve never needed Democrats to step up more forcefully than in this moment. We can’t afford to lose a single Democratic re-election. If we reach tomorrow's critical goal, we’ll show Trump, McConnell, McCarthy, and all their special interest donors that we will NEVER let them take the House from us. Can I count on your urgent $15? | | = = = = = Thank you, Nancy Nancy Pelosi is the Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives. As the top Democrat in the House, she's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of Mitch McConnell and Kevin McCarthy. We know you're getting a lot of emails -- but it's only because what we're facing right now as a country is so important. Nancy is committed to doing whatever it takes to elect a record-breaking number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. Can we count on your support? = Nancy isn't one to back down from a fight, and we're in this for the long haul. We'd hate to see you leave our movement completely, but if you must, please click . | Nancy Pelosi for Congress 700 13TH STREET NW Suite 800 Washington, DC 20005 United States | | Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress

Peter – I understand that Democrats are tired. We’ve been fighting for democracy and our progressive principles for so long.

We endured President Trump’s long campaign of lies and racism, a painful Election Day, 4 years of his presidency, and even a violent insurrection attempt on our Capitol.

When I first won this seat for Congress in 2012, I never imagined the state of our country and democracy would fall so far.

But my whole life I have been committed to public service and progressive policy – from working as a teacher to being elected to a school board and now as a Congressman.

_And I’m not going to stop now._

**What about you, Peter?**

body:

| Peter, in a minute, we’re going to explain why Deb is the right person to represent Wisconsin’s third district in Congress, but first, can you make a **[contribution towards Deb’s critical February end-of-month fundraising goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42315856/332496656/-1336913912?amount=25&refcode=ea.6b0f5209-f297-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.6b0f5209-f297-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjBmNTIwOS1mMjk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yIOP5VGhwUjkkVuGioVOADNGZNOOluq2uOszPyjRqiE=)** We’re relying on your support to make this campaign a success! | ****[RUSH A DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42315857/332496663/-1336913912?amount=25&refcode=ea.6b0f5209-f297-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.6b0f5209-f297-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjBmNTIwOS1mMjk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yIOP5VGhwUjkkVuGioVOADNGZNOOluq2uOszPyjRqiE=)****
---
* * *
**Deb has spent her whole life preparing to lead.**

Growing up, Deb’s parents taught her that nothing is more important than serving others. They embodied that service in their own lives: her mother was a teacher and caregiver to Deb’s siblings, and her father was a member of Congress.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42315858/332496670/-1336913912?amount=25&refcode=ea.6b0f5209-f297-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.6b0f5209-f297-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjBmNTIwOS1mMjk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yIOP5VGhwUjkkVuGioVOADNGZNOOluq2uOszPyjRqiE=)
When Deb was older, she decided to serve her country in uniform.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42315859/332496671/-1336913912?amount=25&refcode=ea.6b0f5209-f297-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.6b0f5209-f297-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjBmNTIwOS1mMjk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yIOP5VGhwUjkkVuGioVOADNGZNOOluq2uOszPyjRqiE=)
Then, she started a family with her husband, Kevin, who shared these values. And they raised their children with the same dedication to service.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42315860/332496672/-1336913912?amount=25&refcode=ea.6b0f5209-f297-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.6b0f5209-f297-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjBmNTIwOS1mMjk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yIOP5VGhwUjkkVuGioVOADNGZNOOluq2uOszPyjRqiE=)
After raising their children and continuing her education, the terrorist attacks of 9/11 compelled Deb to stand up and serve again as a CIA officer.

Now, she’s ready to serve in a different way: Following in her father’s footsteps, Deb is going to be the advocate Wisconsinites need in Congress to create a brighter future for all of us.

**But she can’t get to Washington without your help, Peter. We still need to raise $3,895 to meet our online fundraising goal for this month, and we’re relying on grassroots supporters like you to give what you can.[Click here to donate $25 or any amount immediately >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42315861/332496673/-1336913912?amount=25&refcode=ea.6b0f5209-f297-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.6b0f5209-f297-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjBmNTIwOS1mMjk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yIOP5VGhwUjkkVuGioVOADNGZNOOluq2uOszPyjRqiE=)**

clean_body: Deb is ready to serve again. | Peter, in a minute, we’re going to explain why Deb is the right person to represent Wisconsin’s third district in Congress, but first, can you make a = We’re relying on your support to make this campaign a success! | **= Deb has spent her whole life preparing to lead. Growing up, Deb’s parents taught her that nothing is more important than serving others. They embodied that service in their own lives: her mother was a teacher and caregiver to Deb’s siblings, and her father was a member of Congress. = When Deb was older, she decided to serve her country in uniform. = Then, she started a family with her husband, Kevin, who shared these values. And they raised their children with the same dedication to service. = After raising their children and continuing her education, the terrorist attacks of 9/11 compelled Deb to stand up and serve again as a CIA officer. Now, she’s ready to serve in a different way: Following in her father’s footsteps, Deb is going to be the advocate Wisconsinites need in Congress to create a brighter future for all of us. But she can’t get to Washington without your help, Peter. We still need to raise $3,895 to meet our online fundraising goal for this month, and we’re relying on grassroots supporters like you to give what you can.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: **= | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = Forward! Our massive FEC deadline is TOMORROW and we haven't raised the money we need to defend the Senate.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Scott=20Baugh?=
subject: Weakness leads to war
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Baugh for Congress
body:
|
---
| | Peter,

Here are a few thoughts about the state of our country that I wanted to share this morning:
* Abandoning the approach of peace through strength gave Vladimir Putin an opening to invade Ukraine and caused disaster in Afghanistan.
* The failure to secure our southern border has made America less safe.
* The Biden Administration’s dismissal of energy independence as a goal has caused fuel prices to skyrocket.
* Over-reliance on China has caused massive supply chain disruptions.

None of this was in the best interest of our nation, and all of it has helped lead to foreign policy disasters.

This America Last agenda is exactly why I’m running for Congress. As one of the leaders of the far-left Progressive Caucus, Katie Porter has enabled this disastrous agenda at every turn.

When it came to the Russia hoax, she was one of the loudest voices in the room. Now that Putin is committing war crimes, the most she can muster is a tweet of platitudes.

We deserve better from our leaders in Congress. But the truth is, Katie Porter already has more than $16 million to bankroll her re-election campaign. We’re fighting an uphill battle to have the resources needed to defeat her.

If you agree, will you please help us fund our campaign to restore American greatness?
---
| [JOIN THE FIGHT](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=33d44a08cb&e=8a657725d1 "JOIN THE FIGHT")
---
| Thank you,
Scott Baugh

clean_body: | | | Peter, Here are a few thoughts about the state of our country that I wanted to share this morning: Abandoning the approach of peace through strength gave Vladimir Putin an opening to invade Ukraine and caused disaster in Afghanistan. The failure to secure our southern border has made America less safe. The Biden Administration’s dismissal of energy independence as a goal has caused fuel prices to skyrocket. Over-reliance on China has caused massive supply chain disruptions. None of this was in the best interest of our nation, and all of it has helped lead to foreign policy disasters. This America Last agenda is exactly why I’m running for Congress. As one of the leaders of the far-left Progressive Caucus, Katie Porter has enabled this disastrous agenda at every turn. When it came to the Russia hoax, she was one of the loudest voices in the room. Now that Putin is committing war crimes, the most she can muster is a tweet of platitudes. We deserve better from our leaders in Congress. But the truth is, Katie Porter already has more than $16 million to bankroll her re-election campaign. We’re fighting an uphill battle to have the resources needed to defeat her. If you agree, will you please help us fund our campaign to restore American greatness? | "JOIN THE FIGHT" | Thank you, Scott Baugh | | "Paid for by Scott Baugh for Congress. FEC ID# C00798322" | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2022 Scott Baugh for Congress, All rights reserved.

Dear Friend,

I wanted you to be the first to know that on Monday we will go live with our first television ad "Parental Rights".

Our first ad discusses my Parental Bill of Rights and my commitment to ensuring that Maryland parents are empowered and that all children have the opportunity to receive a world-class education.

**That means providing real school choice, record funding, and accountability -- with education transparency.**

[_**But I cannot do it without you!**_](https://u21639199.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=DRhu97MwZOafZz0axKBSuHM4TyUiRDjO7WRT-2Bn4igr193XMreDNS7fl2A4g9SL86i-2FQV5YOPuH0GDsJb-2FO7ExsuMR6RZz7-2FUzoqnulJDJIHzmFFJW1hfGzJV-2BJB4KuvTgQbw_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6rUKzE3Il4xPJKBbG8FSzeS5Y4JN53698WWthoQQoT3sTTwP4fHE5pg4x159-2FInTgFjs33j0Rys0wwQvqUs8tjowGSWKk7YFB0DQYrNUFsairEqVOmpw1KqDjY1hUDlLA3ky0GqXuXwLbUMRGb4iLYwFjwn1WE2YrvXHWNkfghadJf5aPjUI3IivcBWeMHosx8oT1G50RqLl1CoRKREuC9xeMmDG5sMZt72zGSxaMJPnIjnsn4seQfsjsK5fX0093c6tfaF-2Bi6EAEz6YNyKvTyWM8rfd2coMO3XA2h2DCmh7cOAwx21NyHh9PPEv7aASAvRiWPPxoCEIccGNFKdJeEY4TloQ0ec4lzUzZ-2Fuj7zy3h8PzfWXkVeinM-2FPX70fNj4Ci5V7Pnn9c5goJfLJSWeunoYxKy-2FdcSqdE2-2F4VbK4GUp4KHpst2vS04OXZa351lT9AYVKW5-2FUYeyDPnihaSGwoI8AZz3aAOJsVoy6aS0aI3Gl4IhHEo7gvckbCnigZBWkGg7JnWP2JK2rtJ3CjyQISpCd-2B4icuyCr5w8pRu95ygaGs-2F1RTdyvBKO8H2A9aUXz6wI7qkaOyJzsUsEra7OxCMcg-2BTqZqWvdH8c46Y6yBIrO-2BCChJfGNXBT-2BDuCxoNWd3-2Bw9HVnR777793Qr6O9rgcKFETuvUehw8CXNqj34CAxEHO8LBsIpzsJDrPO3IPdc4CFiKxLi9dsmkBaujQdZ8sNrK-2FcxL8l-2B-2Fz8atD9P0-2FTXO9PNV63uvuP0onBdFk8zitwKFEw-2FesBM3MUTz1ifdmKKOgGMaW-2BQ4Z5sUeFCfi6MrFTRA6klRBdpnfR2b6i8Uqac0CR-2FiLjgmMj4nCkQ-3D-3D)

Education is a top priority for Marylanders and I am focused on delivering solutions to make sure that every single student can receive the classroom instruction they need to _succeed._
**My Parental Bill of Rights is about empowering parents and protecting students.**
I will fight to guarantee that parents have every opportunity to play an instrumental role in their child’s education.

While I might be running for governor, _I’m still a mom._
And there is nothing more important than our children. They deserve the best education and opportunity that Maryland can help to provide.
[_**I need you behind me to make it happen. Can you make a contribution of $25, $25, $50, $100, or even $250 to help us spread our message and empower parents?**_](https://u21639199.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=DRhu97MwZOafZz0axKBSuHM4TyUiRDjO7WRT-2Bn4igr193XMreDNS7fl2A4g9SL86i-2FQV5YOPuH0GDsJb-2FO7ExsuMR6RZz7-2FUzoqnulJDJIHzmFFJW1hfGzJV-2BJB4KuvT2Dfh_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6rUKzE3Il4xPJKBbG8FSzeS5Y4JN53698WWthoQQoT3sTTwP4fHE5pg4x159-2FInTgFjs33j0Rys0wwQvqUs8tjowGSWKk7YFB0DQYrNUFsairEqVOmpw1KqDjY1hUDlLA3ky0GqXuXwLbUMRGb4iLYwFjwn1WE2YrvXHWNkfghadJf5aPjUI3IivcBWeMHosx8oT1G50RqLl1CoRKREuC9xeMmDG5sMZt72zGSxaMJPnIjnsn4seQfsjsK5fX0093c6tfaF-2Bi6EAEz6YNyKvTyWM8rfd2coMO3XA2h2DCmh7cOAwx21NyHh9PPEv7aASAvRiWPPxoCEIccGNFKdJeEY4TloQ0ec4lzUzZ-2Fuj7zy3h8PzfWXkVeinM-2FPX70fNj4Ci5V7Pnn9c5goJfLJSWeunoYxKy-2FdcSqdE2-2F4VbK4GUp4KHpst2vS04OXZa351lT9AYVKW5-2FUYeyDPnihaSGwoI8AZz3aAOJsVoy6aS0aI3Gl4IhHEo7gvckbCnigZBWkGg7JnWP2JK2rtJ3CjyQISpCd-2B4icuyCr5w8pRu95ygaGs-2F1RTdyvBKO8H2A9aUXz6wI7qkaOyJzsUsEra7OxCMcg-2BTqZqWvdH8c46Y6yBIrO-2BCChJfGNXBT-2BDuCxoNWd3-2Bw9HVnR777793Qr6O9rgcKFETuvUehw8CXNqj34CAxEHO8LBsIpzsJDrPO3IPRA5H9TC4ymuSHtdAECjU7TtNdRwfL0nfxSWotlRNiNC-2FI318nKDaqKmPK1UQjFLv38IMKsm9WUBpYQ9rMh6UgsebEiO01A7qzSb6JNDIFGHT2N-2Fx4SeN-2FDPxzMXfT-2BGznA5DfD-2B5glGLvi8Q0WDovg-3D-3D)

clean_body: | | | | Dear Friend, I wanted you to be the first to know that on Monday we will go live with our first television ad "Parental Rights". Our first ad discusses my Parental Bill of Rights and my commitment to ensuring that Maryland parents are empowered and that all children have the opportunity to receive a world-class education. That means providing real school choice, record funding, and accountability -- with education transparency. Education is a top priority for Marylanders and I am focused on delivering solutions to make sure that every single student can receive the classroom instruction they need to succeed. My Parental Bill of Rights is about empowering parents and protecting students. I will fight to guarantee that parents have every opportunity to play an instrumental role in their child’s education. While I might be running for governor, I’m still a mom. And there is nothing more important than our children. They deserve the best education and opportunity that Maryland can help to provide. As your governor, I’ll fight for our children - all of them. Sincerely, | | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | instagram.com/kellymschulz "Instagram" ---|---|--- Kelly Schulz P.O. Box 6528, Annapolis, MD 21401 Authority: Kelly Schulz for Governor, Inc. Treasurer: Sam Malhotra

name: Beto for Texas
subject: We're turning to you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
We know we can hit our goal in time if folks step up and chip in $5, $10, or whatever you're able.
#
We think you should know this.
While Beto is running a grassroots campaign for the people of Texas, Greg Abbott is relying on mega-donors and corporate energy executives to fund his race.
Just take a look at some recent contributions to his campaign:
→ $1,000,000 from an energy CEO and one of the largest profiteers from the power grid crisis on 6/23/2021.
→ $250,000 from executives of an energy company on 6/30/2021.
→ $100,000 from the CEO of an anti-abortion group on 10/1/2021.
→ $100,000 from an oil CEO on 2/16/2022.
We recently reached out to you about falling $194,685 short of our February fundraising goal. While Greg Abbott might make up that gap by just calling up a mega-donor — we're turning to YOU.
Our end-of-month deadline is coming up tomorrow at midnight, and we know we can hit our goal in time if folks step up and chip in $5, $10, or whatever you're able.
**[Please, will you step up as one of the grassroots donors we need to hit this goal before tomorrow at midnight to help elect Beto and defeat Greg Abbott? Your help could put us over the top.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53565?refcode=ema20220227-1-178151&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=178151%2E444211%2EZaTxQf)**
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53565?refcode=ema20220227-1-178151&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=178151%2E444211%2EZaTxQf)**
When you know that Greg Abbott has accepted MILLIONS from mega-donors, it helps put his campaign finances in context. In the latest TEC filing report, Abbott outraised us by more than $800,000, but his haul came from less than 25,000 donations while we received more than 68,900.
**It's simple: Greg Abbott does not have even _half_ the grassroots support we have.** We're proud to be powered by people, not special interests — we wouldn't have it any other way.
We know you're a dedicated supporter of Beto's campaign, but with our primary election this Tuesday, we need to ask for your help once again:
[Will you join thousands of folks chipping in and help hit our end-of-month goal? We have less than 48 hours to get this done, and Beto's counting on us.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53565?refcode=ema20220227-1-178151&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=178151%2E444211%2EZaTxQf)
Thank you for doing your part,
Beto for Texas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220227-178151-footer&t=22&refcode2=178151_444211_ZaTxQf&akid=178151%2E444211%2EZaTxQf)**

name: Self Reliance Central
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation
[View this message in your browser](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z6h2r89nddtvj688oi81do4r7t6aq22qrfq7iu60_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkpqj3cpiekor9d1jmoqjcd9jm5p78cdjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbor3db6edj65c74sloracjj69qmeo5ncprb0pdkmpgn3dbm6th73c34m1iecppgsv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66lgbbc37mpgmcd32mdgefc5lclp238h1e8he4933c5hm0o34c1j68oh5u)
This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zi0i35kj936at67ggvjmp2d1pd1a4t4psitglf2g_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c1g68o36chh2bs) Dear Fellow American,
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.
A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.
That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.**
By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.
You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below:
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z6vec6saefme4bkesdrr3r7u9es6e23u15skv578_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c1g68o36chh2bs)**
For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.
**But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.**
This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.
Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states.
These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College.
**And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.**
So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.
**You can take the survey using this secure link I 've provided below:**
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zr62jrcl97g5jnpr3g92euhl7p9o13veg8bg8oao_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c1g68o36chh2bs)**
And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.
Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.
Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Self Reliance Central, [please use this preferences page](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/prefs/9z2zsjh3bp50012lqs7panurmtmu2lu35d9mt8ah4u8).
1602 Belle View Blvd #381, Alexandria, VA 22307

[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zr2idhnvh1cut8fnisfrcj1guisj8itk54vnlvl8_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c1g68o36chh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

But who he hangs out with speaks for itself. While running against Governor Newsom last year, Kiley headlined a Recall Road Trip with fellow extremists, including: “Dr.” Cordie Williams, who touted ivermectin as a COVID cure (yes, the drug commonly used to deworm horses) and after Jan. 6 called on Americans to arm themselves for a civil war, Scott Presler, who worked as the national strategist for the largest anti-Muslim hate group in the country, and; QAnon-promoter Buzz Patterson who hosted a rally where speakers referenced Democrats being possessed by demons and attendees called for all Democrats to be killed.** Kiley gave the longest speech of the rally, and stuck around to sell and sign copies of his book afterward. Now, Kiley is gaining steam in the race to represent California’s 3rd District in Congress. body:
This is why we must win in Vermont.

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=117%2E61531%2ECKnPx_)
Hello,
We’ll be brief, but we’re hoping we can count on you to join our grassroots movement to elect Peter Welch as Vermont’s next senator by [**making a contribution before tomorrow’s fundraising deadline**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1458?t=3&akid=117%2E61531%2ECKnPx_), and we’ve got two words why:
Mitch McConnell.
Vermont could very well be the difference between passing the progressive agenda America needs and Mitch McConnell once again controlling the Senate. He already causes enough of a problem as the Minority Leader, but if Republicans can somehow wrestle back the majority this fall? We can say goodbye to the most progressive pieces of President Biden’s agenda.
The good news is there’s still more than enough time to make a difference in this Senate race, and donations made at this point in our campaign go much further than any donations made as we’re approaching the finish line. So by joining this grassroots coalition today, you’re going above and beyond to ensure we’ve got what it takes to push Peter over the top.
[**If you’re able, please consider pitching in to Peter Welch’s Senate campaign before midnight on Tuesday. With your support, we can help win Peter this Senate seat and keep Mitch McConnell’s Republicans in the minority.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1458?t=4&akid=117%2E61531%2ECKnPx_)

* **First,** the _Detroit Free Press_ identified MI-11 as "an expensive, bruising race" — motivating our opponent to pour even more money into outraising and defeating Andy.
* **Then,** an independent poll released showed Andy and his opponent virtually tied for the new Eleventh, making this anyone’s race to win.
* **Now,** Team Levin must stand up for our progressive values, continue fighting for working families, and put our best foot forward come November.

clean_body: With redistricting in play, our potential opponents and right-wing operatives will stop at nothing to try and diminish the progressive agenda – something that Andy and Michiganders strongly believe in. | | | | | Peter, We wanted to give you a quick overview of where things stand in our race for Michigan’s new Eleventh District, and why it’s so important we come together to hit our crucial end-of-month deadline. First, the Detroit Free Press identified MI-11 as "an expensive, bruising race" — motivating our opponent to pour even more money into outraising and defeating Andy. Then, an independent poll released showed Andy and his opponent virtually tied for the new Eleventh, making this anyone’s race to win. Now,** Team Levin must stand up for our progressive values, continue fighting for working families, and put our best foot forward come November. = Andy Levin is the best candidate to serve Michigan’s new Eleventh District, but now is the time to show the world why that is. Our movement is powered by generous and passionate grassroots supporters like you, and none of this work can get done without your help. Think about how much we could accomplish if everyone reading this email gave $3, $5, or even $10 today – even small amounts can make a big difference. = Let’s go! I'm excited to announce that that my campaign was selected by the National Republican Congressional Committee to be included in the [Young Guns "On the Radar" list](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=666f20a2b8&e=fc83fb200d).

I'm honored to be a part of the NRCC's Young Guns program, and I'm even more excited to be a part of a huge Republican victory this November.

Across the nation, we are poised to reclaim our majority in the House of Representatives and put an end to Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi's radical left-wing agenda. I am working tirelessly every day to give you the representation you deserve, but **_I can't do it without your help._**

name: Matt Castelli
subject: This is a critical moment for us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Castelli for Congress
body:
We are at a critical moment in our campaign. For years, we’ve watched as Trump praised Putin and all he’s “accomplished” for Russia while actively undermining America’s commitment to Europe and NATO.
| Team!

We are at a critical moment in our campaign. For years, we’ve watched as Trump praised Putin and all he’s “accomplished” for Russia while actively undermining America’s commitment to Europe and NATO.

**_Today, as we watch Putin invade Ukraine, Elise Stefanik stands with Trump and Mike Pompeo as they praise Putin and his actions, instead of standing with the US, our partners, and our allies in responding to Russia’s unprovoked and unjustified attack._**

**[That’s why it’s imperative for us to win in November. Putin is a war criminal and Elise Stefanik did nothing but stand by Trump as he supported Putin’s efforts. Please, help us defeat Stefanik by making a donation to our campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42316761/332500710/935293314?amount=25&refcode=MC_EM_FR_3MO_220227_1_5&refcode2=85d07a10-f797-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWQwN2ExMC1mNzk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ct90Zh2d4VEJDxYgmeUNJVMHE946us2U729C_HSITyU=)**

**FIRST:** The Washington State legislature officially approved a new congressional map. 20% of Kim's constituents are new to the district, and our race is now even more competitive.

**THEN:** Election experts at _Sabato's Crystal Ball_ and _The Cook Political Report_ have named WA-08 a 'toss-up."

**NOW:** We're facing our end-of-month fundraising deadline, and since February is the shortest month of the year, we have less time to reach our goal. **[Will you chip in before our deadline tomorrow night to help us reach Kim's new constituents and win this "toss-up" race?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42324381/332536761/1260920030?refcode=em22_220227_eom4_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220227_eom4_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWI2MjZmZi0yMDk4LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vhjH05HloUeC1UQIOob3yfQ3XLsa8-cUFhGdwMxNo0Q=)**

Peter – we can't afford to come up short of our goal. After redistricting, WA-08 not only remains the most competitive district in the state, but it will be one of the closest races in the entire country. It's clear that we're in for our toughest race yet.

Kim doesn't accept a dime of corporate PAC money. Instead, she's counting on this grassroots team's support to reach this crucial end-of-month goal to ensure she has the resources to reach new voters and protect her seat this November.

**[Rush a donation of $5 or more before our deadline at midnight tomorrow to help re-elect Kim and defend our Democratic House majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42324382/332536763/1260920030?refcode=em22_220227_eom4_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220227_eom4_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWI2MjZmZi0yMDk4LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vhjH05HloUeC1UQIOob3yfQ3XLsa8-cUFhGdwMxNo0Q=)**

Team Schrier

name: Team Cooper
subject: The choice is simple.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Either we defend our democracy, or we watch it fail. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42316881/332500914/823540626?refcode=ea.fa787516-f797-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.fa787516-f797-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTc4NzUxNi1mNzk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rMbvco5j6S32DVLYLkq5qpNE060sMPnD88FT_9Gxmv8=&emci=afe2b736-6e96-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=fa787516-f797-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=1049176)
**Peter, in recent years we’ve repeatedly been confronted by the fact that American democracy — even in the 21st century — is fragile.** Its survival relies on vigilance, on patriotism, and on courage. And when elections take place, it relies on putting country over party no matter the result. Too many Republicans have failed in that duty and lack that courage. This is what it comes down to, Peter: Democrats will uphold the will of the people — full stop. The GOP will only consider elections valid that keep them in power. **The choice is simple. clean_body: Either we defend our democracy, or we watch it fail. | Peter, in recent years we’ve repeatedly been confronted by the fact that American democracy — even in the 21st century — is fragile. Its survival relies on vigilance, on patriotism, and on courage. And when elections take place, it relies on putting country over party no matter the result. Too many Republicans have failed in that duty and lack that courage. This is what it comes down to, Peter: Democrats will uphold the will of the people — full stop. The GOP will only consider elections valid that keep them in power. The choice is simple. Either we defend our democracy, or we watch it fail. name: Tobias Read
subject: Black history is Oregon history
body:
As the month ends, let’s remember that Black history is American history. It’s Oregon history.
---
| | Dear Peter, Black History Month is a time to educate and reflect on the historic contributions of Black Oregonians and Americans to our society, a time to ask ourselves what we’ve done and are doing to make sure that the Oregon of tomorrow is more equitable than the Oregon of today, while also celebrating Black Oregonians and their contributions to the state. I am proud to recognize **[the many Black leaders stepping forward to make our state better.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42324780/332537959/-1093587437?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODExOTI2YS0yMTk4LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oRK47IHgwqihVYM64m_qhzBIF9BIxJZgMHl3ofElbsA=&emci=3711926a-2198-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=3811926a-2198-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=30662126)** I’m running for Governor because I believe we need a more equitable, just and fair state. And I will draw upon this leadership and the skills in their respective fields to solve the many pressing issues facing our state. Despite well-meaning efforts over the last 30 years, **[Black students are still being disproportionately left behind in our schools.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42324783/332537961/1103017804?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODExOTI2YS0yMTk4LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oRK47IHgwqihVYM64m_qhzBIF9BIxJZgMHl3ofElbsA=&emci=3711926a-2198-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=3811926a-2198-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=30662126)** As Governor, I will do everything in my power to raise literacy and graduation rates, and make higher education, job training and apprenticeships more accessible for Black students. Our goal must be a workforce that matches our student population. But it’s more than just schools. Rising housing costs and gentrification are pushing people of color out of their neighborhoods, straining household budgets, and widening the wealth gap. As the month ends, let’s remember that Black history is American history. It’s Oregon history. And that means that we must recognize and teach it year round, and work for a more equitable Oregon 365 days a year. I hope you’ll join me in making the same commitment. Thanks,

---

I am proud to recognize I’m running for Governor because I believe we need a more equitable, just and fair state. And I will draw upon this leadership and the skills in their respective fields to solve the many pressing issues facing our state. Despite well-meaning efforts over the last 30 years, As Governor, I will do everything in my power to raise literacy and graduation rates, and make higher education, job training and apprenticeships more accessible for Black students. Our goal must be a workforce that matches our student population. But it’s more than just schools. Rising housing costs and gentrification are pushing people of color out of their neighborhoods, straining household budgets, and widening the wealth gap. As the month ends, let’s remember that Black history is American history. It’s Oregon history. And that means that we must recognize and teach it year round, and work for a more equitable Oregon 365 days a year. I hope you’ll join me in making the same commitment. Thanks, * | = | | | | | | | | | Friends of Tobias Read PO Box 42307 Portland, OR 97242 United States

body:
| | |

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42324927/332538688/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk711-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZGQxNmJhZC0yMTk4LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y2h-hg0bl9yVoMRJQNF5fdku-1yPsoSCwc-NcknA8h4=)
Peter,

In just 100 days, we will face the biggest hurdle thus far in our campaign to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA) and expand our Democratic Senate majority: our primary election.
Look, I'm not going to beat around the bush, Peter. The Senate just can't get the job done for the American people with control split right down the middle.

We've got to go on the offensive and retire those like Sen. Grassley, who's been in Washington 47 years (too damn long, in my opinion!) and has turned his back on the people he's supposed to serve. We've got to _defeat_ vulnerable Republican incumbents and usher in a real, working majority that will deliver for the American people.
**I will be the candidate to do just that. Nobody will work harder than I will to defeat Sen. Grassley. With your help, come Election Day, we can do it.**
**First, we've got to give this grassroots movement everything we've got over the next 100 days and _win this primary. _As a member of this team, I know how much you care about flipping this seat blue and expanding our Senate majority. That's why I have to ask: [Will you donate $5 or more right now to get us through this primary and defeat Sen. Grassley? Every dollar you give ensures we have the resources to compete and _win_ over the next 100 days.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42324928/332538690/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk711-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZGQxNmJhZC0yMTk4LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y2h-hg0bl9yVoMRJQNF5fdku-1yPsoSCwc-NcknA8h4=)**
I've been proud to serve the people of Iowa since I was just 25 years old. First in the state legislature, and then in Congress, where I was the youngest woman to flip a House seat from red to blue _and_ pass legislation through the House – during a government shutdown, as a matter of fact!
Come November, with your help, we won't just defeat Sen. Grassley – who is running for his _eighth _consecutive Senate term. We'll send the youngest woman to the United States Senate, where I promise to lift up the voices of working families like the one I come from. To _fight_ for the working families who don't have a fighter in Sen. Grassley.
Here's the thing, though. The campaign arm of the Senate Republicans has already attacked me, and they're sitting on $39 million to keep on attacking competitive challengers like me. I don't need $39 million worth of wealthy donor money to win, and I don't want it. What I need is you, Peter. Donating $10, $20, $50 at a time, I know we can win.
**[So please, can I count on you to help me raise another $10,000 by donating $5 or more right now? With our primary 100 days out, we need resources now to stay competitive and defeat Sen. Grassley come November.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42324930/332538691/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk711-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZGQxNmJhZC0yMTk4LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y2h-hg0bl9yVoMRJQNF5fdku-1yPsoSCwc-NcknA8h4=)**
