name: Pat Clark,  Keystone Progress
subject: And the winner of the February Marjorie Taylor Greene Award is...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
Dear Friend,

And the winner of the February Marjorie Taylor Greene Award is...David McCormick!

This repugnant, wealthy, power-hungry Republican candidate for U.S. Senate was a favorite for an award reserved for only the most odious of Pennsylvanians.

He's a grade A Trump brown-noser who lied through his teeth in a recent Super Bowl ad against the backdrop of crowds chanting "Let's go Brandon." At his last job leading a hedge fund, McCormick invested a ton of cash in China, something even other conservatives pooh-pooh. Even Dr. Oz went after him accusing him of outsourcing jobs from Pittsburgh to India when he was CEO of FreeMarkets, since he eliminated around 50 Pittsburgh-based jobs.

Also, he only recently moved to PA from Connecticut! This is not a guy who's in touch with the will of the people of our state. If he wins, we'll just be replacing Sen. Pat Toomey with another tool of the privileged right.

After so much doubt sowed in the electoral system here in PA by other members of his party, we need to fight extra hard to empower voters with everything they need to make sure their votes count.

Please donate today to help us organize and mobilize voters to make sure this guy and others like him stay out of the Senate.
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=022722mtg]

Thank you for standing up for what's right,

Patrick Clark
Keystone Progress

https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/ [https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/]

Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www.kpef.info. Not affiliated with any candidate or candidate's committees.

Keystone Progress
354 S Atlantic Ave
Pittsburgh, PA 15224

name: MalcolmKenyatta.com
subject: A leap of faith
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
With our primary less than 80 days away, we’ve got to do everything we can to put Malcolm’s story in front of as many voters as possible
#

Hey folks,
It’s Vanessa, Malcolm’s campaign manager. I made a very difficult decision during our team’s budget meeting yesterday.
It became clear that in order for us to continue growing our coalition across all of Pennsylvania’s 67 counties, we need to scale up our investments in digital advertising immediately.
That money isn’t in our Q1 budget, but I gave the expense the green light anyway.
It’s a big risk, I know. But with our primary less than 80 days away, we’ve got to do everything we can to put Malcolm’s story in front of as many voters as possible.
So I took a leap of faith, team. I made a bet that if I asked, you would come through to help us fill the gap. And I’m really hoping you will. For Malcolm and all the Pennsylvania families counting on us.
[Can you make a $3 contribution to Malcolm’s campaign before our deadline tomorrow night? Every donation today will help fill the budget gap we created by greenlighting an important investment in our campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42325253/332539874/-358086307?refcode2=4d227933-2498-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&refcode=em220227-1-15d&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDIyNzkzMy0yNDk4LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=soEvERyG_bXv8rau65dPWhM5p5yKM_jFhFaqdGYcgic=)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42325254/332539875/-358086307?refcode2=4d227933-2498-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&refcode=em220227-1-15d&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDIyNzkzMy0yNDk4LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=soEvERyG_bXv8rau65dPWhM5p5yKM_jFhFaqdGYcgic=)**
Like I said, it was a tough choice, but I made it knowing this team always has Malcolm’s back, and I’m extremely grateful for that. Thanks for all you do.
In solidarity,
Vanessa

Nevada’s 3rd Congressional District isn’t just the most competitive race in the state – it’s one of the most competitive House races in the entire country.
We’ve already seen a huge influx of money _($1.5 million!)_ spent attacking Susie and the GOP is just getting started.
Our team is working to show national Republicans that this is one toss-up race that won’t be theirs for the taking. But after the lack of response we’ve seen from our end-of-month fundraising efforts, that strategy is getting further out of reach, team.
If we want to reach our goal before Monday’s deadline, we’re going to need this to be one of our best emails yet.

name: Team Booker
subject: Help us make history in Kentucky
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

This is it, Peter.

There are less than 48 hours until our end-of-month fundraising deadline
tomorrow at midnight. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/16786?refcode=em20220227-1608&t=1001&akid=1608%2E346206%2EihLUYa ]Will you chip in $4.80 or anything you can afford
to our campaign to help us hit this critical goal? →

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/16786?refcode=em20220227-1608&t=1002&akid=1608%2E346206%2EihLUYa ]Contribute $4.80

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/16786?refcode=em20220227-1608&t=1003&akid=1608%2E346206%2EihLUYa ][IMG]

Peter, all
across Kentucky our movement to replace Rand Paul is rising up.

Here’s a Charles Booker yard sign we saw out in the wild the other day on
our road trip across Kentucky to meet voters!

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/16786?refcode=em20220227-1608&t=1004&akid=1608%2E346206%2EihLUYa ][IMG]

It’s clear that Kentucky is hungry for the bold, progressive vision that
Charles Booker is fighting for this election. From passing Medicare for
All to electing a Senator that understands firsthand what it’s like to
stand in the unemployment line — we have a historic opportunity to enact
meaningful change and center everyday people in our politics.

But now it’s critical we continue growing this momentum leading up to the
election and make sure we have the grassroots power to overcome Rand’s
dark money.

Your $4.80 donation today will help us:

* Train our organizers so we can effectively (and directly) reach out to
voters in all 120 counties of our Commonwealth
* Hire key campaign staff to expand our capacity
* Acquire digital tools so we can get our message out to millions of
Kentuckians
* Provide PPE for our campaign office
* Reimburse our organizers for gas as they travel across Kentucky
* Organize phone call and texting banks to talk to voters

Unlike Rand Paul, we don’t accept a single cent from corporate PACs or
special interests. That’s why it’s critical we reach our February goal
tomorrow night and ensure our team has the funds we need to make history
in Kentucky.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/16786?refcode=em20220227-1608&t=1024&akid=1608%2E346206%2EihLUYa ]So if you’re ready to rise up in this fight, can we count on you to
make a $4.80 donation right now to our campaign and help us reach our
goal? We rely on people just like you, reading emails like this, to power
our movement.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/16786?refcode=em20220227-1608&t=1025&akid=1608%2E346206%2EihLUYa ]Contribute $4.80

Thank you,

Team Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220227-1608-footer&t=1026&refcode2=1608_346206_ihLUYa&akid=1608%2E346206%2EihLUYa

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1608%2E346206%2EihLUYa

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Mark Kelly
subject: a new mission
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42325987/332542647/-1087597766?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1660-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTlhODRmNy0yNzk4LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gCBk7npPKKaD9OyFrpd4-zjYwS1UR-V2WiCRg4lJsJE=) Friend – I have about 15 minutes of free time in my schedule today. I know that doesn’t sound like a lot of time, but with a schedule like mine I can assure you it’s a gift. **I want to take a few of those minutes to tell you about my decision to run for Senate in the first place, and ask you to split a donation between my re-election campaign and Jacky Rosen's ****campaign.** Your support is so important to our success.
The truth is, when Gabby and I first started talking about running, we weren’t sure what to expect. We knew that Arizona needed new leadership in the Senate — someone who would always put the people of our state first, who was willing to work across the aisle to deliver real results, and who would prioritize building bridges between parties — not burning them down.
We also knew we had some friends who would help us out. But when you’re talking about such a big campaign, we’d need support from a lot of people we hadn’t met yet as well.
You know the rest... We won in 2020 in large part because we ran the biggest grassroots campaign Arizona has ever seen.
**But now we have a new mission: re-election. ****And right now, the polls are really tight. If we’re going to win again and keep control of the Senate, it’s going to take a similar level of grassroots support from people like you.**
**[So please, friend: Will you split a $5 contribution between my re-election campaign and Jacky Rosen's? clean_body: | | | = Friend – I have about 15 minutes of free time in my schedule today. I know that doesn’t sound like a lot of time, but with a schedule like mine I can assure you it’s a gift. I want to take a few of those minutes to tell you about my decision to run for Senate in the first place, and ask you to split a donation between my re-election campaign and Jacky Rosen's campaign. Your support is so important to our success. The truth is, when Gabby and I first started talking about running, we weren’t sure what to expect. We knew that Arizona needed new leadership in the Senate — someone who would always put the people of our state first, who was willing to work across the aisle to deliver real results, and who would prioritize building bridges between parties — not burning them down. We also knew we had some friends who would help us out. But when you’re talking about such a big campaign, we’d need support from a lot of people we hadn’t met yet as well. You know the rest... We won in 2020 in large part because we ran the biggest grassroots campaign Arizona has ever seen. But now we have a new mission: re-election. And right now, the polls are really tight. If we’re going to win again and keep control of the Senate, it’s going to take a similar level of grassroots support from people like you. = Thank you again. For everything. Mark Kelly | | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Hello,
Russian state media is now airing clips from Fox News of people like Donald Trump and Tucker Carlson praising Vladimir Putin.
When I was an admiral in the U.S. Navy and the commander of all U.S. forces in East Africa, I requested that Fox News be turned off in the mess halls during meal hours. Its lie-filled propaganda was a national security threat to my troops’ ability to carry out our mission.
I’ve seen the real-life consequences of disinformation and media lies that are manufactured and repeated by people like Donald Trump and his acolytes like my opponent Chuck Grassley. And as January 6th showed, it is a threat to our very democracy.
It will take significant campaign funding to fight back against all of the lies Fox News and Mitch McConnell’s Super PACs are going to tell about me. That’s why we’ve set a goal of raising $300,000 before our end-of-month deadline at midnight tomorrow.
Right now, we are still falling a little short, but with the help of grassroots donors like you now, we can defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue:
[**Please, will you give $5 or more right now – whatever you can afford before our critical end-of-month deadline – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42326195/332544559/-42398318?refcode=em20220227pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZWI0MGM2MS0yOTk4LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Bz4usXQyD_MPATj0bGxZJHGb6H1pP-CjZlBsneDzxfc=)

clean_body: Hello, Russian state media is now airing clips from Fox News of people like Donald Trump and Tucker Carlson praising Vladimir Putin. When I was an admiral in the U.S. Navy and the commander of all U.S. forces in East Africa, I requested that Fox News be turned off in the mess halls during meal hours. Its lie-filled propaganda was a national security threat to my troops’ ability to carry out our mission. I’ve seen the real-life consequences of disinformation and media lies that are manufactured and repeated by people like Donald Trump and his acolytes like my opponent Chuck Grassley. And as January 6th showed, it is a threat to our very democracy. It will take significant campaign funding to fight back against all of the lies Fox News and Mitch McConnell’s Super PACs are going to tell about me. That’s why we’ve set a goal of raising $300,000 before our end-of-month deadline at midnight tomorrow. Just like running for Congress, preparing to run a half marathon is no easy feat. I set a goal to run 100 miles before the big race, and have had the pleasure to run in so many beautiful landscapes and communities across New Mexico, like Albuquerque, Socorro, Santa Fe, and my own town of Las Cruces.
Between you and me, I’m a few dozen miles behind on my goal — **and we’re a couple thousand dollars short of our February fundraising goal.**
[**While I keep on running (literally and for Congress!), can you rush a grassroots donation of $10 or whatever you can to help us reach our goal before tomorrow’s deadline?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42319563/332512132/-900430888?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220227eom4running_gv_60da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNmMzZjVmYy1mZjk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-QCkY5-AZTeh_K9oSb0Iri7ieABjTU-foFtfDc1vyvo=)

clean_body: | = Hey team, If you know me, you know I love running. Every morning, I start my day with a run alongside my dog Suki, and this month I’ve been training to run a half marathon in March. | = Just like running for Congress, preparing to run a half marathon is no easy feat. I set a goal to run 100 miles before the big race, and have had the pleasure to run in so many beautiful landscapes and communities across New Mexico, like Albuquerque, Socorro, Santa Fe, and my own town of Las Cruces. Between you and me, I’m a few dozen miles behind on my goal — and we’re a couple thousand dollars short of our February fundraising goal. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for each and every thing you do to fuel this campaign and help me become NM-02’s next representative in Congress. — Gabe | Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American and former City Councilor running for Congress to challenge Yvette Herrell and fight for New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District. name: PramilaForCongress.com
subject: Additional organizing work in 2022
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
This month, Pramila has been laser-focused on fighting to deliver for the people, advocating for action to address climate change, and hitting the campaign trail to elect progressives and protect the Democratic majority.
#
Peter, we wanted to give you a quick update on how our fundraising for the month is going before the big deadline tomorrow at midnight. But before we dive into the details, **[can you chip in $3 and help us get even closer to our February goal?](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/10855?refcode=em20220227-1064&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=1064%2E420207%2E5hcKde)**
**[Chip in $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/10855?refcode=em20220227-1064&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=1064%2E420207%2E5hcKde)**
This month, Pramila has been laser-focused on fighting to deliver for the people, advocating for action to address climate change, and hitting the campaign trail to elect progressives and protect the Democratic majority.
But unfortunately, our fundraising has fallen behind during February — the shortest month of the year. Usually, we'd be 95% of the way to hitting our contribution goal for any given month by now — but as of today, we're only 86% of the way to our goal.
Given our additional organizing work during this election year, and more big fights on the horizon, we must meet our fundraising goal of 2,500 individual contributions before the end of the month. As a grassroots, people-first campaign that doesn't take a dime of corporate PAC money, we fully rely on donations from people like you to power our progress.
Our average online contribution this year is just a bit over the magic $27 number — it’s $28.68. Some folks give more, some folks give less, but all donations go directly to paying for our organizing tools and amplifying Pramila's work in Congress. [**Will you chip in whatever you're able to and help us get closer to our February fundraising goal of 2,500 individual contributions before midnight tomorrow?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/10855?refcode=em20220227-1064&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=1064%2E420207%2E5hcKde)
**[Chip in $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/10855?refcode=em20220227-1064&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=1064%2E420207%2E5hcKde)**
Thanks for helping us get on track and closer to meeting our critical goal.
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220227-1064-footer&t=23&refcode2=1064_420207_5hcKde&akid=1064%2E420207%2E5hcKde)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=24&akid=1064%2E420207%2E5hcKde)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=1064%2E420207%2E5hcKde)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: Team Cheri Beasley
subject: April 27, 2021
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
Cheri’s race could be the difference between passing voting rights reform, expanding access to health care, and action on climate change.
#

**April 27, 2021**
That was the day Cheri Beasley launched this campaign for Senate in North Carolina.
It was a historic and exciting moment, and since then tens of thousands of people have donated to help us flip this seat. It’s why Cheri stands as our presumptive nominee, and now together, we have to tackle our toughest challenge yet: the general election.
People like you giving what they can, when they can is how we raise the resources it takes to win — not a dime of corporate PAC money.
That means we need you today, to be a part of this, to make a donation to support Cheri Beasley for Senate. Because we’re facing a critical deadline on Monday and Cheri cannot win this race alone. So we’re asking:
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to Cheri Beasley’s campaign before our end-of-month fundraising deadline? We would not ask if it were not important.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-feb22?refcode=em220227-1-ma&refcode2=467.357359.Rikp_j&t=1&akid=467%2E357359%2ERikp_j)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-feb22?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em220227-1-ma&refcode2=467.357359.Rikp_j&t=20&akid=467%2E357359%2ERikp_j)**
---
****
| **[Donate $10](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-feb22?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em220227-1-ma&refcode2=467.357359.Rikp_j&t=21&akid=467%2E357359%2ERikp_j)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $20.22](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-feb22?express_lane=true&amount=20.22&refcode=em220227-1-ma&refcode2=467.357359.Rikp_j&t=22&akid=467%2E357359%2ERikp_j)**
---
****
| **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-feb22?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em220227-1-ma&refcode2=467.357359.Rikp_j&t=23&akid=467%2E357359%2ERikp_j)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-feb22?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em220227-1-ma&refcode2=467.357359.Rikp_j&t=24&akid=467%2E357359%2ERikp_j)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-feb22?express_lane=true&refcode=em220227-1-ma&refcode2=467.357359.Rikp_j&t=25&akid=467%2E357359%2ERikp_j)**
---
****
Thank you for chipping in. We are so proud of our people-powered campaign.
Cheri’s vote in the Senate could be the difference between passing voting rights reform, expanding access to health care, and taking meaningful action on climate change. That’s what your support will make possible!
\- Team Beasley
**[CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-feb22?refcode=em220227-1-ma&refcode2=467.357359.Rikp_j&t=26&akid=467%2E357359%2ERikp_j)**

Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
PO Box 28778
Raleigh, NC 27611
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you want to receive fewer emails, you may [submit this form to get only our most important updates](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=27&akid=467%2E357359%2ERikp_j). Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.cheribeasley.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=467%2E357359%2ERikp_j). If you would like to support Cheri's campaign for the U.S. Senate in North Carolina, please consider [making a donation](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beasley-em-2021?refcode=em-footer&t=29&refcode2=467_357359_Rikp_j&akid=467%2E357359%2ERikp_j) today to help us make history.

We have made great progress – **We are on TV with our ad about securing the border by deploying the National Guard and creating a Border Strike Force to go after the cartels. ** This deadline is critical to maintain that momentum and keep our ads on the air! This has been a HUGE month for our campaign, Peter. First, **Rep. Katie Porter** endorsed our campaign, recognizing that “Dr. Caraveo is a trusted leader and a true reformer....[who] will be a strong fighter for families and a critical voice to protect the future of our democracy.” Then, **Rep. Kim Schrier** — a fellow pediatrician and current Congresswoman from WA-08 — also threw her support behind Dr. Caraveo. Because what’s the only thing better than a pediatrician winning a competitive seat to help Democrats hold the House in November? Doing it _twice_ in the same year. clean_body: | = This has been a HUGE month for our campaign, Peter. First, Rep. Katie Porter endorsed our campaign, recognizing that “Dr. Caraveo is a trusted leader and a true reformer....[who] will be a strong fighter for families and a critical voice to protect the future of our democracy.” Then, Rep. Kim Schrier — a fellow pediatrician and current Congresswoman from WA-08 — also threw her support behind Dr. Caraveo. Because what’s the only thing better than a pediatrician winning a competitive seat to help Democrats hold the House in November? Doing it twice in the same year. Finally, our campaign was honored and humbled to be endorsed by incredible organizations doing impactful work all across the country: Latino Victory Fund , PODER PAC , and End Citizens United joined Emily’s List, 314 Action, Elect Democratic Women, Defend the Vote, and more than 40 Colorado elected officials to support Dr. Caraveo’s historic campaign for working families. | = Momentum is building, Peter — and we’re going to need it. This race is one of the most competitive in the country this year , and winning this seat is CRITICAL to Democrats’ hopes of keeping control of the House of Representatives. I'm sorry to crowd your inbox, friend, but I wouldn't bump my last message if it weren't critical to defeating Marco Rubio.
My finance team tells me that even after a small surge in grassroots donations to my campaign over the last few hours, I'm still short of my midnight fundraising goal – and at this pace, I may need to make budget cuts if I fall short.
While national Republicans are funneling _upward of $10 million _into this race _ _ to flip Florida red permanently, I simply cannot afford to cut back on resources. **I'm running out of time to fix this, so I'm humbly asking you to act quickly:**
[**Please, rush $5, $25 or whatever you can spare to close my fundraising gap. clean_body: We could hand Senate control straight back to Mitch McConnell | | I'm sorry to crowd your inbox, friend, but I wouldn't bump my last message if it weren't critical to defeating Marco Rubio. My finance team tells me that even after a small surge in grassroots donations to my campaign over the last few hours, I'm still short of my midnight fundraising goal – and at this pace, I may need to make budget cuts if I fall short. While national Republicans are funneling upward of $10 million into this race to flip Florida red permanently, I simply cannot afford to cut back on resources. I'm running out of time to fix this, so I'm humbly asking you to act quickly: = | | = Thank you, thank you, thank you. Val Demings \------- Forwarded message ------- From: Rep. Val Demings Subject: Friend, PLEASE | | | = | | | | DAYS | | HRS | | | MINS | | SECS Friend, I am hours away from my midnight deadline, and I'm still short of my can't-miss goal. My race in Florida is most likely to determine Senate control, so I cannot fall behind on resources. Please, take a look at your supporter record: | | SUPPORTER RECORD EMAIL: dpwillis67@gmail.com DONOR STATUS: PENDING SUGGESTED CONTRIBUTION: $5 DEADLINE: 11:59 p.m. | = The timing – and the sheer consequences – of falling short right now couldn't be more serious. I don't say that lightly. Polling has me down 2 points behind Marco Rubio, just as he and the GOP hauled in more than $28 million to dismantle our Senate majority. If I don't have the resources to narrow this polling gap, we could hand Senate control straight back to Mitch McConnell. With a grassroots team this strong, I know that if we dig deep, we will flip Florida blue. Point-blank, friend: That means hitting my fundraising goal. name: Team Lira
subject: Let’s give it our all
body:
| Peter, we are in the final few days before the primary — our final chance to do everything we can to make John our nominee on March 1. When we started this campaign we decided that we wanted to depend on grassroots energy and the people of this movement to power this fight, instead of million dollar checks from big donors who would then control the decisions made in Washington. And that has resonated with the people of TX-23, because they know they deserve a leader who is going to fight for their interests — and their interests only. These final few days ahead of the primary are our final push to make sure Texans know John’s story and the future that is possible for TX-23 and beyond. **[But, we need your help, Peter. To power our final push and efforts on the ground, will you make a donation of anything you can afford?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42326834/332552257/-1106003019?refcode=em20220227&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxY2Q0MDMwMC0yYzk4LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=54QKdfq8_B3lcSLVYyfmZMUejecsz-Ql5WT_kj4n5K0=)** **[Donate »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42326835/332552258/-1106003019?refcode=em20220227&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxY2Q0MDMwMC0yYzk4LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=54QKdfq8_B3lcSLVYyfmZMUejecsz-Ql5WT_kj4n5K0=)** The more people we have chipping in — whether that’s $300, $30, or $3 — on critical days like these, the stronger this campaign gets and the closer we get to leadership that fights for us. And together — one grassroots donation at a time — we can prove that our grassroots approach is not only the best method, one that puts the people and their needs at the center of our agenda, but a powerful one. In solidarity,

name: Kevin Kiley
subject: Newsom Ends 12 Emergencies
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Congress 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
|
---
* * *
_**A Note to Subscribers**_ __ _Monday is our end-of-month deadline. If you can[chip in by tomorrow](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7Pyuk3g2mp41Qa8XyLKk0CnWqFcPhfo-70bh2d9FGRmWv-G172QGsW76cwQP_qMTr_tK1&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb27_final&n=1) __it will be a great help. This is a crucial time for the campaign and I am beyond grateful for your support._ _-Kevin_
* * *
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [Newsom's Taunt](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQzior6xVeI1KReZAYBCxyqpn7F&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb27_final&n=2) Newsom has announced the State of Emergency will remain in place for the "endemic" phase. This is blatantly illegal. Late Friday morning, I started getting a lot of calls from reporters. Newsom, I was told, had just convened a secret press briefing. It was “embargoed” until 2:30, meaning they weren’t allowed to report anything until then. He’d announced three things. First, he was letting a bunch of Executive Orders expire. Second, he was _continuing_ the emergency. Third, he was ending 12 _other_ emergencies. In a word, he's taunting us. These other emergencies were local matters lasting a few days; apparently, Newsom had forgotten to officially end them. So he made a show of doing so Friday, as if that somehow offset extending the COVID emergency. By the end of the day, I’d gone on every Sacramento TV station to [address Newsom’s ridiculous claim](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Y2eQZKU9Da2NEESJR6CFCm0DgfkmGvl2kG-lD9wfUm_4VngzAdv0srNS_St9HjTsrKzu-zPpn7nzyz9NAt0itnIURPMpoBaTTKlNOucaoFGTLAShvZhEqmk4vI7mvpqbUWVdb72DdgYQqcFYEpVKp5_RWX7pp9w8W6gVnkXMz52zQOHhy38rfjFt1HH2EWbt&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb27_final&n=3) that ending the emergency would “cripple” our COVID response. States across the country have ended their emergencies. They remain uncrippled. The COVID State of Emergency has now lasted 726 days, with a 2-year anniversary on Friday. It has spawned 561 Executive Order provisions. This one-man rule is what Newsom just declared permanent. Thankfully, it’s not up to him. A [lawsuit](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TrV1fnuL6loLmsbQaZeDw_Q1VQwWFWzT9AbNJY2F76o2Vfg6Rv-jTqyh_XPkfjcm1g&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb27_final&n=4) to end the emergency is moving forward and the Legislature will finally debate the matter on March 15. Most importantly, the California public has simply tuned him out. [Help us reach our target by tomorrow](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7Pyuk3g2mp41Qa8XyLKk0CnWqFcPhfo-70bh2d9FGRmWv-G172QGsW76cwQP_qMTr_tK1&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb27_final&n=5) [Share on Social Media](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6lpHI-UVcODcFSdMgu5zpAw0_JE1fBTNsqZendERLd4ZBFCGnYg2dSgDBCRxhNoKpA&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb27_final&n=6) Kevin Kiley
California Legislator
Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Congress 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb27_final&n=7).

name: @DemsOfState
subject: Alex Padilla: “We need to stand up to protect our Democracy.”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25]
Team,
Former California Secretary of State Alex Padilla isn’t giving the GOP any slack for their disgraceful behavior over the past few years.
We think he’s got the right idea – about Trump’s unbelievable influence on the right, and what we need to do to stop them. Check it out: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_022722_B4_AC_30D]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_022722_B4_AC_30D [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_022722_B4_AC_30D]
Our Secretaries of State are the last line of defense when federal legislation fails. With moderate Senators unwilling to end the filibuster, our Secretaries are all that remains. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_022722_B4_AC_30D]
But far-right extremist candidates are trying to take over elections across the country. They have a massive war chest prepared to take down our Democratic Secretaries of State! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_022722_B4_AC_30D]
DASS has set a critical $70,000 February goal to catch up and keep fighting back. We need every supporter to chip in and help us hit it before time runs out! Rush $20 ASAP to join the fight >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_022722_B4_AC_30D]

DASS is a national organization supporting the election of Democratic Secretaries of State who are committed to protecting and preserving voting rights and ballot access for all Americans through fair, honest, open, and accurate elections.
Help us fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda by pitching in today!

name: Team Fetterman
subject: A Very Happy 40th Birthday!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Sign our card to wish the SLoP a very happy birthday.
#
Hey, Derek — we had to drop in with one final quick email today because today is a reeeeeally special day:
**It's Gisele's 40th birthday!**
[**_Will you sign our campaign's official birthday card to wish Gisele Barreto Fetterman, our amazing Second Lady of Pennsylvania (SLoP), a Very Happy 40th Birthday?_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/happy-bday-gisele-2022/?refcode=em20220227-4767&t=1&akid=4767%2E434096%2EF9arYX)
[**__**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/happy-bday-gisele-2022/?refcode=em20220227-4767&t=2&akid=4767%2E434096%2EF9arYX)
**[Sign Gisele's Card](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/happy-bday-gisele-2022/?refcode=em20220227-4767&t=3&akid=4767%2E434096%2EF9arYX)**
Signing the card just takes a sec — and there's even a place to leave Gisele a heartfelt message if you want. We'll gather all the signatures + messages at the very end of the night and make sure she gets a chance to read them.
[**_Sign the card to wish Gisele a Very Happy 40th Birthday._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/happy-bday-gisele-2022/?refcode=em20220227-4767&t=4&akid=4767%2E434096%2EF9arYX)
Thank you,
Team Fetterman
P.S. Our campaign has a really big deadline coming up tomorrow at midnight, but we thought it was important to make some space to send this card for Gisele, because family always comes first. [**_But if you can, it'd be a HUGE help if you could sign the card and then donate maybe $4.00? Or really anything you can. Thank you._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/happy-bday-gisele-2022/?refcode=em20220227-4767&t=5&akid=4767%2E434096%2EF9arYX)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220227-4767-footer&t=6&refcode2=4767_434096_F9arYX&akid=4767%2E434096%2EF9arYX)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=7&akid=4767%2E434096%2EF9arYX)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=4767%2E434096%2EF9arYX)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Alexis Nielson
subject: Down to the wire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nan Whaley
body:
Team,
Tomorrow night, we’re hitting our February deadline, folks – and this team is stepping up.
But we still have a ways to go, and just 28 hours left to make it happen.
**[I know we can defeat Mike DeWine and end the corruption in Columbus – but doing so starts with making sure we hit every goal along the way. Please, chip in $10 ahead of our end-of-month deadline to help us win.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42327104/332565597/-528457057?refcode=nw_em_220227_2_t2_b&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNWMwZGNjMC0zMTk4LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BZ6tPttlJSf1V7MrMoBVzfUrR7JEg1FO23e0ac7oIJE=)**
Winning this race is going to take every single one of us stepping up in every way we can: Talking with our friends and family. Reaching out to our neighbors. Making sure we have the resources we need to talk with Ohio voters and get out the word about this historic campaign.
As finance director, my job is to make sure that we have those resources. If we keep hitting our goals, our grassroots team will be able to take on the DeWine machine.
**[We’re down to the wire this month, team, and we need your help. Rush $10 ahead of tomorrow night’s deadline and help elect Nan as Ohio’s next governor.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42327106/332565599/-528457057?refcode=nw_em_220227_2_t2_b&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNWMwZGNjMC0zMTk4LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BZ6tPttlJSf1V7MrMoBVzfUrR7JEg1FO23e0ac7oIJE=)**
Thank you,
Alexis Nielson
Finance Director
Friends of Nan Whaley

name: Mark Kelly
subject: my decision
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42327099/332565543/1835235496?refcode=dd_em_220227_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMmMwZGNjMC0zMTk4LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YsQT3WH3prewWV7TbL5HkPJqiNLUp2HS4rwJQzwA5Qw=)
Peter,
I have about 15 minutes of free time in my schedule today. I know that doesn’t sound like a lot of time, but with a schedule like mine I can assure you it’s a gift.
I want to take a few of those minutes to tell you about my decision to run for Senate in the first place, and ask you to split a donation between my re-election campaign and Dick Durbin's campaign. Your support is so important to our success.
The truth is, when Gabby and I first started talking about running, we weren’t sure what to expect. We knew that Arizona needed new leadership in the Senate — someone who would always put the people of our state first, who was willing to work across the aisle to deliver real results, and who would prioritize building bridges between parties — not burning them down.
We also knew we had some friends who would help us out. But when you’re talking about such a big campaign, we’d need support from a lot of people we hadn’t met yet as well. Especially since I was making the decision to reject corporate PAC money.
You know the rest... we won in 2020 in large part because we ran the biggest grassroots campaign Arizona has ever seen.
And right now, the polls are really tight. If we’re going to win again and keep control of the Senate, it’s going to take a similar level of grassroots support from people like you.
So please:
**[Will you split a $5 contribution between my re-election campaign and Dick Durbin's? We can’t win and protect our Senate majority without your support.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42327100/332565552/1835235496?refcode=dd_em_220227_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMmMwZGNjMC0zMTk4LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YsQT3WH3prewWV7TbL5HkPJqiNLUp2HS4rwJQzwA5Qw=)**
Thank you again. For everything.
Mark Kelly

****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42327101/332565559/1835235496?refcode=dd_em_220227_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMmMwZGNjMC0zMTk4LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YsQT3WH3prewWV7TbL5HkPJqiNLUp2HS4rwJQzwA5Qw=)****

* * *
Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin

Should you want to unsubscribe, you can do so here: [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/e37b7bf3-6996-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a/c2c0dcc0-3198-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMmMwZGNjMC0zMTk4LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YsQT3WH3prewWV7TbL5HkPJqiNLUp2HS4rwJQzwA5Qw=&id=104421239) . name: Erica Smith
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
[1]Erica Smith

Hi, it’s Erica Smith.

Anyone on our campaign team will tell you: I *really* don’t like to send
fundraising emails on Sunday. I’m a minister, after all.

But with our February fundraising deadline at 11:59 PM ET tomorrow, I
wanted you to hear the latest update directly from me:

As of 1:35 PM ET today, we are still around $3,050 behind our February
fundraising goal.

With new district lines and *less* than 90 days until our primary, I can’t
stress enough how critical it is that we reach our goal in order to ramp
up our campaign operations. And since February is a short month, we have
less time to get it done.

That said, I KNOW it is absolutely possible to raise the remaining $3,050
before midnight tomorrow if everyone reading this email chips in! You’re
an awesome part of our scrappy grassroots team, and I’m hoping I can count on you today:

Will you please make a contribution of any amount to our campaign? You can
give directly at this link:

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/41523?refcode=em20220227-926&t=1001&akid=926%2E3698%2EphNu6I ]https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-em-20220227-1?refcode=em-dpwillis67@gmail.com-1

Together, we will build a winning grassroots campaign for a different
North Carolina — one that loves us back the same way we love it.

Thank you from the bottom of my heart,

Erica
Erica Smith for Congress

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/41523?refcode=em20220227-926&t=1002&akid=926%2E3698%2EphNu6I ][IMG]

P.S. When I say our campaign is scrappy, I
REALLY mean it. The reason you get so many emails from me and my team is
honestly because we rely on people like you chipping in to emails like
this. And we’re doing it all without taking a dime from corporate PACs or
fossil fuel companies! [ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/41523?refcode=em20220227-926&t=1003&akid=926%2E3698%2EphNu6I ]Please consider making a contribution to our
campaign before our February fundraising deadline at 11:59 PM ET tomorrow.

Contribute to Erica's campaign:https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20220227-926-footer&t=1004&refcode2=926_3698_phNu6I&akid=926%2E3698%2EphNu6I

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ericaforus.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=926%2E3698%2EphNu6I

PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

It's shameful. Since the disastrous Citizen United decision, dark money has infiltrated politics, all but eliminating respect and civility. name: Lizzie Fletcher
subject: Thoughts at the end of this long week
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
Re-Elect Lizzie Pannill Fletcher U.S. Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie-reelect-logo.jpg]
Friend –
This week, we are seeing a fight for democracy and self-government in Ukraine that has moved and mobilized people around the world. As Americans, we must stand with Ukrainians and work with our allies and partners to end Russia’s unprovoked and unconscionable war. People around the world are both outraged by Russian aggression and inspired by Ukrainian resolve, commitment, and leadership.
And those are lessons for all of us to take to heart at this moment. Legendary Texan Dan Rather reminded us this weekend: “The fight for freedom and democracy takes many forms. The bloody showdown in Ukraine is one. So is what happens at the ballot box here in the U.S.”
And here in Texas this week, as people head to the ballot box for next Tuesday’s primary election, we see all too well the risks and failures of a democratic system where citizens are excluded and politicians prioritize power over people.
We saw this in the worst possible way this week as Governor Abbott issued a cynical, cruel, and nakedly political order directing our state’s department of Family and Protective Services to target families and kids seeking gender-affirming care and asking doctors, teachers, and others to report them to state authorities. This order is utterly inconsistent with our values as Texans. But it is not at all inconsistent with what we have seen from these leaders in Austin as they use real people as pawns in an effort to hold on to political power.
This week reminds us how important it is that we come together to fight for our values, for democracy – from Austin to Washington to Kyiv. I am proud of the United States’ leadership and partnership with our allies to support Ukraine and to impose swift and meaningful sanctions on Russia in this moment. At the same time, I am deeply disturbed to see national political figures including the former U.S. President, former Secretary of State, and current members of Congress praise Putin, parrot Russian propaganda, and polarize Americans in this moment.
It should not be lost on anyone that President Trump was impeached for withholding security assistance to Ukraine to obtain a personal benefit for himself. And it must not be lost on us how important our elections are – for us and for the world.
The contrast between candidates and ideologies could not be more clear. And we must rise to the challenge this moment presents, doing all we can in this election year to engage in democracy, to protect democracy, and to fight for democracy.
Together, we can do anything –
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie_signature-1.png]
PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
Lizzie Fletcher for Congress
3262 Westheimer Road, PMB 636
Houston, TX 77098
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/7a7fcb62-2d98-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a/22f6041f-3298-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjY3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmY2MDQxZi0zMjk4LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QtCZM03ZkFd_hwFzD-55SEvW-hmdrmxiL0W0GNxxdbo=&id=136196035 .

name: Marco Lopez
subject: on behalf of the Lopez family
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Lopez for Governor Authorized by Marco Lopez
body:
Friend, did you see my mom's message?
---
I'm so grateful for everything she's done for our family: moving to an entirely new country so that my siblings and I could have a better future, supporting our family as a businesswoman, and now, stepping in to help power this campaign for a stronger, more inclusive Arizona.
I'm grateful for you, too – for all you've done to take this campaign further than we ever dreamed. But the harder we work, the higher the stakes rise – and with the election year officially here, we can't afford a single misstep.
That's why I'm reaching out to _you_ , friend – you're a top supporter, and we need you now more than ever. **Arizona's future is hanging in the balance – and if you decide to sit on the sidelines, Donald Trump and my extremist opponent, Kari Lake (R), will happily take over.**
**We need to raise another $3,389 by midnight tonight to keep our fundraising on track before the end-of-month deadline and win this race. So I need to ask:[Will you chip in whatever you can to close our fundraising gap, defeat GOP extremists and flip Arizona blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42327331/332567519/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk465-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjYxOTg3NS0zMjk4LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0kRUrZe8de7eFRhz2jEEa5WdX-2lP3gWhaujyoIp7Ww=)**
Thanks – on behalf of the entire Lopez family.
Marco Lopez
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Esther Lopez (Marco’s Mom)**
Date: Sat, Feb 26, 2022
Subject: I couldn't be more proud of my son
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42327332/332567547/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk465-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjYxOTg3NS0zMjk4LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0kRUrZe8de7eFRhz2jEEa5WdX-2lP3gWhaujyoIp7Ww=)

Friend – **I am so excited to be reaching out to you on behalf of my son, Marco Lopez, who's running for governor of Arizona.**
Fifty years ago, Marco's dad and I made the decision to move our family from Mexico to Arizona. We came here for the promise of greater opportunity – for the promise of Arizona. But I never could have imagined where that promise would take Marco.
**From becoming the mayor of our hometown of Nogales, Arizona, to serving in the Obama administration, Marco has always been a champion for the people of this state. And today, he's following in my footsteps – running his own small business, creating jobs and opportunity in his community. **

As a mother, I couldn't be more proud of Marco – and as an Arizonan, I couldn't be more excited for the vision he has for our great state. From defending voting rights to fixing our broken education system to increasing access to affordable health care, Marco is dedicated to making Arizona a state that works for _all_ people.
**But it won't be easy. He's running against a Trump-backed Republican – and she cares more about pushing her extremist agenda than fixing the problems of our state. Simply put, she's the exact _opposite_ of my son.**

That's why I'm reaching out to you today. Even though Marco fights day after day to make Arizona's promise a reality for everyone, he has many more fights ahead of him. And while our family has plenty of love and support to go around, he's counting on grassroots folks like you to help power this campaign to victory.

**Last time he called, he mentioned he was falling a few thousand dollars short of his big end-of-month goal, and I don't want to let him down.** **So I wanted to reach out on his behalf and humbly ask:[Friend, will you please give $5 or more today so we can elect Marco as our next governor and build a state that works for all people?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42327333/332567548/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk465-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjYxOTg3NS0zMjk4LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0kRUrZe8de7eFRhz2jEEa5WdX-2lP3gWhaujyoIp7Ww=)**

Esther Lopez

**Please read on for a personal message from Democrat Marco Lopez:**
Friend, I’m so grateful you’re part of our people-powered movement to flip Arizona blue. But I have to be honest: I’m counting on your help now more than ever. I’m a proud Democrat, former border city mayor and Obama administration alum – and I’m running for governor to build a state that works for all our people. But failed GOP politicians like Kelli Ward and Doug Ducey are spreading delusional conspiracy theories and putting Donald Trump’s interests ahead of what’s best for our state. Enough is enough. But with Arizona slated to be the nation's TOP battleground in 2022, Republicans are gearing up to spend MILLIONS to keep the governorship red, so we’ll only win this race with overwhelming grassroots support. If you’re with me, [please chip in to power our fight forward.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42327339/332567554/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk465-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjYxOTg3NS0zMjk4LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0kRUrZe8de7eFRhz2jEEa5WdX-2lP3gWhaujyoIp7Ww=) Thank you so much.

As a mother, I couldn't be more proud of Marco – and as an Arizonan, I couldn't be more excited for the vision he has for our great state. From defending voting rights to fixing our broken education system to increasing access to affordable health care, Marco is dedicated to making Arizona a state that works for all people. But it won't be easy. He's running against a Trump-backed Republican – and she cares more about pushing her extremist agenda than fixing the problems of our state. Simply put, she's the exact opposite of my son. That's why I'm reaching out to you today. Even though Marco fights day after day to make Arizona's promise a reality for everyone, he has many more fights ahead of him. And while our family has plenty of love and support to go around, he's counting on grassroots folks like you to help power this campaign to victory. Last time he called, he mentioned he was falling a few thousand dollars short of his big end-of-month goal, and I don't want to let him down. So I wanted to reach out on his behalf and humbly ask:= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = = I promise he won't let you down. Esther Lopez Marco's Mom Please read on for a personal message from Democrat Marco Lopez:** Friend, I’m so grateful you’re part of our people-powered movement to flip Arizona blue. But I have to be honest: I’m counting on your help now more than ever. I’m a proud Democrat, former border city mayor and Obama administration alum – and I’m running for governor to build a state that works for all our people. But failed GOP politicians like Kelli Ward and Doug Ducey are spreading delusional conspiracy theories and putting Donald Trump’s interests ahead of what’s best for our state. Enough is enough. But with Arizona slated to be the nation's TOP battleground in 2022, Republicans are gearing up to spend MILLIONS to keep the governorship red, so we’ll only win this race with overwhelming grassroots support. If you’re with me, = Thank you so much. – Marco Lopez | | | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Marco Lopez for Governor PO Box 34672 Phoenix, AZ 85067 United States | | 2022 | Paid for by Marco Lopez for Governor Authorized by Marco Lopez

name: Dash Yeatts-Lonske
subject: Playing catch up
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MCKAYLA 2022 AND PROUDLY POWERED BY THE PEOPLE
body:
| | | Team, We sent 12 emails to our supporters in January. That helped us hit our fundraising goal for the month. **But this month is a different story. We wanted to send fewer emails to give you a break – we know this can be a lot. So far, we’ve only sent five emails. But that’s put us behind on our fundraising.** **[_Can you rush a contribution now to help us meet our February fundraising goal? Donate $5, 10, or $20 now >>_](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wYArcmG6UEXHacvMdBt13n8UclF1yUqgi3gNAmQAlwztDEoZ7r091Uhz1B1rNSfllZaznH8qvadYRRExuFANqs5WILuokifBZznmmO_eNLdXZBQyRLheBpXKADiNL-ldqBBAI1fgym67xwyNCLOMLByackpmwDP2v0jSgxtMAg9ICwix4QkyzrLRsxNLUGFi7VYL_2SqptTzGKSruOx8mkOGfVsByNAooEgAfE1vav55Xr14uG02SoYaEkqX9fwq8AMmBJy8uFvzLeCQUwC5Dj-9iqmdJCCLzkdwW9X71AZg/3jx/z9mXoaIISFmhWHfuOa0mkw/h0/FkZES4luLzoWMHMXKmTCt_M7McpCy5OQ38uWdfr9v8A)** **Right now, we’re only at 70% of our monthly goal and we only have about 24 hours left to make up the difference.** I’ll be honest: We _know_ sending fewer emails means we raise less money. I hope this team can show us that giving you a break was the right strategic move for our campaign before we head into the crucial final weeks of this race. We’re not a campaign that relies on corporate PACs or big money donations. We’re _truly_ powered by the grassroots. But at every turn in this race, this team has stepped up and made a huge difference in meeting our goals. **[_Today I need to ask you once again: Will you rush a donation now? clean_body: | | | Team, We sent 12 emails to our supporters in January. That helped us hit our fundraising goal for the month. But this month is a different story. We wanted to send fewer emails to give you a break – we know this can be a lot. So far, we’ve only sent five emails. But that’s put us behind on our fundraising. Right now, we’re only at 70% of our monthly goal and we only have about 24 hours left to make up the difference. I’ll be honest: We know sending fewer emails means we raise less money. I hope this team can show us that giving you a break was the right strategic move for our campaign before we head into the crucial final weeks of this race. We’re not a campaign that relies on corporate PACs or big money donations. We’re truly powered by the grassroots. But at every turn in this race, this team has stepped up and made a huge difference in meeting our goals. name: Team AOC
subject: A necessary break
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Expanding our progressive caucus in Congress is imperative if we are to gain ground on our urgent priorities like passing a Green New Deal, Medicare for All, and advancing reproductive freedom.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20220227-2825-header&t=1&akid=2825%2E2526796%2ELqju6a)
Alexandria and our movement have been laser-focused on the Texas primary elections — where Jessica Cisneros and Greg Casar are running to bring progressive leadership to TX-28 and TX-35. Which is why Alexandria joined them on the campaign trail last week to rally support and build resources.
Expanding our progressive caucus in Congress is imperative if we are to gain ground on our urgent priorities like passing a Green New Deal, Medicare for All, and advancing reproductive freedom.
But that means in order to make space for this work, we put fundraising for our campaign on the back burner. We did this because it’s important to Alexandria that our campaign can meet these moments and provide support in whatever ways we can.
So now, we need your help to close the gap on our February fundraising before tomorrow’s end-of-month fundraising deadline.
**We’ve done the math, and if we can get four contributions from your area — we’ll be on track to meet our targets.**
[With just two days left before our deadline, can we count on you to be one of the four people we need from your area to close our fundraising gap?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220227?refcode=em20220227-2825-P_FND_EOM_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2825_2526796_Lqju6a&akid=2825%2E2526796%2ELqju6a)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220227?refcode=em20220227-2825-P_FND_EOM_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=2825_2526796_Lqju6a&akid=2825%2E2526796%2ELqju6a)**
Your contribution of any amount will make a huge impact on our available campaign resources in the coming months leading up to our primary election in June, and will help ensure Alexandria can continue to stay focused on the work that matters — [please make a contribution right now to help us close our fundraising gap and keep Alexandria fighting for the better future our communities deserve.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220227?refcode=em20220227-2825-P_FND_EOM_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=2825_2526796_Lqju6a&akid=2825%2E2526796%2ELqju6a)
Thank you,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220227?refcode=em20220227-2825-P_FND_EOM_GFM&t=23&refcode2=2825_2526796_Lqju6a&akid=2825%2E2526796%2ELqju6a)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20220227-2825-P_FND_EOM_GFM&t=24&akid=2825%2E2526796%2ELqju6a)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=25&akid=2825%2E2526796%2ELqju6a) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=26&akid=2825%2E2526796%2ELqju6a) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=27&akid=2825%2E2526796%2ELqju6a)
---|---|---
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

name: Eric Swalwell
subject: I’m not giving up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | [](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/8E0Gs0L~)

It's Eric Swalwell.

I'm reaching out on behalf of the DCCC for the very first time because we've just begun the most important election year of our lives -- _and House Democrats are just 24 hours away from our critical End of Month Deadline._

****[Before time runs out on this can't-miss deadline, I'd be so grateful if you could chip in $3 -- or whatever you can spare -- to defend our House Majority from the GOP's grasp >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/D_)****

I'll be blunt: The GOP has launched an all-out attack on our democracy.

_They 've lied about the outcome of the 2020 election.

They've incited a deadly insurrection at our nation's Capitol.

They've undermined voting rights to cement their hold on power._

_**And worst of all, they think they can get away with it.**_

But hear me: I'm not giving up.

I will fight to make sure they never hold power again - and I need you with me to get the job done.

****[So please, I'm asking you personally: Will you chip in $3 before our End of Month Deadline to defend our House Majority and prevent the Republicans from taking back power at this incredibly fragile moment for our democracy? >>](https://links.e.dccc.)****
| | _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
| [**Chip in $1 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/We_)
---
| [**Chip in $35 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/j~EpTL6-)
---
| [**Chip in $50 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/78ZXTZ7w~-)
---
| [**Chip in $100 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.)
---
| [**Chip in $250 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.)
---
| [**Or chip in another amount >> **](https://links.e.dccc.)

Thank you,

Eric

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46463552&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjE4MzA1MDI3MwS2&l=14416759&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46463552&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjE4MzA1MDI3MwS2&l=14416759&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

name: Team Shedd
subject: I’ve had enough
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shedd for Attorney General
body:
Friend, My oldest son and daughter can remember a time when our family farm and the area around it was peaceful. Unfortunately, my youngest daughter cannot say the same. Now 15 years old, she has lived her entire life under cartel threats, police evacuations, and an important protocol: When Dad and I go out to check on suspicious activity because law enforcement is 30 minutes away, lock the door, and, if anyone attempts to come inside, shoot them. This is her “normal.” **I’ve had enough! No family should have to live like this – not 90 miles from the border, not 1 mile from the border, not anywhere. This is not “normal” and it is not acceptable.** I’m sick of the empty promises from politicians. **It’s time Arizonans take matters into our own hands**. We are facing an INVASION and we have the constitutional right and authority to do something about it under Article 1, Section 8, Clause 3 of the United States Constitution. won’t let us.** **My response to them: grow a spine and make him stop us.** If the federal government won’t do their job, Arizona has to stand up and LEAD the nation on border security. Some of my opponents have said Arizona CAN’T declare the cartels as the terrorists they are and we CAN’T build the wall because Joe Biden won’t let us. My response to them: grow a spine and make him stop us. If the federal government won’t do their job, Arizona has to stand up and LEAD the nation on border security. Thanks for your support, Tiffany Paid for by Shedd for Attorney General. Authorized by Shedd for Attorney General.

body:

clean_body: John is on the road today, and we wanted to show you what your donations have made possible. | = | Hi, Peter — John is on the road today, and we wanted to show you what your donations have made possible: today, he made stops around Western Maryland to meet with residents and discuss his plans for our state. In between stops, he even practiced his selfie game: = The Promise to Progress tour across the state has been a huge success so far, but in order for us to continue, John is counting on supporters like you to fuel us... literally! = | = = If we fall behind, we risk having to cut this tour short — and worse, risk not being able to show John how to take a better selfie. Together, our team is building something special with this movement — but we can’t do it without your help. = | | | = | = | = | | = | = | = | = Thanks, Team King * | | = Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer John King for Governor PO Box 8429 Silver Spring, MD 20907 United States | | | ---|---|--- = = If you would like to learn more about John King's historic campaign for Maryland governor, text PROGRESS to 48178 or visit our . name: Shahid Buttar
subject: How Pelosi won re-election in 2020
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shahid Buttar for Congress Committee, 1390 Market St
body:
While confronting an embodiment of the corporate establishment and its continuing corruption, we have been forced to respond to disinformation from across the political spectrum. | | |
---
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yRkW_Sw2xr1MvIXEt6jooTbMnsVYqhUO8Xwt4ORz78OfUg7g0bT3KWj5PFlOrwylcmVHgVhvfe2ZPl5W7AdMasm-wwaFOUGlPbw1GD27eWoOeVVusMYI7CnHg0IT9-X_kFj5IF0xYM-Ey5bqHkSaBkocsZTU0kzIl48nV-ivrxCIrCNMv1O2epw95ske4vuh9zXNmF5UJ04bEkhGQ1qc1ymY9A3_bVo5vGjfHphy7sY49EF7BWfWE8-3MLdw84gdOF4omyX30mIzYh2vgqpzybI6jtL4Jgf0X1AxXXkBudDQmOnaW8op13YXglrDGZTeXITNI8whlt32VGJqIVAnrno4gL5uJd6MVebTN6ZjVM6qgek5jgUY2Arn02yZRdtMMHp_ntaOHRLoB09sATQMec/3jx/PUFoW6E5T-SwAcDUB-cMvQ/h0/461rjR6pCxWsHzaqJy0k69rUc1KZj6cwTyl-QUaw6D0)
| | Dear Peter, **** Two years ago, I became the only Democrat to have ever faced Nancy Pelosi in a general election. After we won the primary, and forced half a dozen policy concessions that ultimately passed the House of Representatives over Pelosi’s initial objections, the _San Francisco Chronicle_ published a front page story, with a headline above the fold: “Pelosi Ignoring Calls for a Debate.” The next week, I was falsely accused of sexual misconduct by a network of former staffers who we had replaced on our team, working with an accuser in Washington with a long history of targeting anti-war politicians and activists with fabricated accusations of harassment and assault. [**Can you stand with us today as we continue to confront racist disinformation orchestrated to insulate a corrupt party establishment?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTCxhAMhTRXK4t_BbI_sQ5MIQTMO7pq5DeHeVPoe7sj07qmLVIeS_HgFb8WGtoIYATSfxn_NRUFew3tAp3-8tImEWx-uaUUzA677ldM3435sp7sEijI3zF7cajdmgp2ShD6X_9drB9nugV7A3p0YGwq8PH3I8SOjC7prvDkHKWLUTOmQn72XC7CH5GLS1qkLuE3DHltVe7ZZIPsHAWgWlZqqwDcKh459x_7hJd0L8-mevF_BNuyQh0rktMiem-XPp5wwhRd6rmJNv1sheipG7YyiiofLN0FpkTqiHw3uGCyTDv8H9L7zVvAPk243zOdvNDshEArO1hSQleRl1a1F013w4M9k4JtvYrtYNNYLD-ROQ/3jx/PUFoW6E5T-SwAcDUB-cMvQ/h1/Yl8PY3z3JQn2wKLvz0M4JKCWWmght6eWlZ7SAm1e5E4)
I believed then, as I am reminded today, that the truth shall set us free. This weekend, the _Marina Times_ published an exposé revealing the conflicts of interest among the sources on whom the writers who smeared me relied, as well as conflicts of interest among some of those writers, themselves. Investigative journalist Susan Dyer Reynolds has a long history of exposing corruption in San Francisco, from previous smear campaigns targeting other candidates of color like Julian Davis, to the corruption scandal engulfing our city’s Public Utilities Commission. As I explained to her, “The only thing more alarming to me than being the target of racist accusations was watching the fragility of ‘progressives’ and ‘socialists’ in San Francisco lead them to double down and shoot the messenger even after the lies were exposed.” [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDPj7QrptSt14tfAVq0YlhiUnGHVOaQtA0vFOlQ-wTVoukMXDZ3e_e5uaE6K6do_qdo9uofcGNuyISiRhku8tLxqCY8KZVey2raoQR19mU-NpTpxU8VgZPeFepBIJ1SBFEvdsfWES1BiUDYK7aVmb_OCi2tgzrsnKyMFAxW9YSu_z3PxQziOoXYCHuanq8tJH2W6Q27v9MPwwqnpMAQHnSe_kuJS5lT6G0iGpQdd9oKZh4tm7sXP6g_10Fvo7-Q_Hk1_g--Y0Vk4sh76A4N55oEizz2up7oLVdfl42r4WuaHcgwgLtQ-65AcIGlv7-nwASRDY5afHDn3Vwan6mpRHejtBTyLa33TxpVkBdUjyeMqBL8ZxpnttQjghqqwdutxCw9J_hbrvDo6RjbibjAcKjWaU9ixEozf-kmqKDBC_N30oCShvQtjkJJi6KPrjh-T5qBhpSv4sw3YTjpoII0BL98c/3jx/PUFoW6E5T-SwAcDUB-cMvQ/h2/aiHQPKrzC0QS6KMK7cDHS75YbXr56Q2xbDdcIRXgH1c)[**Can you join us again today to expand our efforts challenging corruption from Washington to San Francisco?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTCxhAMhTRXK4t_BbI_sQ5MIQTMO7pq5DeHeVPoe7sj07qmLVIeS_HgFb8WGtoIYATbecqSKtozN0IGk9f12KrFKnVyjxhPl660PbfCrbHigblPofJ7i-ObOkOQy9z6JY3sszUjbSkeA2bTHOjlmzBJjZ9e_0qNNmYMirRNdJHA8cp8skjgz-IiDhPxFxHKBOKhvCiPbDouY0xN4EGn4A9q9Nyq9b8kBCZhXmSw-Ttx4ovyrTalUZeLPa20p_ZASaGQS_4JiHDAhCCPdlB_k3IsdX8PS0qgtB5kDDiw2-DtmcuYlshT1B-EjAMXC4PzYQmvYUmo8ptC79UvcVbUISQ29OIMeCF8ap4x5IycNu3zS2/3jx/PUFoW6E5T-SwAcDUB-cMvQ/h3/EJrCvISxNkiAQL0EpzeGJXeewg91phJ5s7LCu1oY2Ik) Fearing overdue accountability for their self-serving lies, some of the voices who orchestrated the disinformation to insulate Pelosi in 2020 have suggested that the _Marina Times_ is biased, conveniently overlooking the 2021 exposé published by whistleblower Gloria Berry in the _SF Bayview_ , a national Black newspaper based here in SF. [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTLY2u3YHPIM3KX2WLf6ifWQ_rWiyf_2ZGRtME2XxofXa00CXRW8ou6hT7DH4FOsYJRBfFSJ2rPGwona-4C6MRh1toa_jimCr9Wgf428NIR4qb6e9ncYDQ1CKrFUbfDCNuCyMpWpqvkzqEKG_QE-0xi54_zscvgb76D4rcuy210Lj15Wbya4IZykcNuDclgF_Xe_rsfKF_n8DWnKJd3tTFt8kskaTv9J14hEXksW8EdYOXorz8tR4l4m5qdmeqIegPVqn0G-NXSsfv9-10Ml3D2-raAdx_n-on1xGGnqfdLz9lcXhlUaUclM22IiF7ni_gDJMCnMryFGbrAoUakm-xYnfOG363GDBFdXhviN6ZM01/3jx/PUFoW6E5T-SwAcDUB-cMvQ/h4/r6csAULR_KEcaKRkxsQnXQ96Vtm5jbOecAhnJ6a7tDI)In a one-party city, it’s not surprising that the entire press establishment would ignore a story about the corruption of the dominant party, its use of racism & Islamophobia as an election strategy, and the vindication of the only challenger to ever pose a threat to the dynastic oligarch who continues to occupy the seat. For two newspapers with essentially diametrically opposed editorial perspectives to corroborate the same story reveals the depth of the corruption infecting the rest of the local press. That's part of why we're dragging the _San Francisco Chronicle_ into federal court to defend election integrity from corporate publications that abandon journalism in favor of character assassination. Lawsuits, however, require resources that Pelosi has in much greater abundance than I do. [**Are you able to consider a campaign contribution to help level the playing field? I discovered that it’s not just a wealthy oligarch who we confront, but also her sycophants in the party establishment and the press**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTCxhAMhTRXK4t_BbI_sQ5MIQTMO7pq5DeHeVPoe7sj07qmLVIeS_HgFb8WGtoIYATQIV9_s0_FSyj_9lBTD4UWs963z68V3BtpQUmxvY_NK7Y8nh5Z7SolQtkEhKfmGzbiXUAiv44LBEp24N4Iu3CziWLOZiKp8XECicztDzjMawhWWglXu5WWjuv13iIB1GfOdUomnf5xRjDPOwdhHqeMOzKrRiivJVgF0Lo0jUL53LyY8tPtDT1kQLd5qRqWIAblwYgYycsTZ1k43ojeupH5H8z7avPI1Cn8eIc3NH7EOca4k8zNdpVztiQSrtiSCvj6XlyChwVsx_l2vV22vsABwfGvNYKaPVcUF6qvkjNfM7/3jx/PUFoW6E5T-SwAcDUB-cMvQ/h5/qLOd8oiKpjBX3mZxtvSUneY7y_pxNJQS2zU_--dYcz8)**.** Given the headwinds we have faced and overcome, I feel overwhelming gratitude to the thousands of supporters who are fueling our campaign today.
