clean_body: While confronting an embodiment of the corporate establishment and its continuing corruption, we have been forced to respond to disinformation from across the political spectrum. | | | | | Dear Peter, ** Two years ago, I became the only Democrat to have ever faced Nancy Pelosi in a general election. After we won the primary, and forced half a dozen policy concessions that ultimately passed the House of Representatives over Pelosi’s initial objections, the San Francisco Chronicle published a front page story, with a headline above the fold: “Pelosi Ignoring Calls for a Debate.” The next week, I was falsely accused of sexual misconduct by a network of former staffers who we had replaced on our team, working with an accuser in Washington with a long history of targeting anti-war politicians and activists with fabricated accusations of harassment and assault. I believed then, as I am reminded today, that the truth shall set us free. This weekend, the Marina Times published an exposé revealing the conflicts of interest among the sources on whom the writers who smeared me relied, as well as conflicts of interest among some of those writers, themselves. Investigative journalist Susan Dyer Reynolds has a long history of exposing corruption in San Francisco, from previous smear campaigns targeting other candidates of color like Julian Davis, to the corruption scandal engulfing our city’s Public Utilities Commission. As I explained to her, “The only thing more alarming to me than being the target of racist accusations was watching the fragility of ‘progressives’ and ‘socialists’ in San Francisco lead them to double down and shoot the messenger even after the lies were exposed.” Fearing overdue accountability for their self-serving lies, some of the voices who orchestrated the disinformation to insulate Pelosi in 2020 have suggested that the Marina Times is biased, conveniently overlooking the 2021 exposé published by whistleblower Gloria Berry in the SF Bayview , a national Black newspaper based here in SF. a one-party city, it’s not surprising that the entire press establishment would ignore a story about the corruption of the dominant party, its use of racism & Islamophobia as an election strategy, and the vindication of the only challenger to ever pose a threat to the dynastic oligarch who continues to occupy the seat. For two newspapers with essentially diametrically opposed editorial perspectives to corroborate the same story reveals the depth of the corruption infecting the rest of the local press. That's part of why we're dragging the San Francisco Chronicle into federal court to defend election integrity from corporate publications that abandon journalism in favor of character assassination. Lawsuits, however, require resources that Pelosi has in much greater abundance than I do. .** Given the headwinds we have faced and overcome, I feel overwhelming gratitude to the thousands of supporters who are fueling our campaign today. We could not have gotten this far without you! Many thanks for standing with me—and with the future, against the continuing corruption of the past! **Join us next week!**
Team,

Now that petitions are underway, we would like to invite you to our first Super Saturday door-knocking event of 2022!

If you didn't know, we need to get 1,000 signatures from registered Republican voters who live in the Lehigh Valley and we are asking for your help to do that!

_We will be meeting at the Scheller for Congress Headquarters located at 1104 South Cedar Crest Blvd in Salisbury on March 5th at 10:00 AM to go door to door and get petition signatures for Lisa and we ask that you join us if you are available. **Use the link below to sign up!**_

We will have food and beverages before and after the door knocking, so bring your appetite!

**If you can't join us next Saturday, make sure you check out our many events next week listed at the bottom of this email!**

Onward to Victory!

Pierce Frauenheim
Campaign Manager

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: "After an FBI raid, 'King of Laredo' runs on his laurels"
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Henry Cuellar’s house and campaign office were raided by the FBI last
month — but he still has a serious chance to win his primary against
Justice Democrat Jessica Cisneros on Tuesday.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/96007?refcode=em20220227-22182&t=1002&akid=22182%2E1203867%2EYGQD2S ]Headline from Politico reads After an FBI raid, 'King of Laredo' runs
on his laurels. Subheadline reads Jessica Cisneros is giving nine-term
Rep. Henry Cuellar (D-Texas) a tougher rematch this year. Corruption cloud
or no, he still has a real chance.

If Cuellar uses his massive campaign war chest, funded by Wall Street, Big
Oil, and GOP mega-donors, to defeat Jessica, Cuellar will remain the only
anti-abortion Democrat in the House. Just like the Politico headline above
says, Cuellar could really win this thing, even with his cloud of
corruption.

But this isn’t only about this one primary. Justice Democrats is a
response to corporate Democrats taking money from corporate PACs and
blocking progressive legislation in Congress. That’s why alongside
Jessica’s primary, we’re supporting five other Justice Democrats this year
running against the political establishment.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/96007?refcode=em20220227-22182&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=22182%2E1203867%2EYGQD2S ]Can you make your
first donation to Justice Democrats to fuel our fight
against the corporate-backed establishment? With the support of grassroots
donors like you, we can win our primaries and expand the Squad.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/96007?refcode=em20220227-22182&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=22182%2E1203867%2EYGQD2S ]Contribute

So much hinges on each and every one of our primaries. If we elect six
Justice Democrats this year, that’s a huge addition to our bloc of JDs in
Congress. Jessica’s race will be our first and biggest test. We’ve been
with Jessica since 2019, we helped her launch her campaign, we were there
through her first race against Cuellar when she only lost by 2,700 votes,
and we’ve been back with her in these last six months preparing for what
would be a colossal victory for progressives.

It will come down to Tuesday, when the votes are counted in Texas — then,
we’re on to the rest of our 2022 progressive primary fights.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/96007?refcode=em20220227-22182&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=22182%2E1203867%2EYGQD2S ]Can you help us make 2022 a winning year for Justice Democrats and
progressive change? Chip in $3 and help us beat back
corporate influence to elect Jessica and our full slate of progressive
challengers.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/96007?refcode=em20220227-22182&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1024&akid=22182%2E1203867%2EYGQD2S ]Contribute

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1025&akid=22182%2E1203867%2EYGQD2S ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1026&akid=22182%2E1203867%2EYGQD2S ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220227-22182-footer&t=1027&refcode2=22182_1203867_YGQD2S&akid=22182%2E1203867%2EYGQD2S

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1028&akid=22182%2E1203867%2EYGQD2S

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

clean_body: Peter, I’m the socialist Democrats’ worst nightmare. As a black Christian conservative who made it in America through hard work and faith, I’m living proof that their “woke” agenda of oppression and hate is nothing but lies. But that makes them even more determined to silence me. Our end of month deadline is TOMORROW at 11:59 PM, and we MUST meet this goal if we’re going to stop the socialist Democrats’ lies. Peter, when I served as a U.S. Army Intelligence Officer, my fellow soldiers didn’t care about the color of each others’ skin. We were united by one goal: protecting the greatest country on earth. This unity and dedication to service is what makes America work - but now, the Democrats are trying to destroy it by dividing us by race. We only have ONE CHANCE to save America, and we need to act quickly before it’s too late. Thank you, Jeremy Hunt Paid for by Jeremy for Georgia Contributions to this committee are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. body:
Team —

According to this morning's fundraising report, we're still $12,460 short of our $50,000 end-of-month goal.

We don't want to tell you that the sky will fall if we don't reach our goal — because it won't. But with a billionaire opponent entering the race with the ability to self-fund, we can't afford to come up short even once.

So, here's what we need to do. We've set a goal to bring in 75 individual grassroots donations before midnight tonight to help us close the gap.

**[If you've been thinking about chipping in to Karen's campaign for mayor of Los Angeles, we need your help right now. Will you donate $3, $10, $15, or whatever you can now before midnight? If you're an L.A. resident, your individual donation could be matched 6-to-1 by the city.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42328054/332575137/1203702855?ms=em22_220227_eom3_fndd_gq_act___kbft_ettx&refcode=em22_220227_eom3_fndd_gq_act___kbft_ettx&source=em22_220227_eom3_fndd_gq_act___kbft_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220227_eom3_fndd_gq_act___kbft_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=ggzTOKz8zm3cULJJV3QJW%2B%2BkRIJ%2F3UX31dH8SG%2BvJdBNNIOyaYCzUf52NsTldcLS%2FejxgkpY3BgreM8z%2FQqAgea2ZnRwB%2B3vPvchyW1ofdiDdt0JMbpYT%2FlesHIE4DjO062nqLCelw64etvO9bOBsQ%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85NDYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWYwMGRjYy0zYzk4LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dxy3BlFLY1x1K_49Gr6UHUWCNq6pkBiffUD1_rj1NNU=&emci=a61676f5-7c96-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=29f00dcc-3c98-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=2429742)**

Karen has the vision to unapologetically address the issues in L.A. that existed long before the pandemic, but that can only take us so far when going up against an opponent who is self-funding.

A billionaire entering the race changes everything, and we can't let someone buy this race, team. To fight back, we need your help powering this movement forward to go toe-to-toe with our new opponent's spending.

**[Will you be one of the 75 people we need to chip in today to help us reach our donor goal? Karen's roots are in community organizing, so when she looks at our fundraising numbers, it's important she sees representation from every corner of our city.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42328055/332575138/1203702855?ms=em22_220227_eom3_fndd_gq_act___kbft_ettx&refcode=em22_220227_eom3_fndd_gq_act___kbft_ettx&source=em22_220227_eom3_fndd_gq_act___kbft_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220227_eom3_fndd_gq_act___kbft_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=ggzTOKz8zm3cULJJV3QJW%2B%2BkRIJ%2F3UX31dH8SG%2BvJdBNNIOyaYCzUf52NsTldcLS%2FejxgkpY3BgreM8z%2FQqAgea2ZnRwB%2B3vPvchyW1ofdiDdt0JMbpYT%2FlesHIE4DjO062nqLCelw64etvO9bOBsQ%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85NDYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWYwMGRjYy0zYzk4LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dxy3BlFLY1x1K_49Gr6UHUWCNq6pkBiffUD1_rj1NNU=&emci=a61676f5-7c96-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=29f00dcc-3c98-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=2429742)**

Karen Bass Finance Team

clean_body: | | | Election day is closer than you think | | | Team, a few days ago, we reached out to let you know we’re not meeting our goals for February. I just checked our records, and we don’t have a donation on file for you for 2022. Supporters like you are our advantage against the GOP. Supporters like you giving $5, $10, $25 have allowed the AZ Dems to narrow the fundraising gap with the AZ GOP. The AZ GOP goes out and collects checks from special interests and corporations. We rely on you digging deep and giving what you can when we need it the most. If we can get 300 people to give $10 or more right now, we’ll be pretty close to hitting our end-of-month goal. name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: I need to know I have your support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
Hey, can you spare a few minutes? I want to be honest with you for a moment.

Ron Johnson has given up the fight for working families. He’s too busy spreading lies about COVID-19, telling families to fend for themselves, and ignoring science — all while deepening his own pockets and enriching his wealthy donors.

These bogus conspiracies are at the center of Ron Johnson’s re-election campaign, which should tell you everything about who he’s fighting for — and it’s not the people of Wisconsin.

Look, I couldn't be more different. I'm running to bring new leadership to our state. We need a U.S. Senator who will deliver on the issues that matter most to workers and families — like guaranteed paid leave, lower prescription drug costs, affordable childcare, good-paying union jobs, the right to vote, and more.

Wisconsin needs a U.S. Senator who is looking out for your interests, not the corporate special interests that are already more than well-represented in Washington. That's why I decided to run.

This race is a dead heat, but the most recent head-to-head poll shows I’m the only Democrat who can beat Ron Johnson. I'm counting on every single grassroots supporter to help us fund this campaign and win this election.

**[If we're going to take on Ron Johnson in November, I need to know I have your support. Can I count on you to make a donation to my campaign before our end-of-month deadline expires tomorrow? Anything you can give will be put to immediate use to help us flip Wisconsin’s Senate seat from red to blue. Thank you in advance.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42328132/332575332/-1448701630?refcode=em22_220227_eom5_fnd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220227_eom5_fnd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDk0YWVkNC0zZDk4LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OggzX-3PEsHeg63-DvZx4Qr8Q70jxK9u3m_yzsY0LiA=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$10**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42328133/332575333/-1448701630?refcode=em22_220227_eom5_fnd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220227_eom5_fnd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDk0YWVkNC0zZDk4LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OggzX-3PEsHeg63-DvZx4Qr8Q70jxK9u3m_yzsY0LiA=)

I’m not accepting any corporate PAC money in this campaign — never have, never will. That means combatting the outside attacks from Ron Johnson's allies will depend on the support of this incredible grassroots team.

With your help, we can make sure this is Ron Johnson's last year in office and return this seat to the people of Wisconsin. I sincerely appreciate anything you can chip in today. Every dollar goes a long way.

Forward!

— Sarah Godlewski
Sarah Godlewski is running for U.S. Senate to put Wisconsin workers and families first. She's the only Democrat who is beating Ron Johnson in the latest head-to-head poll of our race. clean_body: Hey, can you spare a few minutes? I want to be honest with you for a moment. Ron Johnson has given up the fight for working families. He’s too busy spreading lies about COVID-19, telling families to fend for themselves, and ignoring science — all while deepening his own pockets and enriching his wealthy donors. These bogus conspiracies are at the center of Ron Johnson’s re-election campaign, which should tell you everything about who he’s fighting for — and it’s not the people of Wisconsin. Look, I couldn't be more different. I'm running to bring new leadership to our state. We need a U.S. Senator who will deliver on the issues that matter most to workers and families — like guaranteed paid leave, lower prescription drug costs, affordable childcare, good-paying union jobs, the right to vote, and more. Wisconsin needs a U.S. Senator who is looking out for your interests, not the corporate special interests that are already more than well-represented in Washington. That's why I decided to run. This race is a dead heat, but the most recent head-to-head poll shows I’m the only Democrat who can beat Ron Johnson. I'm counting on every single grassroots supporter to help us fund this campaign and win this election. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = I’m not accepting any corporate PAC money in this campaign — never have, never will. That means combatting the outside attacks from Ron Johnson's allies will depend on the support of this incredible grassroots team. With your help, we can make sure this is Ron Johnson's last year in office and return this seat to the people of Wisconsin. I sincerely appreciate anything you can chip in today. Every dollar goes a long way. Forward! — Sarah Godlewski Sarah Godlewski is running for U.S. Senate to put Wisconsin workers and families first. She's the only Democrat who is beating Ron Johnson in the latest head-to-head poll of our race. With your help, we can flip this seat. Chip in to join us: | = Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin Sarah for Wisconsin PO Box 166 Madison, WI 53701 United States

You may contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year to House Majority PAC's Contribution Account. You may contribute an unlimited amount to House Majority PAC's Non-Contribution Account. By donating through this email, you agree that the first $5,000 of your contribution will be deposited in House Majority PAC's Contribution Account and the remainder in House Majority PAC's Non-Contribution Account. You may also designate a different allocation formula below. name: Nikki Haley
subject: Running 👟
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand for America PAC
body:
After I left the UN, I took up running.
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?3l9fm--fgxr-4qqlpo6&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

| | Fellow Conservative,

After I left the UN, I took up running.

I played sports growing up, but I had never been an active runner. The idea of committing to something without knowing if I’d be any good at it was, to be honest, more than a little scary.

**But one of the most important things we can do in life is to push through the fear.** **[When I ran for the state legislature, when I ran for governor, when I came to the United Nations—I always made sure I never got too comfortable.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3l9fm-20fob-4qqlpo1/ "When I ran for the state legislature, when I ran for governor, when I came to the United Nations—I always made sure I never got too comfortable. ") **

So I laced up my shoes, put my music on (Joan Jett, of course) and put one foot in front of the other. I worked hard and I pushed myself.

Last December, I finished my first half-marathon—something I never thought I could do two years ago.

---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3l9fm-20foc-4qqlpo2/)
---

**Running a half-marathon was a huge challenge.** So was running for state legislature and for governor. But they were important races to run.

**[As we look at the next election, it can be daunting.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3l9fm-20fod-4qqlpo3/ "As we look at the next election, it can be daunting.")** This year Republicans have a huge opportunity to take back the House, the Senate, and win statewide races across the country.

But just like running a half-marathon, it will take work. Some days will be difficult. The Democrats will launch attacks against Republicans to try and divide our party. Liberal billionaires will push millions of dollars into key battleground states to try and prevent us from winning in November.

This election year will not be easy. But it will be filled with races that we must win.

When it comes to running a race, it’s also important to remember that you can’t just wake up one day and magically expect to run 13.1 miles. You have to build up stamina and strength step by step and mile by mile. You have to put in work each day to make it to the finish line.

**That’s the same with this year’s election.** _**[We can’t just wake up on November 8 and expect to win. We have to put in the work each and every day to gear up for victory.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3l9fm-20foe-4qqlpo4/ "We can’t just wake up on November 8 and expect to win. We have to put in the work each and every day to gear up for victory. ")**_

That’s why Stand For America PAC isn’t waiting until the fall to hit the ground running. My team started laying the groundwork for victory over a year ago. We’ve trained, endorsed, advised, and financially supported dozens of strong conservatives. We helped Glenn Youngkin and Jason Miyares cross the finish line in Virginia and helped Jack Ciattarelli pull off a near-upset in New Jersey.

But our work is far from done. We must keep up the momentum that we gained over the past year and continue to build our movement one person at a time.

**[ I hope you will be one of the people who steps up today to keep our movement strong and help conservative candidates cross the finish line.

If you would like to help us continue our momentum going into the 2022 election, I’m asking you to donate a special gift of $1, $35, $50, $100, $500, or more today.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3l9fm-20fof-4qqlpo5/ "I hope you will be one of the people who steps up today to keep our movement strong and help conservative candidates cross the finish line.If you would like to help us continue our momentum going into the 2022 election, I’m asking you to donate a special gift of $1, $35, $50, $100, $500, or more today. ")**

Thank you in advance for your generous contribution.

My very best,

Nikki R. Haley

---
| | | [DONATE NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3l9fm-20fog-4qqlpo6/)
---
| | | [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3l9fm-20foh-4qqlpo7/ "Nikki Haley Image")
---
_**EXCLUSIVE MESSAGE FROM NIKKI HALEY:**_

I’m focused on helping Republicans win the next election and I want YOU to play an important part. This is a great opportunity to support political leaders who believe America is inherently good, and who understand that the Democrats' far-left policies undermine our freedoms and American values.

Please help me fight back against the Democrats and their radical agenda. We can only defeat them if we stand united.

**[Will you join my team today?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3l9fm-20foi-4qqlpo8/ "Will you join my team today?")**
---
| | | [JOIN NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3l9fm-20foj-4qqlpo9/ "JOIN NOW")
---

| Paid for by Stand for America PAC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

www.StandForAmericaPAC.com
---

Contributions are not tax-deductible. Stand For America PAC does not accept contributions from foreign nationals.

Our mailing address is:
601 New Jersey Ave NW, Suite 620
Washington, DC 20001

[Privacy Policy](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3l9fm-20fok-4qqlpo0/)

6890 E. Sunrise Dr.

body:
We have the momentum.

Beto is gaining on Greg Abbott in the polls. **This is a single digit race!**
Greg Abbott: 52%
Beto O'Rourke: 45% _The Hill/Emerson College Polling_

**Beto can win this race.** We’re closing the gap on Greg Abbott in the polls – but we need the resources to continue to spread the word about Beto’s positive vision for the state of Texas. name: Fetterman HQ
subject: Does our record for Derek look right?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
John thinks with your help we can get this done.
#
Derek,
We’ve got less than 48 hours until our end-of-month deadline, and right now we’re running behind our $100,000 goal.
But we’ve still got time left for a major grassroots push, and **John thinks with your help we can make it.**
It’s tough (and expensive) to run a grassroots-funded campaign to elect John Fetterman as a voice for working families (and our 51st Democratic vote!) in the U.S. Senate, and that’s why we want to be honest with you about what you can do to help win this race.
**Without further ado, when we searched your donation history for the month, here’s what comes up, Derek:**
**_Derek's Official 2/22 Team Fetterman Record_** **Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com **February Donor:** No — not yet! **February Total:** $0* **Suggested Donation: $5** **[Donate Now](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/44959?refcode=em20220227-4772&t=1&akid=4772%2E434096%2ESZkjhd)** _*Our data isn’t perfect. If you’ve contributed using a different email address or via check, you may not see that amount reflected here. But please know that John, Gisele, and the team are deeply grateful for your generosity!_
---
Derek, if you make a donation today, you can add your name to the list of amazing grassroots donors who can say they gave in February to help put John in the U.S. Senate. [**Will you make your first February donation right now?**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/44959?refcode=em20220227-4772&t=4&akid=4772%2E434096%2ESZkjhd)
**[Donate Now](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/44959?refcode=em20220227-4772&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=4772%2E434096%2ESZkjhd)**
No matter how big this campaign gets, or how much money the Republicans blow on this race, John won’t take a penny from corporate PACs or the shady special interests. We wouldn’t have it any other way. But that also means we’re relying completely on online supporters like you to help us meet our goal before Monday night.
[**Can we count on your support for the very first time today ahead of our urgent fundraising deadline on February 28th? Please rush an online contribution to our campaign to elect John Fetterman for U.S. Senate.**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/44959?refcode=em20220227-4772&t=6&akid=4772%2E434096%2ESZkjhd)
Thank you!
—Team Fetterman HQ

name: Nicole Malliotakis
subject: We’re at risk

body:
Time to Restore America's Greatness

| [](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=0587ba6ffdda444bb7a081d1180d564c&_e=8QDeeCY0gPvM2gQKPIF7VJ_c_8gMWOfWMKj8BI3rlCPWuxt4sMo1o-tuYC9yf2B3iGBC9CC1RS7RiBZgk4qZ6juKlYMgT7isYsk9ip3HXb2-uzuJM2T-1WFihLBW4CzaW4bE2GIoHhrkwYtELo3wuTbfqSk8ovLsFDmd2697FESPm5-5uHyg3yrRm5CLNoGP-1o1BS6rszG-OlfE-1X0AciLIM3leZSDiL4twPF-nBfEq9TP-m4NRqkB0oUa40h2doEDntX0ZVCnGBMX_IksnwSJmympqO3_kNer3YCgjf0pZD-u_K_csJXNT_DHdR520qVgFKfBnOrj1AMOkU3Zf7-x5CprQLfnugMPsj394Kct-UYLZpSOa2z0whYHXLHdrdG04PBgLuFt6WxxUwWdElZUXmt-idhGPi9HyIKq_POsEcWa5JXEn4Xj6F1b4blW-O0BcHkK4b2gZQFOxIuIR7F_Q_CrbRVASiOHtGRc2y0%3D)

Friend,

**_Nancy Pelosi is dangerously close to having another 2 years in power._**

**That is TWO more years of socialist agendas, Cancel Culture, absurd tax hikes, and failed leadership.** This is frightening for our country and our values. Having Nancy Pelosi and Max Rose in power is a threat to the freedoms we hold dear as Americans.
| [**Take Back the House**](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=0587ba6ffdda444bb7a081d1180d564c&_e=8QDeeCY0gPvM2gQKPIF7VJ_c_8gMWOfWMKj8BI3rlCPWuxt4sMo1o-tuYC9yf2B3iGBC9CC1RS7RiBZgk4qZ6juKlYMgT7isYsk9ip3HXb2-uzuJM2T-1WFihLBW4CzaW4bE2GIoHhrkwYtELo3wuTbfqSk8ovLsFDmd2697FESPm5-5uHyg3yrRm5CLNoGP-1o1BS6rszG-OlfE-1X0AciLIM3leZSDiL4twPF-nBfEq9TP-m4NRqkB0oUa40h2doEDntX0ZVCnGBMX_Iksn24ARx5m2UelnUEzbmcCZB1wf3rMD--PsUP09gsiAqLfL6e42FZrrVFbc07vyIXBvVVsO60WrwSHXCIfvD4wu_jaVPadDeAXM-ohER9h9C2Pxp1VYEFVVIY9R4_0ttF8cre7q45hPSu-yNVCc7IKfF1cRDxQaqK0XaYiJKZbJOW-3dl_HP5SQU9yVcFNHECsVuL7Qpt7wUyrgCfWqpkaNjU%3D)
---

We need your help NOW to help us fight back against Pelosi’s attacks. As we approach the end of February, **[we need support from people like you who value conservative representation in Washington.](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=0587ba6ffdda444bb7a081d1180d564c&_e=8QDeeCY0gPvM2gQKPIF7VJ_c_8gMWOfWMKj8BI3rlCPWuxt4sMo1o-tuYC9yf2B3iGBC9CC1RS7RiBZgk4qZ6juKlYMgT7isYsk9ip3HXb2-uzuJM2T-1WFihLBW4CzaW4bE2GIoHhrkwYtELo3wuTbfqSk8ovLsFDmd2697FESPm5-5uHyg3yrRm5CLNoGP-1o1BS6rszG-OlfE-1X0AciLIM3leZSDiL4twPF-nBfEq9TP-m4NRqkB0oUa40h2doEDntX0ZVCnGBMX_Iksn5-_wCsPaTfTQ7ENMR80PK6JhWHkp5hL4cDo0zZITP7_7eDn8KA2ewiTAox_Il3vIvZsqpr5ywT6hPmq-dHWr2z1tWreZexOMsdej-oXVMzSo7YjXPzqZJ-IyUPdgUTIB1G8Ct17P3r0gPGaC3nzHCCiNofdjsOJmYELfunrGu3xe5oFrukvmoW-59DjEMdA6KsH23UVVUVF40ZQ3G9KWeM%3D)**

The Radical Left is crippling our country, and you can help stop them!
[**Chip in to Help Me Restore the American Dream**](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=0587ba6ffdda444bb7a081d1180d564c&_e=8QDeeCY0gPvM2gQKPIF7VJ_c_8gMWOfWMKj8BI3rlCPWuxt4sMo1o-tuYC9yf2B3iGBC9CC1RS7RiBZgk4qZ6juKlYMgT7isYsk9ip3HXb2-uzuJM2T-1WFihLBW4CzaW4bE2GIoHhrkwYtELo3wuTbfqSk8ovLsFDmd2697FESPm5-5uHyg3yrRm5CLNoGP-1o1BS6rszG-OlfE-1X0AciLIM3leZSDiL4twPF-nBfEq9TP-m4NRqkB0oUa40h2doEDntX0ZVCnGBMX_Iksn-r9QFAfOwzmrjpTH1jCAUMDmcoqYJ5LK8Tnd1sYoXiDIXVYHgi11ZbcAXbqkeQ0Um0xZZ21kMs6-2oiu3dTBBmYEMcNOQC0Ju_4nVR6aRjaQIyP0PLHxkhkV_6ouTT33gjbLW2eCXHDehVCqUEzAz8AAS_3cVmIv6kZxlZKe3qW7wcFagNV-huf5OTv7WEFq1sOygKKDx7ZC_5XvvF8Odw%3D)

With your help and passion for America, we can do this!

God Bless,

name: Sarah Huckabee Sanders
subject: on the ballot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Governor |
body:
This week, I made it official...and filed the paperwork to be on the ballot as a candidate for the governor of Arkansas! It was an incredible moment | |
---
[](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=4d03e206398d40f68a8f30cb5f7dab66&_e=GFEDADXCI9btWwYysOUtVJWPRGtmkTSQAHbO3rouaKez5Y3LIaWp8x3Xyo1Wu2yZihvwJ_gOtdFRsATz7_Jr5LlMvh-vzELGqUx5bJ2HMmaDD2sy59YmkxYoUGctxRF5ggp0nxK82IeOaLRbk1S7hQrrOFlPC8cOhY53ohxVqzDisrIiTc0WCRGt9OkiDurzMcj8b_1NhqY5R3Kx539UshIb7qBsUNvl7chaokcm2xg5DhOCi45n1mK_5xPoV5p94EOQ9Zy4dn00x-X9zwRseiRL35B2MHj3KvA8bygliaM3Iu6S0UvhUzG7vEr-kIQFVLw9z1Y59wKfFu1X_7o4XIyucyL-PRRdSvk-cBzfBjSxF0mQsPyd0MpppTYfIdANDiuImBSRtFc3c8fW2k5yxYjewLfEzr1pvax-X_0G8Ok%3D)
Peter,

This week, I made it official...and filed the paperwork to be on the ballot as a candidate for the governor of Arkansas! It was an incredible moment and was made more special by having my family by my side.

[](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=4d03e206398d40f68a8f30cb5f7dab66&_e=GFEDADXCI9btWwYysOUtVJWPRGtmkTSQAHbO3rouaKez5Y3LIaWp8x3Xyo1Wu2yZihvwJ_gOtdFRsATz7_Jr5LlMvh-vzELGqUx5bJ2HMmaDD2sy59YmkxYoUGctxRF5ggp0nxK82IeOaLRbk1S7hQrrOFlPC8cOhY53ohxVqzDisrIiTc0WCRGt9OkiDurzMcj8b_1NhqY5R3Kx539Usk51JeF68F90UXRTnntkU41FOSFpyE9DI5PsZ9xBD8uqwC8ZKujvJ79qytmwsT3KuAB52WvdY2_WHGWlqJGFNKnAoFEQacp1KtqU4nFeMxprGf1h-JNG-quBWgz9VXw23UyIhzvkKJvHrp1Q2S-R5zLLi4PGKXhDSBkq-Zrs9xh2ZvJ6fnCkKBhOnfmN7hjpdNPpSKHvSi9dcQRhrp9cbrg%3D)
I am running for governor because I love our state and care about our people. Arkansas is home, and I want our kids to grow to love our state just as much as we do. This means enacting bold, conservative reforms that unleash our full potential and standing up to the Radical Left in the fight for freedom. I am thankful for the overwhelming support we have received so far from tens of thousands of supporters across the state and country.

[](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=4d03e206398d40f68a8f30cb5f7dab66&_e=GFEDADXCI9btWwYysOUtVJWPRGtmkTSQAHbO3rouaKez5Y3LIaWp8x3Xyo1Wu2yZihvwJ_gOtdFRsATz7_Jr5LlMvh-vzELGqUx5bJ2HMmaDD2sy59YmkxYoUGctxRF5ggp0nxK82IeOaLRbk1S7hQrrOFlPC8cOhY53ohxVqzDisrIiTc0WCRGt9OkiDurzMcj8b_1NhqY5R3Kx539UsrYc8tX11mVMqFB0Q8-U5plaefi_MQoEza1PoHziI9a9EFpoz5XU4MUU_WDKxqZ4ok9_pY1ayKwEIpqPUrM5z7qWlLAimHDj8MZdHzbSGSY8Q_syMY1sqSHny-bsUmdaVJgA5nqR9DmC21oi5q2bYLi-5v_7Wv79PGwMH38mQ1NEOX74uPCOZ0gpbORxeDFCHk-3ORTZic9Xrj9mf7wmQWg%3D)
|
---

clean_body: This week, I made it official...and filed the paperwork to be on the ballot as a candidate for the governor of Arkansas! It was an incredible moment | | Peter, This week, I made it official...and filed the paperwork to be on the ballot as a candidate for the governor of Arkansas! It was an incredible moment and was made more special by having my family by my side. I am running for governor because I love our state and care about our people. Arkansas is home, and I want our kids to grow to love our state just as much as we do. This means enacting bold, conservative reforms that unleash our full potential and standing up to the Radical Left in the fight for freedom. I am thankful for the overwhelming support we have received so far from tens of thousands of supporters across the state and country. | We know the far-left is going to attack me at every turn, and we need to be prepared to fight back and win. Thank you for everything you do in the fight for freedom, Sarah Huckabee Sanders | | | | | | | Paid for by Sarah for Governor | | PO Box 26340, Little Rock, AR 72221 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

Friends --

We know flipping NY-18 and the House won’t be easy, but **the Democrats just threw us a redistricting curveball...**

To even stand a chance at winning in November, we need to increase our digital ads budget as soon as possible.

Folks, this doesn’t give us a lot of runway. If we want to have the funds to pull this off we’ll need a **MAJOR** influx of campaign cash immediately!

Long story short: We need to raise $10,000 in the next three days to fund our digital ads. **[Can you consider donating to our campaign so that we can get our message in front of voters ASAP and keep up with Sean Patrick Maloney’s spending?](http://links.colinschmitt.com/u/click?_t=2efbf9f7f9b54008ada1569759c619c2&_m=73a85a0326a34c22a58c836ad4c728d9&_e=N_uOw2PJ4G6wzwQgNL7CIjdCMD5Pu4RtaQhvayJx2vPe2Jje0702Scrh7qFWuKtwh91MFp6MaETt4vMYETmUx3QW1xPZZX7_fzAjU5TbSBvtO2gvT30o5bdlAJ04p0WkStJB94g587MEUgpZsxBgp0sLZXiuvuUTPWFLE75vdc27cTzFHlxINSkIDNJVOiPJn8jjM0l7VKKi_Yr1r1zdy06AzGGhmcO7-hDU6xdY5sndvfeejA2L0jF1h6tuq7QMEYGi_3qY7FRJP_s4BzCF_h-pjcgUnoQmnPMVIg5t4ddkCiwVt0mW-6catc204SYnpG0AKlGL8rUIoIQg7MbLoRGCjKuABozwn-78VPjcXJc8OYCAZw1KQRaJ22aStDMRh7SA_fMe_gxC7tqoUOh2Hvze54XALjHTYK3YwhNGnfQjHvOwqfEQ-YB4l_CuOYOudirayEwtOo8FfRL-RCKU4baaQAolpaDSkxsfiGJsBtlSmRpbxOHGQz7A-gtyQEi5)** | [**CONTRIBUTE**](http://links.colinschmitt.com/u/click?_t=2efbf9f7f9b54008ada1569759c619c2&_m=73a85a0326a34c22a58c836ad4c728d9&_e=N_uOw2PJ4G6wzwQgNL7CIjdCMD5Pu4RtaQhvayJx2vPe2Jje0702Scrh7qFWuKtwh91MFp6MaETt4vMYETmUx3QW1xPZZX7_fzAjU5TbSBvtO2gvT30o5bdlAJ04p0WkStJB94g587MEUgpZsxBgp0sLZXiuvuUTPWFLE75vdc27cTzFHlxINSkIDNJVOiPJn8jjM0l7VKKi_Yr1r1zdy06AzGGhmcO7-hDU6xdY5sndvfeejA2L0jF1h6tuq7QMEYGi_3qY7FRJP_s4BzCF_r4Urtb7W3vZNdsM7mlXRR3CD3NZ-7gzcHJRLoXoMTtKydp1IckyMt3nqOJ2oi5xSO5fLDg67wpzqhUJV1bIAxN3leJe9RatWfxidJcwlUq3prHjCn3FBmiZDtHE1t7NObdzuDPiwgfkDKu9wKKBtLgDCHr4e2Kp3ZLtyhJOov5_pLnyEJjwY7uBJ9QHZ86bQ2ln9Cmno2dZHXxA4cuFMZ8LmLhclx_sGfoNzppuZdA5cT0lUOHMWv3QZihF8v4TVw%3D%3D)
---
Maloney might be swimming in cash from far-Left special interests, but we’re relying on you to compete and win in New York’s 18th Congressional District.

Our strategy team told us if New York Voters don't see our advertisements before Democrats start spending **BIG** money against us, we're toast.

We have less than a week to hit this $10,000 goal to get our digital ads budget increased—any later than that and we’ll fall really behind. **[Can you chip in to help us hit our goal?](http://links.colinschmitt.com/u/click?_t=2efbf9f7f9b54008ada1569759c619c2&_m=73a85a0326a34c22a58c836ad4c728d9&_e=N_uOw2PJ4G6wzwQgNL7CIjdCMD5Pu4RtaQhvayJx2vPe2Jje0702Scrh7qFWuKtwh91MFp6MaETt4vMYETmUx3QW1xPZZX7_fzAjU5TbSBvtO2gvT30o5bdlAJ04p0WkStJB94g587MEUgpZsxBgp0sLZXiuvuUTPWFLE75vdc27cTzFHlxINSkIDNJVOiPJn8jjM0l7VKKi_Yr1r1zdy06AzGGhmcO7-hDU6xdY5sndvfeejA2L0jF1h6tuq7QMEYGi_3qY7FRJP_s4BzCF_h-pjcgUnoQmnPMVIg5t4ddKfFExqiGDnxBB8kYwtRGwqY_uUHZ4HDQiW03UL7hzCrJqZQkkkDKgrLRjx-8B7tbVROotj9VF_WqFNcBn16w-kRWMzUl5GwDWozhNBw8acQVa_1t1zdvwYdfeI1MOtVCTa02unNVAFkDe3R7wK-TLnORpSvpczDiOi182SXzXPfc7wmMZH3mM34HIYhN6Dv1HyK6jqSurt20ZpOcKHCQT)** [**CONTRIBUTE**](http://links.colinschmitt.com/u/click?_t=2efbf9f7f9b54008ada1569759c619c2&_m=73a85a0326a34c22a58c836ad4c728d9&_e=N_uOw2PJ4G6wzwQgNL7CIjdCMD5Pu4RtaQhvayJx2vPe2Jje0702Scrh7qFWuKtwh91MFp6MaETt4vMYETmUx3QW1xPZZX7_fzAjU5TbSBvtO2gvT30o5bdlAJ04p0WkStJB94g587MEUgpZsxBgp0sLZXiuvuUTPWFLE75vdc27cTzFHlxINSkIDNJVOiPJn8jjM0l7VKKi_Yr1r1zdy06AzGGhmcO7-hDU6xdY5sndvfeejA2L0jF1h6tuq7QMEYGi_3qY7FRJP_s4BzCF_viOZEUUY3L5CBWtrUGlfBDLO3MNeA4E9fLH2OIWdsKdPqyM5vhMUvthoJgzoTxio8CfyGG_tRkUB0VQ-MSrndXkLhnbz7ZNKVyv016pyzQUdhn6jXjk_PZ0wTlWmOgH8dI5fPQe3yG1pvoHTD-xvVs8F4BNcnzdSTyS0yk3T9ONqY1laupQFNSnftKB1u95lKtPuzlC2hVobzJOHFAG407aC0ELWm11kkgOKWUABDObl6fpOG1Aqlat4Y1hNBdrLg%3D%3D)

I'm in complete disbelief.

Donald Trump just announced he wants to raise**$1 BILLION** for his new social media site to rally his most loyal supporters and spread disinformation.

And reports just revealed his app has officially launched.

**I never thought it would come to this - but I need your help to make Trump's return to social media completely BACKFIRE.**

****[I'm calling for 8,500 Democratic gifts before my End of Month Deadline to ECLIPSE Trump's big launch, OUTRAISE his dangerous propaganda machine, and ensure he can NEVER use it to rise to power again. Can I count on you to step up before my deadline to protect our House Majority? It's more important than ever - I can't afford to let Trump's lies go unanswered. And if I reach my goal tonight, we could show Trump, his GOP enablers, and his big money donors that facts matter, justice will prevail, and the Big Lie will NEVER win. Can you rush an urgent $3 to RUIN Trump's social media launch by helping us elect House Democrats? >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/2WXVQrv_)****

| | | Friend, __**I wouldn’t be reaching out this weekend if it wasn’t****CRITICAL****for our mission to finally get leadership that stands up for the 603.** **[New Hampshire Needs YOU Today! →](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xODk1MjQ0OTk2MDA5NzkzODg5JmM9YzFoNiZlPTAmYj05MjUxNzQ1MTQmZD1jMmUxZTdl.ycZ2CMW9Z5ldSf8WJ_G_fK0VUhrkCjwdzBMDGgUs9DE)** Our fight this year is make or break for the state of New Hampshire. This isn’t just a political campaign. _It’s an all-out mission to stand up for our state when our current leaders are more focused on bringing the far-left failures of Washington here to our home._ I’m not sitting on the sidelines and letting it happen... But I know that in order to fight back for the Granite State, our campaign is going to need to reach important goals every step of the way. **And that’s the reason for my message today - we have one of those crucial benchmarks coming up****TOMORROW!** These budget goals help my team reach out to voters, put up ads, and take every step necessary to **FIGHT** for New Hampshire values and **RETIRE** Biden and Schumer’s puppet Maggie Hassan! [Will you help us reach this February goal so our defense of the 603 Way can stay on track?](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xODk1MjQ0OTk2MDA5NzkzODg5JmM9YzFoNiZlPTAmYj05MjUxNzQ1MjMmZD1mOGs0ejVo.M6oET1VNF0gi4gfKmHGlc8CdSezJXgcB0fKsGIwMy80)**_[](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xODk1MjQ0OTk2MDA5NzkzODg5JmM9YzFoNiZlPTAmYj05MjUxNzQ1MzUmZD12NGY1czN4.79NqScp2VivYToGm4QtzqWx076UZW6w48yHz08-a3pE)_**

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: Can you PLEASE contribute $3 today? We are behind on our February fundraising goals and time is running out. The timing is not great and Mark needs you now. Link inside.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Trump told his supporters that beating Mark was one of the most important things they can do this year.
#

[**Friends, our February fundraising deadline ends TOMORROW AT MIDNIGHT and we’re short of where we need to be to hit our goals for the month. The timing is NOT GREAT and Mark needs your help. Can you PLEASE make your first $3 contribution today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-feb22?refcode=em220227-2-7&t=1&refcode2=2206_6688874_FKxrmv&akid=2206%2E6688874%2EFKxrmv)
Things are really heating up...
**FIRST:** A Mitch-McConnell-backed dark money group started spending millions of dollars to defeat Mark Kelly.
**THEN:** One of our opponents unleashed a $10 million super PAC to beat us.
**AND THEN:** Trump told his supporters that beating Mark was one of the most important things they can do this year.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-feb22?refcode=em220227-2-7&t=2&refcode2=2206_6688874_FKxrmv&akid=2206%2E6688874%2EFKxrmv)
This monthly fundraising deadline is serious. The goals are NOT arbitrary. Hitting them is what we need to win. Falling short is not an option. So, please. This is so important:
[**Can you PLEASE make your first $3 contribution to help Mark Kelly defend this seat? Every donation means a lot when so many people are chipping in.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-feb22?refcode=em220227-2-7&t=3&refcode2=2206_6688874_FKxrmv&akid=2206%2E6688874%2EFKxrmv)

name: Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
subject: February has been a slower month for fundraising
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
If we flip North Carolina, we can secure a Democratic Senate majority.
#

Tomorrow night marks a huge fundraising goal that we need to hit before the end of the month, but as of right now, we’re falling short of where we need to be to get there.
[**If you can afford it, will you make a $3 donation right now to ensure that we hit our end-of-month fundraising goal? We have to keep up the pace if we are going to compete with Republicans and their bottomless special interest funding in North Carolina.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-feb22?refcode=em220227-2-ma&refcode2=464.357359.rIGdc5&noskip=true&t=1&akid=464%2E357359%2ErIGdc5)
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-feb22?refcode=em220227-2-ma&refcode2=464.357359.rIGdc5&t=2&akid=464%2E357359%2ErIGdc5)**
The GOP will spend unlimited sums of money to stop us from flipping this seat blue because they know that **if we flip North Carolina, we can secure a Democratic Senate majority.**
There’s nothing Mitch McConnell wants more than to be the majority leader again, but with our help, Cheri Beasley can make sure that does not happen.
But truthfully, February has been a slower month for our fundraising. That’s not entirely unexpected with a shorter month, but we cannot afford to fall too far behind.
[**So please, make a $3 donation today to help us pick up the pace and avoid a shortfall. Reaching this goal is critical if we’re going to flip this seat and elect Cheri Beasley.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-feb22?refcode=em220227-2-ma&refcode2=464.357359.rIGdc5&noskip=true&t=3&akid=464%2E357359%2ErIGdc5)
Thank you in advance for helping us reach our goal before tomorrow’s midnight deadline!
\- Team Beasley
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-feb22?refcode=em220227-2-ma&refcode2=464.357359.rIGdc5&t=4&akid=464%2E357359%2ErIGdc5)**

Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
PO Box 28778
Raleigh, NC 27611
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you want to receive fewer emails, you may [submit this form to get only our most important updates](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=5&akid=464%2E357359%2ErIGdc5). Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.cheribeasley.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=464%2E357359%2ErIGdc5). If you would like to support Cheri's campaign for the U.S. Senate in North Carolina, please consider [making a donation](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beasley-em-2021?refcode=em-footer&t=7&refcode2=464_357359_rIGdc5&akid=464%2E357359%2ErIGdc5) today to help us make history.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Brice=20Wiggins?=
subject: Brice Wiggins Weekly Legislative & Campaign Trail Update Feb. 27, 2022
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/d0f16786970a/brice-wiggins-for-congress-highlights-from-the-campaign-trail-8854981?e=698f056321)
---
Here is a recap of a few highlights from this week in my role as State Senator from District 52, as well as updates from our Congressional Campaign. Fulfilling my duties as State Senator will be a top priority for me during this campaign. After all, I took an oath to honorably serve my constituents and the Constitution.
|
---
|
---
_"We know only too well that war comes not when the forces of freedom are strong, but when they are weak. It is then that tyrants are tempted."__–Ronald Reagan, "Peace Through Strength," 1980_
|
---
| | | | | |
### My Statement on Russia’s Invasion of Ukraine
Our thoughts and prayers go out to Ukraine and its people. I condemn Vladimir Putin and his dictatorial invasion of Ukraine. What we are seeing coming to fruition, though force and aggression, is Vladimir Putin's decades-long plan of re-assembling the old Soviet Union.The Reagan Doctrine, espoused by the President himself in the quote above, was anchored in "Peace Through Strength." This week I issued [**my statement on Ukraine**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=069ea3a3d5&e=698f056321). It harkens back to "Peace By Strength" and is a call to our current, past and future Presidential administrations that we must be seen as strong and not weak. On Saturday, I received a briefing on Russia-Ukraine policy from foreign policy experts. In the coming days, I plan to weigh-in more on this topic with how we can address our foreign policy. As Congressman, my job will be to help check and shape policy of the executive branch; that is what I do as State Senator. Leadership is needed now.|
---
|
---
| | | | | |
---
|
### Attended YMBC Ball
We attended the 82nd YMBC (Young Men’s Business Club) Mardi Gras ball in Pascagoula on Friday night. Ed Wiggins, my great-grandfather, was highly involved in the business community as owner and founder of Wiggins Drugstores. I've attended (and served as a duke) of YMBC through the years. It’s an honor every time. His daughter, my great aunt Renee Wiggins Enger served as queen and my father Chris Wiggins served as King of Joy. Poppy's legacy of service lives on. He was a lifelong Rotarian. I, too, love being a Rotarian. I do everything I can to honor the legacy of service he started.|
---
| | | | | |
### Mississippi Wind Pool
“South Mississippi citizens continue to suffer under the weight of insurance costs . . . inaction and a lack of leadership at the federal level have allowed flood insurance rates to skyrocket. . . I am willing to stand up and fight for us to be treated fairly and to put money back in our pockets.”Click [**HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=ee599a9d11&e=698f056321) to read the full Y’all Politics’ article in which I’m quoted about how I will continue to advocate for the Coast and the continued support of the wind pool.|
---
|
---
| | | | | |
---
|
### Four Addys Won By The Focus Group for Our Campaign
I"The Addys" are the Oscars of advertising. The Focus Group, our team member which put together our website and announcement video and provides ongoing social media, advertising and communications support, took home multiple top awards, including Gold for our announcement video. Click [**HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=92ef68de9b&e=698f056321). Being a Congressman means assembling a team that can serve the constituents at the highest level. This is just one example of what we bring to the table. This is outward recognition of the hard work, creativity, and leadership that our campaign team shows every day. It's proof of what constituents will get in the halls of Congress.|
---
| | | | | |
---
|
---
| | | | | |
---
|
---
| | | | | | |
---
|
---
## The Week Ahead
* Tuesday is committee deadline day and “floor action” on House Bills
* House Bills will be handled in Senate committees
* Work on BP/GCRF and other appropriations beginning

|
---
Please stay tuned for future emails with updates from the legislative session, District 52, community events, and our Congressional campaign. Our campaign is in full swing and as you know, getting our message out takes funding. If you would like to provide financial support, please click the button below.

Sincerely,
| [DONATE TO OUR CAMPAIGN](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=159a08bdd4&e=698f056321)
---
|
---
|
---
Keep Up With Us!
| | | | [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=ffbe9fe1a6&e=698f056321)| [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=d63df2937b&e=698f056321)| [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=a8fc02064a&e=698f056321)| [](mailto:info@bricewiggins.ms)| [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=28c6e0f3fa&e=698f056321)
